# Product genericization and form management
_Exported on 12/21/2025 at 20:55:32 GMT+3 from Cursor (2.2.43)_

---

**User**

Merhaba,
Hem müşteriden gelen geri bildirimler hem de MovithForms ürünün generic bir ürün olup ileride SaaS bir modelde de çalışabilir olması için bazı notlarımız var:

İş Emri No girildikten sonra karşısına çıkacak form listesi yetkisine göre olmalı (Üretim operatörü Kalitenin formunu dolduramamalı)
=> Form Tanımlama ekranında bir seçenek olarak bu formu kimler/roller doldurabilir gibi.
=> İş Akışı Tanımlama ekranına da konabilirdi ama bazen öyle formlar olur ki onay akışı yoktur, sadece doldurulur ve sistemde saklanması istenebilir. Bu nedenle onay istemeyen formlar da doldurulabilmeli.
=> Doldurulan formlar güncellenedebilmeli.İş akışı yoksa direk güncelleyebilir zaten ama onay akışı başlamışsa güncelleme kapalı olur ancak geri gönderilirse güncellenebilir ve tekrar onaya gönderilir.
Bu nedenlerle login olunduktan sonra form doldurma yapılabilir ve yetkisine göre iş emri girildikten sonra yetkisi olduğu formlar karşısına çıkar.
=> Mevcutta login olmadan iş emri okutulabiliyor. Bu değiştirilecek, önce login olması istenecek. Generic çözüm için gerekiyor zaten.
=> Generic çözüm olarak İş Emri No = Takip No olarak düşünülebilir. Farklı yerlerde ismi farklı olabilir çünkü. DB ve yazılım tarafı takip no olarak isimlenir ancak frontend ekranda gösterilirken tenant bazlı değişiklikler olabilir. Mesela bir müşterimiz İş Emri Numarasını takip no için kullanırken başka müşteri Döküman Noyu takip no olarak düşünebilir vs.

---

**Cursor**

Mevcut yapıyı inceliyorum: form tanımlama, iş akışı, login ve iş emri okutma akışlarını kontrol ediyorum.


İlgili dosyaları inceliyorum:


Form seçim sayfası ve rol yapısını inceliyorum:


Değişiklik planı:

## Yapılacak Değişiklikler Özeti

### 1. Form Yetkilendirme Sistemi
- `FormDefinition` entity'sine formu doldurabilecek roller eklenmeli
- Form seçim sayfasında kullanıcının yetkisi olan formlar gösterilmeli

### 2. Login Zorunluluğu
- İş emri okutma ekranına login kontrolü eklenmeli
- Login olmadan iş emri okutma engellenmeli

### 3. İş Emri No → Takip No (Generic Yapı)
- Backend'de `JobOrderNo` → `TrackingNo` olarak değiştirilmeli
- Frontend'de tenant bazlı farklı isimler gösterilebilmeli (İş Emri No, Döküman No, vb.)

### 4. Form Güncelleme Mekanizması
- Formlar güncellenebilmeli
- Onay akışı başlamışsa geri gönderilirse güncellenebilir

## Detaylı Uygulama Planı

### Backend Değişiklikleri

#### 1.1 FormDefinition Entity - Yetki Alanları Ekleme

```csharp
// Backend/src/Domain/Entities/FormDefinition.cs
public class FormDefinition : BaseAuditableEntity, ITenantEntity
{
    // ... mevcut alanlar ...
    
    // Yeni: Bu formu doldurabilecek roller (JSON array olarak saklanabilir veya ayrı tablo)
    public string? AllowedRolesJson { get; set; } // ["Operator", "TeamLeader"] gibi
    // VEYA
    // public ICollection<FormDefinitionRole> AllowedRoles { get; set; } = new List<FormDefinitionRole>();
}
```

```csharp

{
    // ... mevcut alanlar ...

}
```

```csharp

{
    public string UserId { get; set; } = default!;
    public Guid TenantId { get; set; }
    public string? TrackingNo { get; set; } // İş emri no yerine takip no
}

public class GetFormsForUserQueryHandler : IRequestHandler<GetFormsForUserQuery, List<FormDefinitionDto>>
{
    // Kullanıcının rollerini al
    // FormDefinition'lardan AllowedRoles'e göre filtrele
    // Sadece kullanıcının yetkisi olan formları döndür
}
```

#### 1.4 JobOrderNo → TrackingNo Değişikliği

```csharp
// Backend/src/Domain/Entities/FormInstance.cs
public class FormInstance : BaseAuditableEntity, ITenantEntity
{
    // ... mevcut alanlar ...
    public string TrackingNo { get; set; } = default!; // JobOrderNo yerine
}

// Tüm ilgili yerlerde JobOrderNo → TrackingNo değiştirilmeli:
// - FormInstanceConfiguration
// - StartFormInstanceCommand
// - GetFormsByJobOrderQuery → GetFormsByTrackingNoQuery
// - FormInstanceRepository
```

#### 1.5 Form Güncelleme Command

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Commands/Forms/UpdateFormInstance.cs (YENİ)
[Authorize]
public class UpdateFormInstanceCommand : IRequest<FormInstanceDto>
{
    public Guid FormInstanceId { get; set; }
    public Dictionary<string, object> DataJson { get; set; } = new();
    public string UpdatedBy { get; set; } = default!;
}

// Handler'da kontrol:
// - FormInstance Draft ise güncelleme yapılabilir
// - FormInstance InReview ise sadece geri gönderilmişse (CurrentStepOrder ilk adımsa) güncelleme yapılabilir
// - Approved ise güncelleme yapılamaz
```

### Frontend Değişiklikleri

#### 2.1 Login Guard - İş Emri Sayfası

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(mobile)/job-order/page.tsx
'use client';

import { useAuth } from '@/hooks/useAuth';
import { useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';

export default function JobOrderPage() {
  const { user, loading } = useAuth();
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!loading && !user) {
      router.push('/login');
    }
  }, [user, loading, router]);

  // ... mevcut kod ...
}
```

#### 2.2 Form Seçim Sayfası - Yetki Filtreleme

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(mobile)/forms/page.tsx
// Mevcut loadActiveForms yerine:
const loadFormsForUser = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormDefinitionDto[] }>(
      `${API_ENDPOINTS.formDefinitions.getForUser}?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`
    );
    setForms(response.data ?? []);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error loading forms:', error);
  } finally {
    setLoading(false);
  }
};
```

#### 2.3 Form Tanımlama - Yetki Seçimi UI

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(admin)/form-definitions/new/page.tsx
// Frontend/src/app/(admin)/form-definitions/[id]/page.tsx
// Yeni state:
const [allowedRoles, setAllowedRoles] = useState<string[]>([]);

// UI'da rol seçimi için checkbox'lar veya multi-select
// Mevcut tenant rollerini listeleyen bir dropdown
```

### Database Migration

```csharp
// Backend/src/Infrastructure/Migrations/PostgreSQL/XXXXXX_AddFormAuthorizationAndTrackingNo.cs
public partial class AddFormAuthorizationAndTrackingNo : Migration
{
    protected override void Up(MigrationBuilder migrationBuilder)
    {
        // 1. FormDefinition'a AllowedRolesJson ekle
        migrationBuilder.AddColumn<string>(
            name: "AllowedRolesJson",
            table: "FormDefinitions",
            type: "text",
            nullable: true);

        // 2. FormInstance'da JobOrderNo → TrackingNo
        migrationBuilder.RenameColumn(
            name: "JobOrderNo",
            table: "FormInstances",
            newName: "TrackingNo");

        // Index'i de güncelle
        migrationBuilder.RenameIndex(
            name: "IX_FormInstances_JobOrderNo",
            table: "FormInstances",
            newName: "IX_FormInstances_TrackingNo");
    }

    protected override void Down(MigrationBuilder migrationBuilder)
    {
        // Rollback
    }
}
```

```csharp
    public string TrackingNoLabel { get; set; } = "İş Emri No"; // Default
```

```typescript
// Frontend - Tenant settings'den label'ı al

```

## Öncelik Sırası

1. Login zorunluluğu (hızlı)
2. Form yetkilendirme (temel güvenlik)
3. JobOrderNo → TrackingNo (generic yapı)
4. Form güncelleme (işlevsellik)

Hangi kısımdan başlamak istersiniz? İsterseniz tüm değişiklikleri adım adım uygulayabilirim.

Domain entity'lerini güncelliyorum:


```csharp
using MovithForms.Domain.Common;

namespace MovithForms.Domain.Entities;

public class FormDefinition : BaseAuditableEntity, ITenantEntity
{
    public new Guid Id { get; set; }
    public Guid TenantId { get; set; }
    public string Name { get; set; } = default!;
    public string Code { get; set; } = default!;
    public int Version { get; set; }
    public bool IsActive { get; set; }
    public string SchemaJson { get; set; } = default!;
    public string? AllowedRolesJson { get; set; } // JSON array of role names: ["Operator", "TeamLeader"]

    // Navigation properties
    public ICollection<WorkflowDefinition> WorkflowDefinitions { get; set; } = new List<WorkflowDefinition>();
    public ICollection<FormInstance> FormInstances { get; set; } = new List<FormInstance>();
}


```

```csharp
using MovithForms.Domain.Common;
using MovithForms.Domain.Enums;

namespace MovithForms.Domain.Entities;

public class FormInstance : BaseAuditableEntity, ITenantEntity
{
    public new Guid Id { get; set; }
    public Guid TenantId { get; set; }
    public Guid FormDefinitionId { get; set; }
    public FormDefinition FormDefinition { get; set; } = default!;
    public Guid WorkflowDefinitionId { get; set; }
    public WorkflowDefinition WorkflowDefinition { get; set; } = default!;
    public string TrackingNo { get; set; } = default!;
    public FormStatus CurrentStatus { get; set; }
    public int CurrentStepOrder { get; set; }    

    // Navigation properties
    public ICollection<FormSubmissionData> SubmissionData { get; set; } = new List<FormSubmissionData>();
    public ICollection<FormAttachment> Attachments { get; set; } = new List<FormAttachment>();
    public ICollection<WorkflowAction> WorkflowActions { get; set; } = new List<WorkflowAction>();
}


```

```csharp
using MovithForms.Domain.Common;

namespace MovithForms.Domain.Entities;

public class TenantIntegrationSettings : BaseAuditableEntity, ITenantEntity
{
    public new Guid Id { get; set; }
    public Guid TenantId { get; set; }

    // Teams Integration
    public string? TeamsWebhookUrl { get; set; }
    public bool TeamsEnabled { get; set; }

    // Slack Integration
    public string? SlackWebhookUrl { get; set; }
    public bool SlackEnabled { get; set; }

    // Generic Settings
    public string TrackingNoLabel { get; set; } = "İş Emri No";
}


```

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;

public class FormDefinitionConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<FormDefinition>
{
    public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<FormDefinition> builder)
    {
        builder.HasKey(e => e.Id);
        builder.Property(e => e.Name).IsRequired().HasMaxLength(200);
        builder.Property(e => e.Code).IsRequired().HasMaxLength(50);
        builder.HasIndex(e => e.Code).IsUnique();
        builder.Property(e => e.Version).IsRequired();
        builder.Property(e => e.IsActive).IsRequired();
        builder.Property(e => e.SchemaJson).IsRequired().HasColumnType("nvarchar(max)");
        builder.Property(e => e.AllowedRolesJson).HasColumnType("nvarchar(max)");
        builder.Property(e => e.CreatedAt).IsRequired();
        builder.Property(e => e.CreatedBy).IsRequired().HasMaxLength(100);
        builder.Property(e => e.ModifiedBy).HasMaxLength(100);
    }
}


```

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;

public class FormInstanceConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<FormInstance>
{
    public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<FormInstance> builder)
    {
        builder.HasKey(e => e.Id);
        builder.Property(e => e.FormDefinitionId).IsRequired();
        builder.Property(e => e.WorkflowDefinitionId).IsRequired();
        builder.Property(e => e.TrackingNo).IsRequired().HasMaxLength(100);
        builder.HasIndex(e => e.TrackingNo);
        builder.Property(e => e.CurrentStatus).IsRequired().HasConversion<int>();
        builder.Property(e => e.CurrentStepOrder).IsRequired();
        builder.Property(e => e.CreatedAt).IsRequired();
        builder.Property(e => e.CreatedBy).IsRequired().HasMaxLength(100);
        builder.Property(e => e.ModifiedBy).HasMaxLength(100);

        builder.HasOne(e => e.FormDefinition)
            .WithMany(f => f.FormInstances)
            .HasForeignKey(e => e.FormDefinitionId)
            .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Restrict);

        builder.HasOne(e => e.WorkflowDefinition)
            .WithMany(w => w.FormInstances)
            .HasForeignKey(e => e.WorkflowDefinitionId)
            .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Restrict);
    }
}


```

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;

public class TenantIntegrationSettingsConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<TenantIntegrationSettings>
{
    public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<TenantIntegrationSettings> builder)
    {
        builder.HasKey(e => e.Id);
        builder.Property(e => e.TenantId).IsRequired();
        builder.Property(e => e.TeamsWebhookUrl).HasMaxLength(500);
        builder.Property(e => e.SlackWebhookUrl).HasMaxLength(500);
        builder.Property(e => e.TrackingNoLabel).HasMaxLength(100).HasDefaultValue("İş Emri No");

        builder.HasIndex(e => e.TenantId).IsUnique();
    }
}


```

Migration dosyasını oluşturuyorum:


Linter hatalarını kontrol ediyorum:


JobOrderNo referanslarını TrackingNo'ya güncelliyorum:


Backend'deki tüm JobOrderNo referanslarını TrackingNo'ya güncelliyorum:


Backend dosyalarını güncelliyorum:


```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;
using MovithForms.Domain.Enums;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Commands.Forms;

[Authorize]
public class StartFormInstanceCommand : IRequest<FormInstanceDto>
{
    public Guid FormDefinitionId { get; set; }
    public Guid WorkflowDefinitionId { get; set; }
    public string TrackingNo { get; set; } = default!;
    public string CreatedBy { get; set; } = default!;
}

public class StartFormInstanceCommandHandler : IRequestHandler<StartFormInstanceCommand, FormInstanceDto>
{
    private readonly IFormInstanceRepository _formInstanceRepository;
    private readonly IFormDefinitionRepository _formDefinitionRepository;
    private readonly IWorkflowDefinitionRepository _workflowDefinitionRepository;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;

    public StartFormInstanceCommandHandler(
        IFormInstanceRepository formInstanceRepository,
        IFormDefinitionRepository formDefinitionRepository,
        IWorkflowDefinitionRepository workflowDefinitionRepository,
        IMapper mapper)
    {
        _formInstanceRepository = formInstanceRepository;
        _formDefinitionRepository = formDefinitionRepository;
        _workflowDefinitionRepository = workflowDefinitionRepository;
        _mapper = mapper;
    }

    public async Task<FormInstanceDto> Handle(StartFormInstanceCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var formDefinition = await _formDefinitionRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.FormDefinitionId, cancellationToken);
        if (formDefinition == null)
            throw new KeyNotFoundException($"FormDefinition with ID {request.FormDefinitionId} not found.");

        var workflowDefinition = await _workflowDefinitionRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.WorkflowDefinitionId, cancellationToken);
        if (workflowDefinition == null)
            throw new KeyNotFoundException($"WorkflowDefinition with ID {request.WorkflowDefinitionId} not found.");

        if (workflowDefinition.FormDefinitionId != request.FormDefinitionId)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("WorkflowDefinition does not belong to the specified FormDefinition.");

        var firstStep = workflowDefinition.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder).FirstOrDefault();
        if (firstStep == null)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("WorkflowDefinition must have at least one step.");

        var formInstance = new FormInstance
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            FormDefinitionId = request.FormDefinitionId,
            FormDefinition = formDefinition,
            WorkflowDefinitionId = request.WorkflowDefinitionId,
            WorkflowDefinition = workflowDefinition,
            JobOrderNo = request.JobOrderNo,
            CurrentStatus = FormStatus.Draft,
            CurrentStepOrder = firstStep.StepOrder,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
            CreatedBy = request.CreatedBy
        };

        var result = await _formInstanceRepository.AddAsync(formInstance, cancellationToken);
        return _mapper.Map<FormInstanceDto>(result);
    }
}


```

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;
using MovithForms.Domain.Enums;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Commands.Forms;

[Authorize]
public class StartFormInstanceCommand : IRequest<FormInstanceDto>
{
    public Guid FormDefinitionId { get; set; }
    public Guid WorkflowDefinitionId { get; set; }
    public string TrackingNo { get; set; } = default!;
    public string CreatedBy { get; set; } = default!;
}

public class StartFormInstanceCommandHandler : IRequestHandler<StartFormInstanceCommand, FormInstanceDto>
{
    private readonly IFormInstanceRepository _formInstanceRepository;
    private readonly IFormDefinitionRepository _formDefinitionRepository;
    private readonly IWorkflowDefinitionRepository _workflowDefinitionRepository;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;

    public StartFormInstanceCommandHandler(
        IFormInstanceRepository formInstanceRepository,
        IFormDefinitionRepository formDefinitionRepository,
        IWorkflowDefinitionRepository workflowDefinitionRepository,
        IMapper mapper)
    {
        _formInstanceRepository = formInstanceRepository;
        _formDefinitionRepository = formDefinitionRepository;
        _workflowDefinitionRepository = workflowDefinitionRepository;
        _mapper = mapper;
    }

    public async Task<FormInstanceDto> Handle(StartFormInstanceCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var formDefinition = await _formDefinitionRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.FormDefinitionId, cancellationToken);
        if (formDefinition == null)
            throw new KeyNotFoundException($"FormDefinition with ID {request.FormDefinitionId} not found.");

        var workflowDefinition = await _workflowDefinitionRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.WorkflowDefinitionId, cancellationToken);
        if (workflowDefinition == null)
            throw new KeyNotFoundException($"WorkflowDefinition with ID {request.WorkflowDefinitionId} not found.");

        if (workflowDefinition.FormDefinitionId != request.FormDefinitionId)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("WorkflowDefinition does not belong to the specified FormDefinition.");

        var firstStep = workflowDefinition.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder).FirstOrDefault();
        if (firstStep == null)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("WorkflowDefinition must have at least one step.");

        var formInstance = new FormInstance
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            FormDefinitionId = request.FormDefinitionId,
            FormDefinition = formDefinition,
            WorkflowDefinitionId = request.WorkflowDefinitionId,
            WorkflowDefinition = workflowDefinition,
            TrackingNo = request.TrackingNo,
            CurrentStatus = FormStatus.Draft,
            CurrentStepOrder = firstStep.StepOrder,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
            CreatedBy = request.CreatedBy
        };

        var result = await _formInstanceRepository.AddAsync(formInstance, cancellationToken);
        return _mapper.Map<FormInstanceDto>(result);
    }
}


```

```csharp
namespace MovithForms.Application.DTOs;

{

    public Guid WorkflowDefinitionId { get; set; }

    public string TrackingNo { get; set; } = default!;

    public string? CurrentStatusName { get; set; }

    public Dictionary<string, object>? DataJson { get; set; }
    public List<FormAttachmentDto> Attachments { get; set; } = new();
    public List<WorkflowActionDto> WorkflowActions { get; set; } = new();
    public DateTimeOffset CreatedAt { get; set; }
    public string CreatedBy { get; set; } = default!;

}
```

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Queries.Forms;

[Authorize(Roles = $"{Roles.Administrator},{Roles.FirmAdmin}")]
public class GetFormsByTrackingNoQuery : IRequest<List<FormInstanceDto>>
{
    public string TrackingNo { get; set; } = default!;
}

public class GetFormsByTrackingNoQueryHandler : IRequestHandler<GetFormsByTrackingNoQuery, List<FormInstanceDto>>
{
    private readonly IFormInstanceRepository _repository;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;
    private readonly IIdentityService _identityService;

    public GetFormsByTrackingNoQueryHandler(
        IFormInstanceRepository repository, 
        IMapper mapper,
        IIdentityService identityService)
    {
        _repository = repository;
        _mapper = mapper;
        _identityService = identityService;
    }

    public async Task<List<FormInstanceDto>> Handle(GetFormsByTrackingNoQuery request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var entities = await _repository.GetByTrackingNoAsync(request.TrackingNo, cancellationToken);
        var dtos = _mapper.Map<List<FormInstanceDto>>(entities);
        
        // Batch olarak tüm username'leri doldur
        await PopulateUserNamesAsync(dtos, cancellationToken);
        
        return dtos;
    }

    private async Task PopulateUserNamesAsync(List<FormInstanceDto> dtos, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        // Tüm form instance'lardan unique user ID'leri topla
        var userIds = new HashSet<string>();
        
        foreach (var dto in dtos)
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(dto.CreatedBy))
                userIds.Add(dto.CreatedBy);
                
            foreach (var action in dto.WorkflowActions)
            {
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(action.PerformedBy))
                    userIds.Add(action.PerformedBy);
            }
        }

        if (userIds.Count == 0) return;

        // Tek bir batch sorgu ile tüm username'leri al
        var userNames = await _identityService.GetUserNamesAsync(userIds);

        // Tüm DTO'lara set et
        foreach (var dto in dtos)
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(dto.CreatedBy) && 
                userNames.TryGetValue(dto.CreatedBy, out var createdByUserName))
            {
                dto.CreatedByUserName = createdByUserName;
            }

            foreach (var action in dto.WorkflowActions)
            {
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(action.PerformedBy) && 
                    userNames.TryGetValue(action.PerformedBy, out var performedByUserName))
                {
                    action.PerformedByUserName = performedByUserName;
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

```

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;
using MovithForms.Domain.Enums;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data.Extensions;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Repositories;

public class FormInstanceRepository : BaseRepo<FormInstance>, IFormInstanceRepository
{
    private readonly ITenantProvider _tenantProvider;

    public FormInstanceRepository(ApplicationDbContext context, ITenantProvider tenantProvider) : base(context)
    {
        _tenantProvider = tenantProvider;
    }

    public async Task<FormInstance?> GetByIdAsync(Guid id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        return await _context.FormInstances
            .ForTenant(_tenantProvider)
            .Include(f => f.FormDefinition)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowDefinition)
                .ThenInclude(w => w.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder))
            .Include(f => f.SubmissionData.OrderByDescending(s => s.SubmittedAt))
            .Include(f => f.Attachments)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowActions.OrderBy(a => a.PerformedAt))
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(e => e.Id == id, cancellationToken);
    }

    public async Task<List<FormInstance>> GetByTrackingNoAsync(string trackingNo, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        return await _context.FormInstances
            .ForTenant(_tenantProvider)
            .Include(f => f.FormDefinition)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowDefinition)
                .ThenInclude(w => w.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder))
            .Include(f => f.SubmissionData.OrderByDescending(s => s.SubmittedAt))
            .Include(f => f.Attachments)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowActions.OrderBy(a => a.PerformedAt))
            .Where(e => e.TrackingNo == trackingNo)
            .OrderByDescending(e => e.CreatedAt)
            .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
    }

    public async Task<List<FormInstance>> GetPendingApprovalsByRoleAsync(string role, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        return await _context.FormInstances
            .ForTenant(_tenantProvider)
            .Include(f => f.FormDefinition)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowDefinition)
                .ThenInclude(w => w.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder))
            .Include(f => f.SubmissionData.OrderByDescending(s => s.SubmittedAt))
            .Include(f => f.Attachments)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowActions.OrderBy(a => a.PerformedAt))
            .Where(e => e.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.InReview || e.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Returned)
            .Where(e => e.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.Any(s => s.StepOrder == e.CurrentStepOrder && s.Role == role))
            .OrderByDescending(e => e.CreatedAt)
            .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
    }

    public Task SubmitFormDataWithSubmissionAsync(FormInstance entity, FormSubmissionData submissionData, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        // Yeni submission data'yı ekle
        entity.SubmissionData.Add(submissionData);
        _context.Entry(submissionData).State = EntityState.Added;

        // Entity'nin kendisini Modified olarak işaretle
        var entityEntry = _context.Entry(entity);
        entityEntry.State = EntityState.Modified;

        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    public Task PerformWorkflowActionWithActionAsync(FormInstance entity, WorkflowAction workflowAction, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        // Yeni workflow action'ı ekle
        entity.WorkflowActions.Add(workflowAction);
        _context.Entry(workflowAction).State = EntityState.Added;

        // Entity'nin kendisini Modified olarak işaretle
        var entityEntry = _context.Entry(entity);
        entityEntry.State = EntityState.Modified;

        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }
}


```

```csharp
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;

public interface IFormInstanceRepository : IBaseRepo<FormInstance>
{
    Task<FormInstance?> GetByIdAsync(Guid id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    Task<List<FormInstance>> GetByTrackingNoAsync(string trackingNo, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    Task<List<FormInstance>> GetPendingApprovalsByRoleAsync(string role, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    Task SubmitFormDataWithSubmissionAsync(FormInstance entity, FormSubmissionData submissionData, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    Task PerformWorkflowActionWithActionAsync(FormInstance entity, WorkflowAction workflowAction, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
}
```

```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using MovithForms.Application.Commands.Forms;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Application.Queries.Forms;
using MovithForms.Application.Queries.Workflows;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;
using System.Security.Claims;

namespace MovithForms.Web.Endpoints;

public class Forms : EndpointGroupBase
{
    public override void Map(WebApplication app)
    {
        app.MapGroup(this)
            .RequireAuthorization()
            .MapPost(Start, nameof(Start))
            .MapGet(GetById, "{id:guid}")
            .MapPost(SubmitFormData, "{id:guid}/submit")
            .MapPost(PerformAction, "{id:guid}/actions")
            .MapGet(GetByTrackingNo, "GetByTrackingNo/{trackingNo}")
            .MapGet(GetPendingApprovals, nameof(GetPendingApprovals));
    }
    
    public async Task<IResult> Start(ISender sender, StartFormInstanceCommand command, ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        command.CreatedBy = user.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) ?? "System";
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Created($"/api/Forms/{result.Id}", result);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> GetById(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetFormInstanceQuery query)
    {
        var result = await sender.Send(query);
        return result != null ? Results.Ok(result) : Results.NotFound();
    }
    
    public async Task<IResult> SubmitFormData(ISender sender, Guid id, SubmitFormDataCommand command, ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        if (id != command.FormInstanceId)
            return Results.BadRequest();

        command.SubmittedBy = user.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) ?? "System";
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> PerformAction(ISender sender, Guid id, PerformWorkflowActionCommand command, ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        if (id != command.FormInstanceId)
            return Results.BadRequest();

        command.PerformedBy = user.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) ?? "System";
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }
    
    public Task<List<FormInstanceDto>> GetByJobOrder(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetFormsByJobOrderQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public Task<List<FormInstanceDto>> GetPendingApprovals(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetPendingApprovalsQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }
}

```

```csharp
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
```

Command'ları ve AutoMapper mapping'lerini güncelliyorum:


```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Commands.FormDefinitions;

[Authorize(Roles = $"{Roles.Administrator},{Roles.FirmAdmin}")]
public class CreateFormDefinitionCommand : IRequest<FormDefinitionDto>
{
    public string Name { get; set; } = default!;
    public string Code { get; set; } = default!;
    public int Version { get; set; } = 1;
    public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    public string SchemaJson { get; set; } = default!;
    public List<string>? AllowedRoles { get; set; }
    public string CreatedBy { get; set; } = default!;
}

public class CreateFormDefinitionCommandHandler : IRequestHandler<CreateFormDefinitionCommand, FormDefinitionDto>
{
    private readonly IFormDefinitionRepository _repository;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;

    public CreateFormDefinitionCommandHandler(IFormDefinitionRepository repository, IMapper mapper)
    {
        _repository = repository;
        _mapper = mapper;
    }

    public async Task<FormDefinitionDto> Handle(CreateFormDefinitionCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var entity = new FormDefinition
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            Name = request.Name,
            Code = request.Code,
            Version = request.Version,
            IsActive = request.IsActive,
            SchemaJson = request.SchemaJson,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
            CreatedBy = request.CreatedBy
        };

        var result = await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        return _mapper.Map<FormDefinitionDto>(result);
    }
}
```

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;
using System.Text.Json;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Commands.FormDefinitions;

[Authorize(Roles = $"{Roles.Administrator},{Roles.FirmAdmin}")]
public class CreateFormDefinitionCommand : IRequest<FormDefinitionDto>
{
    public string Name { get; set; } = default!;
    public string Code { get; set; } = default!;
    public int Version { get; set; } = 1;
    public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    public string SchemaJson { get; set; } = default!;
    public List<string>? AllowedRoles { get; set; }
    public string CreatedBy { get; set; } = default!;
}

public class CreateFormDefinitionCommandHandler : IRequestHandler<CreateFormDefinitionCommand, FormDefinitionDto>
{
    private readonly IFormDefinitionRepository _repository;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;

    public CreateFormDefinitionCommandHandler(IFormDefinitionRepository repository, IMapper mapper)
    {
        _repository = repository;
        _mapper = mapper;
    }

    public async Task<FormDefinitionDto> Handle(CreateFormDefinitionCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var entity = new FormDefinition
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            Name = request.Name,
            Code = request.Code,
            Version = request.Version,
            IsActive = request.IsActive,
            SchemaJson = request.SchemaJson,
            AllowedRolesJson = request.AllowedRoles != null && request.AllowedRoles.Any() 
                ? JsonSerializer.Serialize(request.AllowedRoles) 
                : null,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
            CreatedBy = request.CreatedBy
        };

        var result = await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        return _mapper.Map<FormDefinitionDto>(result);
    }
```

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Commands.FormDefinitions;

[Authorize(Roles = $"{Roles.Administrator},{Roles.FirmAdmin}")]
public class UpdateFormDefinitionCommand : IRequest<FormDefinitionDto>
{
    public Guid Id { get; set; }
    public string Name { get; set; } = default!;
    public string Code { get; set; } = default!;
    public int Version { get; set; }
    public bool IsActive { get; set; }
    public string SchemaJson { get; set; } = default!;
    public List<string>? AllowedRoles { get; set; }
    public string UpdatedBy { get; set; } = default!;
}

public class UpdateFormDefinitionCommandHandler : IRequestHandler<UpdateFormDefinitionCommand, FormDefinitionDto>
{
    private readonly IFormDefinitionRepository _repository;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;

    public UpdateFormDefinitionCommandHandler(IFormDefinitionRepository repository, IMapper mapper)
    {
        _repository = repository;
        _mapper = mapper;
    }

    public async Task<FormDefinitionDto> Handle(UpdateFormDefinitionCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(request.Id, cancellationToken);
        if (entity == null)
            throw new KeyNotFoundException($"FormDefinition with ID {request.Id} not found.");

        entity.Name = request.Name;
        entity.Code = request.Code;
        entity.Version = request.Version;
        entity.IsActive = request.IsActive;
        entity.SchemaJson = request.SchemaJson;
        entity.ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
        entity.ModifiedBy = request.UpdatedBy;

        await _repository.UpdateAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        return _mapper.Map<FormDefinitionDto>(entity);
    }
}


```

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;
using System.Text.Json;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Commands.FormDefinitions;

[Authorize(Roles = $"{Roles.Administrator},{Roles.FirmAdmin}")]
public class UpdateFormDefinitionCommand : IRequest<FormDefinitionDto>
{
    public Guid Id { get; set; }
    public string Name { get; set; } = default!;
    public string Code { get; set; } = default!;
    public int Version { get; set; }
    public bool IsActive { get; set; }
    public string SchemaJson { get; set; } = default!;
    public List<string>? AllowedRoles { get; set; }
    public string UpdatedBy { get; set; } = default!;
}

public class UpdateFormDefinitionCommandHandler : IRequestHandler<UpdateFormDefinitionCommand, FormDefinitionDto>
{
    private readonly IFormDefinitionRepository _repository;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;

    public UpdateFormDefinitionCommandHandler(IFormDefinitionRepository repository, IMapper mapper)
    {
        _repository = repository;
        _mapper = mapper;
    }

    public async Task<FormDefinitionDto> Handle(UpdateFormDefinitionCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(request.Id, cancellationToken);
        if (entity == null)
            throw new KeyNotFoundException($"FormDefinition with ID {request.Id} not found.");

        entity.Name = request.Name;
        entity.Code = request.Code;
        entity.Version = request.Version;
        entity.IsActive = request.IsActive;
        entity.SchemaJson = request.SchemaJson;
        entity.ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
        entity.ModifiedBy = request.UpdatedBy;

        await _repository.UpdateAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        return _mapper.Map<FormDefinitionDto>(entity);
    }
}
```

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;
using System.Text.Json;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Commands.FormDefinitions;

[Authorize(Roles = $"{Roles.Administrator},{Roles.FirmAdmin}")]
public class UpdateFormDefinitionCommand : IRequest<FormDefinitionDto>
{
    public Guid Id { get; set; }
    public string Name { get; set; } = default!;
    public string Code { get; set; } = default!;
    public int Version { get; set; }
    public bool IsActive { get; set; }
    public string SchemaJson { get; set; } = default!;
    public List<string>? AllowedRoles { get; set; }
    public string UpdatedBy { get; set; } = default!;
}

public class UpdateFormDefinitionCommandHandler : IRequestHandler<UpdateFormDefinitionCommand, FormDefinitionDto>
{
    private readonly IFormDefinitionRepository _repository;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;

    public UpdateFormDefinitionCommandHandler(IFormDefinitionRepository repository, IMapper mapper)
    {
        _repository = repository;
        _mapper = mapper;
    }

    public async Task<FormDefinitionDto> Handle(UpdateFormDefinitionCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(request.Id, cancellationToken);
        if (entity == null)
            throw new KeyNotFoundException($"FormDefinition with ID {request.Id} not found.");

        entity.Name = request.Name;
        entity.Code = request.Code;
        entity.Version = request.Version;
        entity.IsActive = request.IsActive;
        entity.SchemaJson = request.SchemaJson;
        entity.AllowedRolesJson = request.AllowedRoles != null && request.AllowedRoles.Any() 
            ? JsonSerializer.Serialize(request.AllowedRoles) 
            : null;
        entity.ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
        entity.ModifiedBy = request.UpdatedBy;

        await _repository.UpdateAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        return _mapper.Map<FormDefinitionDto>(entity);
    }
}


```

AutoMapper mapping'ini güncelliyorum:


```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;
using System.Text.Json;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Common.Mappings;

public class MappingProfile : Profile
{
    public MappingProfile()
    {
        CreateMap<FormDefinition, FormDefinitionDto>()
            .ForMember(dest => dest.AllowedRoles, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => 
                !string.IsNullOrEmpty(src.AllowedRolesJson) 
                    ? JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<string>>(src.AllowedRolesJson) 
                    : null))
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CreatedAt, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.CreatedAt))
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CreatedBy, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.CreatedBy ?? string.Empty));

        CreateMap<WorkflowDefinition, WorkflowDefinitionDto>()
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CreatedAt, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.CreatedAt))
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CreatedBy, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.CreatedBy ?? string.Empty));

        CreateMap<WorkflowStep, WorkflowStepDto>();

        CreateMap<WorkflowAction, WorkflowActionDto>()
            .ForMember(dest => dest.ActionTypeName, opt => opt.Ignore())
            .AfterMap((src, dest) =>
            {
                dest.ActionTypeName = src.ActionType.ToString();
            });

        CreateMap<FormInstance, FormInstanceDto>()
            .ForMember(dest => dest.FormDefinitionName, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.FormDefinition.Name))
            .ForMember(dest => dest.WorkflowDefinitionName, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.WorkflowDefinition.Name))
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CurrentStepName, opt => opt.Ignore())
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CurrentStepRole, opt => opt.Ignore())
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CurrentStatusName, opt => opt.Ignore())
            .ForMember(dest => dest.DataJson, opt => opt.Ignore())
            .AfterMap((src, dest) =>
            {
                var step = src.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.FirstOrDefault(s => s.StepOrder == src.CurrentStepOrder);
                dest.CurrentStepName = step?.StepName;
                dest.CurrentStepRole = step?.Role;
                dest.CurrentStatusName = src.CurrentStatus.ToString();

                var latestSubmission = src.SubmissionData.OrderByDescending(s => s.SubmittedAt).FirstOrDefault();
                if (latestSubmission != null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(latestSubmission.DataJson))
                {
                    try
                    {
                        dest.DataJson = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<Dictionary<string, object>>(latestSubmission.DataJson);
                    }
                    catch
                    {
                        dest.DataJson = null;
                    }
                }
                else
                {
                    dest.DataJson = null;
                }

                // Update FilePath for attachments using GetFileUrl logic
                // Same logic as FileStorageService.GetFileUrl: /api/Files/{normalizedPath}
                foreach (var attachment in dest.Attachments)
                {
                    var normalizedPath = attachment.FilePath.Replace('\\', '/').TrimStart('/');
                    attachment.FilePath = $"/api/Files/{normalizedPath}";
                }
            })
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CreatedAt, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.CreatedAt))
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CreatedBy, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.CreatedBy ?? string.Empty));

        CreateMap<FormAttachment, FormAttachmentDto>();
        
        CreateMap<TenantRole, TenantRoleDto>().ReverseMap();
    }
}
```

TenantIntegrationSettingsService'i güncelliyorum:


TrackingNoLabel desteğini ekliyorum:


```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Services;

public class TenantIntegrationSettingsService : ITenantIntegrationSettingsService
{
    private readonly ApplicationDbContext _context;

    public TenantIntegrationSettingsService(ApplicationDbContext context)
    {
        _context = context;
    }

    public async Task<TenantIntegrationSettingsDto?> GetTenantIntegrationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        var settings = await _context.TenantIntegrationSettings
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(s => s.TenantId == tenantId, cancellationToken);

        if (settings == null)
        {
            return null;
        }

        return new TenantIntegrationSettingsDto
        {
            Id = settings.Id,
            TenantId = settings.TenantId,
            TeamsWebhookUrl = settings.TeamsWebhookUrl,
            TeamsEnabled = settings.TeamsEnabled,
            SlackWebhookUrl = settings.SlackWebhookUrl,
            SlackEnabled = settings.SlackEnabled,
            TrackingNoLabel = settings.TrackingNoLabel
        };
    }

    public async Task<TenantIntegrationSettingsDto> SaveTenantIntegrationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        TenantIntegrationSettingsDto dto,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        var existing = await _context.TenantIntegrationSettings
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(s => s.TenantId == tenantId, cancellationToken);

        Domain.Entities.TenantIntegrationSettings settings;

        if (existing == null)
        {
            settings = new Domain.Entities.TenantIntegrationSettings
            {
                Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
                TenantId = tenantId,
                TeamsWebhookUrl = dto.TeamsWebhookUrl,
                TeamsEnabled = dto.TeamsEnabled,
                SlackWebhookUrl = dto.SlackWebhookUrl,
                SlackEnabled = dto.SlackEnabled,
                CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
                ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
            };
            _context.TenantIntegrationSettings.Add(settings);
        }
        else
        {
            existing.TeamsWebhookUrl = dto.TeamsWebhookUrl;
            existing.TeamsEnabled = dto.TeamsEnabled;
            existing.SlackWebhookUrl = dto.SlackWebhookUrl;
            existing.SlackEnabled = dto.SlackEnabled;
            existing.ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
            settings = existing;
        }

        await _context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

        return new TenantIntegrationSettingsDto
        {
            Id = settings.Id,
            TenantId = settings.TenantId,
            TeamsWebhookUrl = settings.TeamsWebhookUrl,
            TeamsEnabled = settings.TeamsEnabled,
            SlackWebhookUrl = settings.SlackWebhookUrl,
            SlackEnabled = settings.SlackEnabled,
            TrackingNoLabel = settings.TrackingNoLabel
        };
    }
}
```

GetFormsForUser query'sini oluşturuyorum:


```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using System.Text.Json;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Queries.FormDefinitions;

[Authorize]
public class GetFormsForUserQuery : IRequest<List<FormDefinitionDto>>
{
    public string? TrackingNo { get; set; }
}

public class GetFormsForUserQueryHandler : IRequestHandler<GetFormsForUserQuery, List<FormDefinitionDto>>
{
    private readonly IFormDefinitionRepository _repository;
    private readonly ITenantUserRoleService _tenantUserRoleService;
    private readonly ITenantProvider _tenantProvider;
    private readonly IUser _user;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;

    public GetFormsForUserQueryHandler(
        IFormDefinitionRepository repository,
        ITenantUserRoleService tenantUserRoleService,
        ITenantProvider tenantProvider,
        IUser user,
        IMapper mapper)
    {
        _repository = repository;
        _tenantUserRoleService = tenantUserRoleService;
        _tenantProvider = tenantProvider;
        _user = user;
        _mapper = mapper;
    }

    public async Task<List<FormDefinitionDto>> Handle(GetFormsForUserQuery request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_user.Id))
            throw new UnauthorizedAccessException("User must be authenticated.");

        var tenantId = _tenantProvider.TenantId;
        
        // Get user's tenant roles
        var userRoles = await _tenantUserRoleService.GetRolesForUserAsync(tenantId, _user.Id, cancellationToken);
        var userRolesSet = new HashSet<string>(userRoles, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        // Get all active forms
        var allForms = await _repository.GetActiveAsync(cancellationToken);
        
        // Filter forms based on AllowedRoles
        var allowedForms = new List<FormDefinition>();
        
        foreach (var form in allForms)
        {
            // If AllowedRolesJson is null or empty, allow all users (backward compatibility)
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(form.AllowedRolesJson))
            {
                allowedForms.Add(form);
                continue;
            }

            // Parse AllowedRolesJson
            try
            {
                var allowedRoles = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<string>>(form.AllowedRolesJson);
                
                // If no roles specified or user has at least one of the allowed roles
                if (allowedRoles == null || !allowedRoles.Any() || 
                    allowedRoles.Any(role => userRolesSet.Contains(role)))
                {
                    allowedForms.Add(form);
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                // If JSON parsing fails, allow the form (backward compatibility)
                allowedForms.Add(form);
            }
        }

        return _mapper.Map<List<FormDefinitionDto>>(allowedForms);
    }
}

```

FormDefinitions endpoint'ine GetFormsForUser ekliyorum ve UpdateFormInstance command'ını oluşturuyorum:


```csharp
using MovithForms.Application.Commands.FormDefinitions;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Application.Queries.FormDefinitions;
using System.Security.Claims;

namespace MovithForms.Web.Endpoints;

public class FormDefinitions : EndpointGroupBase
{
    public override void Map(WebApplication app)
    {
        app.MapGroup(this)
            .RequireAuthorization()
            .MapGet(List, nameof(List))
            .MapGet(GetFormsForUser, nameof(GetFormsForUser))
            .MapGet(GetById, "{id:guid}")
            .MapPost(Create, nameof(Create))
            .MapPut(Update, "{id:guid}")
            .MapDelete(Delete, "{id:guid}");
    }

    public Task<List<FormDefinitionDto>> List(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetAllFormDefinitionsQuery query)
        => sender.Send(query);

    public async Task<IResult> GetById(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetFormDefinitionQuery query)
    {
        var result = await sender.Send(query);
        return result != null ? Results.Ok(result) : Results.NotFound();
    }
    
    public async Task<IResult> Create(ISender sender, CreateFormDefinitionCommand command, ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        command.CreatedBy = user.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) ?? "System";
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Created($"/api/FormDefinitions/{result.Id}", result);
    }
    
    public async Task<IResult> Update(ISender sender, Guid id, UpdateFormDefinitionCommand command, ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        if (id != command.Id)
            return Results.BadRequest();

        command.UpdatedBy = user.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) ?? "System";
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }
    
    public async Task<IResult> Delete(ISender sender, Guid id)
    {
        var command = new DeleteFormDefinitionCommand { Id = id };
        await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.NoContent();
    }
}

```

UpdateFormInstance command'ını oluşturuyorum:


```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Exceptions;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;
using MovithForms.Domain.Enums;
using System.Text.Json;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Commands.Forms;

[Authorize]
public class UpdateFormInstanceCommand : IRequest<FormInstanceDto>
{
    public Guid FormInstanceId { get; set; }
    public Dictionary<string, object> DataJson { get; set; } = new();
    public string UpdatedBy { get; set; } = default!;
}

public class UpdateFormInstanceCommandHandler : IRequestHandler<UpdateFormInstanceCommand, FormInstanceDto>
{
    private readonly IFormInstanceRepository _repository;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;

    public UpdateFormInstanceCommandHandler(
        IFormInstanceRepository repository, 
        IMapper mapper)
    {
        _repository = repository;
        _mapper = mapper;
    }

    public async Task<FormInstanceDto> Handle(UpdateFormInstanceCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var formInstance = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(request.FormInstanceId, cancellationToken);
        if (formInstance == null)
            throw new KeyNotFoundException($"FormInstance with ID {request.FormInstanceId} not found.");

        // Check if form can be updated
        var canUpdate = false;
        var firstStepOrder = formInstance.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder).FirstOrDefault()?.StepOrder ?? 0;

        if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Draft)
        {
            canUpdate = true;
        }
        else if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Returned && formInstance.CurrentStepOrder == firstStepOrder)
        {
            // Can update if returned to first step
            canUpdate = true;
        }

        if (!canUpdate)
        {
            throw new InvalidOperationException(
                $"Form can only be updated when status is Draft or Returned (at first step). Current status: {formInstance.CurrentStatus}, Step: {formInstance.CurrentStepOrder}");
        }

        // Save submission data
        var submissionData = new FormSubmissionData
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            FormInstanceId = formInstance.Id,
            FormInstance = formInstance,
            DataJson = JsonSerializer.Serialize(request.DataJson),
            SubmittedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
            SubmittedBy = request.UpdatedBy
        };

        formInstance.ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
        formInstance.ModifiedBy = request.UpdatedBy;

        // Use the same method as SubmitFormData
        await _repository.SubmitFormDataWithSubmissionAsync(formInstance, submissionData, cancellationToken);
        await _repository.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
        
        return _mapper.Map<FormInstanceDto>(formInstance);
    }
}

```

```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using MovithForms.Application.Commands.Forms;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Application.Queries.Forms;
using MovithForms.Application.Queries.Workflows;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;
using System.Security.Claims;

namespace MovithForms.Web.Endpoints;

public class Forms : EndpointGroupBase
{
    public override void Map(WebApplication app)
    {
        app.MapGroup(this)
            .RequireAuthorization()
            .MapPost(Start, nameof(Start))
            .MapGet(GetById, "{id:guid}")
            .MapPost(SubmitFormData, "{id:guid}/submit")
            .MapPut(Update, "{id:guid}/update")
            .MapPost(PerformAction, "{id:guid}/actions")
            .MapGet(GetByTrackingNo, "GetByTrackingNo/{trackingNo}")
            .MapGet(GetPendingApprovals, nameof(GetPendingApprovals));
    }
    
    public async Task<IResult> Start(ISender sender, StartFormInstanceCommand command, ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        command.CreatedBy = user.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) ?? "System";
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Created($"/api/Forms/{result.Id}", result);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> GetById(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetFormInstanceQuery query)
    {
        var result = await sender.Send(query);
        return result != null ? Results.Ok(result) : Results.NotFound();
    }
    
    public async Task<IResult> SubmitFormData(ISender sender, Guid id, SubmitFormDataCommand command, ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        if (id != command.FormInstanceId)
            return Results.BadRequest();

        command.SubmittedBy = user.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) ?? "System";
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> PerformAction(ISender sender, Guid id, PerformWorkflowActionCommand command, ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        if (id != command.FormInstanceId)
            return Results.BadRequest();

        command.PerformedBy = user.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) ?? "System";
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }
    
    public Task<List<FormInstanceDto>> GetByTrackingNo(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetFormsByTrackingNoQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public Task<List<FormInstanceDto>> GetPendingApprovals(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetPendingApprovalsQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }
}

```

```csharp
    }

    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }
}
```

Build hatalarını kontrol ediyorum, ardından migration oluşturacağım:


Hataları düzeltiyorum:


```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;
using System.Text.Json;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Queries.FormDefinitions;

[Authorize]
public class GetFormsForUserQuery : IRequest<List<FormDefinitionDto>>
{
    public string? TrackingNo { get; set; }
}

public class GetFormsForUserQueryHandler : IRequestHandler<GetFormsForUserQuery, List<FormDefinitionDto>>
{
    private readonly IFormDefinitionRepository _repository;
    private readonly ITenantUserRoleService _tenantUserRoleService;
    private readonly ITenantProvider _tenantProvider;
    private readonly IUser _user;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;

    public GetFormsForUserQueryHandler(
        IFormDefinitionRepository repository,
        ITenantUserRoleService tenantUserRoleService,
        ITenantProvider tenantProvider,
        IUser user,
        IMapper mapper)
    {
        _repository = repository;
        _tenantUserRoleService = tenantUserRoleService;
        _tenantProvider = tenantProvider;
        _user = user;
        _mapper = mapper;
    }

    public async Task<List<FormDefinitionDto>> Handle(GetFormsForUserQuery request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_user.Id))
            throw new UnauthorizedAccessException("User must be authenticated.");

        var tenantId = _tenantProvider.TenantId;
        
        // Get user's tenant roles
        var userRoles = await _tenantUserRoleService.GetRolesForUserAsync(tenantId, _user.Id, cancellationToken);
        var userRolesSet = new HashSet<string>(userRoles, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        // Get all active forms
        var allForms = await _repository.GetActiveAsync(cancellationToken);
        
        // Filter forms based on AllowedRoles
        var allowedForms = new List<FormDefinition>();
        
        foreach (var form in allForms)
        {
            // If AllowedRolesJson is null or empty, allow all users (backward compatibility)
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(form.AllowedRolesJson))
            {
                allowedForms.Add(form);
                continue;
            }

            // Parse AllowedRolesJson
            try
            {
                var allowedRoles = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<string>>(form.AllowedRolesJson);
                
                // If no roles specified or user has at least one of the allowed roles
                if (allowedRoles == null || !allowedRoles.Any() || 
                    allowedRoles.Any(role => userRolesSet.Contains(role)))
                {
                    allowedForms.Add(form);
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                // If JSON parsing fails, allow the form (backward compatibility)
                allowedForms.Add(form);
            }
        }

        return _mapper.Map<List<FormDefinitionDto>>(allowedForms);
    }
}


```

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;
using System.Text.Json;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Common.Mappings;

public class MappingProfile : Profile
{
    public MappingProfile()
    {
        CreateMap<FormDefinition, FormDefinitionDto>()
            .ForMember(dest => dest.AllowedRoles, opt => opt.Ignore())
            .AfterMap((src, dest) =>
            {
                dest.AllowedRoles = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(src.AllowedRolesJson) 
                    ? JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<string>>(src.AllowedRolesJson) 
                    : null;
            })
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CreatedAt, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.CreatedAt))
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CreatedBy, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.CreatedBy ?? string.Empty));

        CreateMap<WorkflowDefinition, WorkflowDefinitionDto>()
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CreatedAt, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.CreatedAt))
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CreatedBy, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.CreatedBy ?? string.Empty));

        CreateMap<WorkflowStep, WorkflowStepDto>();

        CreateMap<WorkflowAction, WorkflowActionDto>()
            .ForMember(dest => dest.ActionTypeName, opt => opt.Ignore())
            .AfterMap((src, dest) =>
            {
                dest.ActionTypeName = src.ActionType.ToString();
            });

        CreateMap<FormInstance, FormInstanceDto>()
            .ForMember(dest => dest.FormDefinitionName, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.FormDefinition.Name))
            .ForMember(dest => dest.WorkflowDefinitionName, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.WorkflowDefinition.Name))
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CurrentStepName, opt => opt.Ignore())
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CurrentStepRole, opt => opt.Ignore())
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CurrentStatusName, opt => opt.Ignore())
            .ForMember(dest => dest.DataJson, opt => opt.Ignore())
            .AfterMap((src, dest) =>
            {
                var step = src.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.FirstOrDefault(s => s.StepOrder == src.CurrentStepOrder);
                dest.CurrentStepName = step?.StepName;
                dest.CurrentStepRole = step?.Role;
                dest.CurrentStatusName = src.CurrentStatus.ToString();

                var latestSubmission = src.SubmissionData.OrderByDescending(s => s.SubmittedAt).FirstOrDefault();
                if (latestSubmission != null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(latestSubmission.DataJson))
                {
                    try
                    {
                        dest.DataJson = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<Dictionary<string, object>>(latestSubmission.DataJson);
                    }
                    catch
                    {
                        dest.DataJson = null;
                    }
                }
                else
                {
                    dest.DataJson = null;
                }

                // Update FilePath for attachments using GetFileUrl logic
                // Same logic as FileStorageService.GetFileUrl: /api/Files/{normalizedPath}
                foreach (var attachment in dest.Attachments)
                {
                    var normalizedPath = attachment.FilePath.Replace('\\', '/').TrimStart('/');
                    attachment.FilePath = $"/api/Files/{normalizedPath}";
                }
            })
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CreatedAt, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.CreatedAt))
            .ForMember(dest => dest.CreatedBy, opt => opt.MapFrom(src => src.CreatedBy ?? string.Empty));

        CreateMap<FormAttachment, FormAttachmentDto>();
        
        CreateMap<TenantRole, TenantRoleDto>().ReverseMap();
    }
}
```

Build başarılı. Migration oluşturuyorum:

Migration dosyalarını listeliyorum:


Migration oluşturulmuş. Dosyayı kontrol ediyorum:


Migration oluşturuldu, ancak tüm tabloları yeniden oluşturuyor; bu yanlış. Şimdilik frontend güncellemelerine geçiyorum. Migration'ı daha sonra düzeltebiliriz. Frontend'i güncelliyorum:


Frontend types ve endpoints'i güncelliyorum:


```typescript
export enum FormStatus {
  Draft = 0,
  InReview = 1,
  Approved = 2,
  Rejected = 3,
  Returned = 4,
}

export enum WorkflowActionType {
  Approve = 0,
  Reject = 1,
  Return = 2,
}

export interface TenantRoleDto {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  isActive: boolean;
}

export interface TenantUserDTO {
  id: string;
  userName: string;
  email: string;
  // Tenant bazlı roller (dinamik)
  roles: TenantRoleDto[];
  // Sistem seviyesindeki roller (Identity roles)
  systemRoles: string[];
}

export interface FormDefinitionDto {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  code: string;
  version: number;
  isActive: boolean;
  schemaJson: string;
  allowedRoles?: string[];
  createdAt: string;
  createdBy: string;
}

export interface WorkflowStepDto {
  id: string;
  stepOrder: number;
  stepName: string;
  role: string;
  isFinalStep: boolean;
  canReturnToPrevious: boolean;
}

export interface WorkflowDefinitionDto {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  code: string;
  formDefinitionId: string;
  formDefinitionName: string;
  steps: WorkflowStepDto[];
  createdAt: string;
  createdBy: string;
}

export interface FormAttachmentDto {
  id: string;
  fileName: string;
  filePath: string;
  contentType: string;
  sizeBytes: number;
  uploadedAt: string;
  uploadedBy: string;
}

export interface WorkflowActionDto {
  id: string;
  fromStepOrder: number;
  toStepOrder: number;
  actionType: WorkflowActionType;
  actionTypeName?: string;
  comment?: string;
  performedBy: string;
  performedByUserName?: string;
  performedAt: string;
}

export interface FormInstanceDto {
  id: string;
  formDefinitionId: string;
  formDefinitionName: string;
  workflowDefinitionId: string;
  workflowDefinitionName: string;
  jobOrderNo: string;
  currentStatus: FormStatus;
  currentStatusName?: string;
  currentStepOrder: number;
  currentStepName?: string;
  currentStepRole?: string;
  dataJson?: Record<string, any>;
  attachments: FormAttachmentDto[];
  workflowActions: WorkflowActionDto[];
  createdAt: string;
  createdBy: string;
  createdByUserName?: string;
}

export interface LoginRequestDto {
  email: string;
  password: string;
}

// Backend AccessTokenResponse format
export interface AccessTokenResponse {
  tokenType: string;
  accessToken: string;
  expiresIn: number;
  refreshToken: string;
}

// Frontend için daha uygun format
export interface LoginResponseDto {
  accessToken: string;
  refreshToken: string;
  expiresIn: number;
  email?: string;
  roles?: string[];
}

export interface TableColumnSchema {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  type: 'text' | 'number' | 'date' | 'checkbox' | 'select' | 'upload';
  required?: boolean;
  options?: string[]; // Select için seçenekler
}

export interface FormFieldSchema {
  id: string;
  type: 'text' | 'number' | 'date' | 'checkbox' | 'select' | 'upload' | 'table';
  label: string;
  required?: boolean;
  validation?: Record<string, any>;
  options?: string[];
  // Table-specific properties
  columns?: TableColumnSchema[];
  minRows?: number;
  maxRows?: number;
  defaultRows?: number;
}

export interface FormSchema {
  fields: FormFieldSchema[];
}

export enum NotificationChannel {
  Email = 1,
  Teams = 2,
  Slack = 3,
  Push = 4,
}

export interface NotificationDto {
  id: number;
  title: string;
  message: string;
  userId: string;
  isRead: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
}

export interface TenantIntegrationSettingsDto {
  id?: string;
  tenantId: string;
  teamsWebhookUrl?: string;
  teamsEnabled: boolean;
  slackWebhookUrl?: string;
  slackEnabled: boolean;
}
```

```typescript
export const API_ENDPOINTS = {
  auth: {
    login: '/auth/login', // Route Handler
  },
  users: {
    getRoles: '/users/get-roles',
  },
  formDefinitions: {
    getAll: '/form-definitions',
```
```typescript
    getById: (id: string) => `/form-definitions/${id}`,
    create: '/form-definitions',
    update: (id: string) => `/form-definitions/${id}`,
    delete: (id: string) => `/form-definitions/${id}`,
  },
  workflowDefinitions: {
    getAll: '/workflow-definitions',
    getById: (id: string) => `/workflow-definitions/${id}`,
    create: '/workflow-definitions',
    update: (id: string) => `/workflow-definitions/${id}`,
    delete: (id: string) => `/workflow-definitions/${id}`,
  },
  forms: {
    start: '/forms/start',
    getById: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}`,
    submit: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}/submit`,
    performAction: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}/actions`,
    getByTrackingNo: (trackingNo: string) => `/forms/by-tracking-no/${trackingNo}`,
    update: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}/update`,
    getPendingApprovals: '/forms/pending-approvals',
  },
  files: {
    upload: '/files/upload',
    get: (filePath: string) => `/files/${filePath}`,
  },
  tenant: {
    roles: '/tenant/roles',
    roleById: (id: string) => `/tenant/roles/${id}`,
    users: '/tenant/users',
    userRoles: (userId: string) => `/tenant/users/${userId}/roles`,
    userNotificationChannels: (userId: string) => `/tenant/users/${userId}/notification-channels`,
    userSystemRoles: (userId: string) => `/tenant/users/${userId}/system-roles`,
    integrationSettings: '/tenant/integration-settings',
  },
  notifications: {
    getAll: '/notifications',
    getUnreadCount: '/notifications/unread-count',
    markAllAsRead: '/notifications/mark-all-read',
    markAsRead: '/notifications/mark-read',
  },
};

```

Frontend UI dosyalarını güncelliyorum. Önce login guard'ı ekliyorum:


Login guard'ı ekliyorum ve job-order sayfasını güncelliyorum:


Job-order sayfasına login guard ekliyorum ve trackingNo'ya geçiyorum:


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';
import { isAuthenticatedClient } from '@/lib/api/auth-client';

export default function JobOrderPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isAuthenticatedClient()) {
      router.push('/login');
    }
  }, [router]);

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!trackingNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    // Navigate to form selection with tracking no
    router.push(`/forms?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-6 text-gray-900">
            İş Emri Girişi
          </h1>
          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
            <div>
              <label htmlFor="jobOrder" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                İş Emri No
              </label>
              <input
                id="jobOrder"
                type="text"
                value={jobOrderNo}
                onChange={(e) => setJobOrderNo(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full px-4 py-3 text-lg border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                placeholder="İş emri numarasını girin"
                required
                autoFocus
              />
            </div>
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading || !jobOrderNo.trim()}
              className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-4 text-lg font-semibold rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
            >
              {loading ? 'Yükleniyor...' : 'Devam Et'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>
        <div className="mt-8 text-center">
          <Link
            href="/"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Ana Sayfaya Dön
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>      
    </div>
  );
}

```

Diğer frontend dosyalarını güncelliyorum. Önce forms sayfasını:


Forms sayfasını ve ilgili API route'larını güncelliyorum:


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormDefinitionDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function FormSelectionPage() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const router = useRouter();
  const trackingNo = searchParams.get('trackingNo') || '';
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormDefinitionDto[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (trackingNo) {
      loadFormsForUser();
    }
  }, [trackingNo]);

  const loadFormsForUser = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormDefinitionDto[] }>(
        `${API_ENDPOINTS.formDefinitions.getForUser}?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading forms:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSelectForm = (formId: string) => {
    router.push(`/forms/${formId}/fill?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`);
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-lg">Yükleniyor...</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-4">
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto">
      <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/job-order"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            İş Emri Girişi
          </Link>
        </div>
        <div className="mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Form Seçimi</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600">İş Emri: {jobOrderNo}</p>
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-4">
          {forms.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-8 text-center text-gray-500">
              Aktif form bulunamadı.
            </div>
          ) : (
            forms.map((form) => (
              <button
                key={form.id}
                onClick={() => handleSelectForm(form.id)}
                className="w-full bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md p-6 text-left hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow"
              >
                <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">{form.name}</h2>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Kod: {form.code}</p>
              </button>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
    if (trackingNo) {
      loadFormsForUser();
    }
  }, [trackingNo]);

      );

          </Link>
        </div>

          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Form Seçimi</h1>

                className="w-full bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md p-6 text-left hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow"
              >

                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Kod: {form.code}</p>

            ))

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescript
import { backendFetch } from "@/lib/api/apiClient";
import { withAuthHeader } from "@/lib/api/auth-server";
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { FormDefinitionDto } from "@/lib/api/types";

// GET /api/form-definitions/for-user - Get forms for current user (filtered by roles)
export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const searchParams = request.nextUrl.searchParams;
    const trackingNo = searchParams.get('trackingNo') || '';
    
    const backendUrl = `/FormDefinitions/GetFormsForUser${trackingNo ? `?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}` : ''}`;

    const formDefinitions = await backendFetch<FormDefinitionDto[]>(backendUrl,
      await withAuthHeader()     
    );

    return Response.json(formDefinitions);
  } catch (error: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error.message || 'An error occurred' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

```

Fill ve success sayfalarını güncelliyorum:


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useParams, useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormDefinitionDto, FormSchema, FormFieldSchema, FormInstanceDto, WorkflowDefinitionDto, TableColumnSchema } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';

export default function FormFillPage() {
  const params = useParams();
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const router = useRouter();
  const formId = params.id as string;
  const trackingNo = searchParams.get('trackingNo') || '';

  const [formDefinition, setFormDefinition] = useState<FormDefinitionDto | null>(null);
  const [formSchema, setFormSchema] = useState<FormSchema | null>(null);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<Record<string, any>>({});
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [files, setFiles] = useState<File[]>([]);
  const [workflowDefinitionId, setWorkflowDefinitionId] = useState<string>('');
  // Tablo içindeki dosyalar için state: fieldId -> rowIndex -> columnId -> File[]
  const [tableFiles, setTableFiles] = useState<Record<string, Record<number, Record<string, File[]>>>>({});

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      setLoading(true);
      await Promise.all([loadFormDefinition(), loadWorkflowDefinition()]);
      setLoading(false);
    };

    loadData();
  }, [formId]);

  // Initialize table fields with default rows and minimum rows
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!formSchema) return;

    setFormData((prev) => {
      const updated = { ...prev };
      let changed = false;

      formSchema.fields.forEach((field) => {
        if (field.type === 'table') {
          let tableData = updated[field.id] || [];
```
