```typescriptreact
                              handleTableRowChange(field.id, rowIndex, column.id, parseFloat(e.target.value) || '')
                            }
                            required={column.required}
                            className="w-full px-2 py-1 text-sm border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                          />
                        ) : column.type === 'select' ? (
                          <select
                            value={row[column.id] || ''}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              handleTableRowChange(field.id, rowIndex, column.id, e.target.value)
                            }
                            required={column.required}
                            className="w-full px-2 py-1 text-sm border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                          >
                            <option value="">Seçiniz</option>
                            {column.options?.map((option) => (
                              <option key={option} value={option}>
                                {option}
                              </option>
                            ))}
                          </select>
                        ) : column.type === 'upload' ? (
                          <div>
                            <input
                              type="file"
                              multiple
                              accept="image/*,.pdf,.doc,.docx"
                              onChange={(e) =>
                                handleTableFileChange(field.id, rowIndex, column.id, e.target.files)
                              }
                              className="w-full px-2 py-1 text-xs border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                            />
                            {tableFiles[field.id]?.[rowIndex]?.[column.id]?.length > 0 && (
                              <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-600">
                                {tableFiles[field.id][rowIndex][column.id].length} dosya seçildi
                              </p>
                            )}
                            {row[column.id] && (
                              <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">{row[column.id]}</p>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        ) : (
                          <input
                            type="text"
                            value={row[column.id] || ''}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              handleTableRowChange(field.id, rowIndex, column.id, e.target.value)
                            }
                            required={column.required}
                            className="w-full px-2 py-1 text-sm border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                          />
                        )}
                      </td>
                    ))}
                    <td className="border border-gray-300 px-2 py-1 text-center">
                      {(!field.minRows || tableData.length > field.minRows) && (
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => removeTableRow(field.id, rowIndex, field)}
                          className="text-red-600 hover:text-red-800 text-sm"
                        >
                          Sil
                        </button>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
            {(!field.maxRows || tableData.length < field.maxRows) && (
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => addTableRow(field.id, field)}
                className="mt-2 text-sm text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-800 px-3 py-1 border border-indigo-300 rounded-md"
              >
                + Satır Ekle
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        );
      default:
        return null;
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-lg">Yükleniyor...</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!formSchema) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-lg text-red-600">Form yüklenemedi.</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-4">
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">
            {formDefinition?.name}
          </h1>
          <Link
            href={`/forms?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`}
            className="text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-md border border-gray-300"
          >
            İptal
          </Link>
        </div>
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
          {formSchema.fields.map((field) => (
            <div key={field.id}>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                {field.label}
                {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
              </label>
              {renderField(field)}
            </div>
          ))}

          <div>
            <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
              Fotoğraf/Dosya Ekle
            </label>
            <input
              type="file"
              multiple
              accept="image/*,.pdf,.doc,.docx"
              onChange={handleFileChange}
              className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            />
            {files.length > 0 && (
              <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                {files.length} dosya seçildi
              </p>
            )}
          </div>

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={submitting}
            className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-4 text-lg font-semibold rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            {submitting ? 'Gönderiliyor...' : 'Gönder'}
          </button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

Success sayfasını güncelliyorum:


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';

export default function FormSuccessPage() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const router = useRouter();
  const trackingNo = searchParams.get('trackingNo') || '';

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="max-w-md w-full bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8 text-center">
        <div className="mb-6">
          <div className="mx-auto flex items-center justify-center h-16 w-16 rounded-full bg-green-100 mb-4">
            <svg
              className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600"
              fill="none"
              stroke="currentColor"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
              <path
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
                strokeWidth={2}
                d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"
              />
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
            Form Başarıyla Gönderildi
          </h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
            Formunuz başarıyla kaydedildi ve onay sürecine gönderildi.
          </p>
          {jobOrderNo && (
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-6">
              İş Emri: <span className="font-semibold">{jobOrderNo}</span>
            </p>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-3">
          <button
            onClick={() => router.push(`/forms?jobOrder=${encodeURIComponent(jobOrderNo)}`)}
            className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-3 px-4 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 font-semibold"
          >
            Yeni Form Doldur
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => router.push('/')}
            className="w-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 py-3 px-4 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-gray-500 font-semibold"
          >
            Ana Sayfaya Dön
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';

export default function FormSuccessPage() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const router = useRouter();
  const trackingNo = searchParams.get('trackingNo') || '';

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="max-w-md w-full bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8 text-center">
        <div className="mb-6">
          <div className="mx-auto flex items-center justify-center h-16 w-16 rounded-full bg-green-100 mb-4">
            <svg
              className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600"
              fill="none"
              stroke="currentColor"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
              <path
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
                strokeWidth={2}
                d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"
              />
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
            Form Başarıyla Gönderildi
          </h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
            Formunuz başarıyla kaydedildi ve onay sürecine gönderildi.
          </p>
          {trackingNo && (
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-6">
              İş Emri: <span className="font-semibold">{trackingNo}</span>
            </p>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-3">
          <button
            onClick={() => router.push(`/forms?jobOrder=${encodeURIComponent(jobOrderNo)}`)}
            className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-3 px-4 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 font-semibold"
          >
            Yeni Form Doldur
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => router.push('/')}
            className="w-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 py-3 px-4 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-gray-500 font-semibold"
          >
            Ana Sayfaya Dön
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';

export default function FormSuccessPage() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const router = useRouter();
  const trackingNo = searchParams.get('trackingNo') || '';

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="max-w-md w-full bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8 text-center">
        <div className="mb-6">
          <div className="mx-auto flex items-center justify-center h-16 w-16 rounded-full bg-green-100 mb-4">
            <svg
              className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600"
              fill="none"
              stroke="currentColor"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
              <path
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
                strokeWidth={2}
                d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"
              />
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
            Form Başarıyla Gönderildi
          </h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
            Formunuz başarıyla kaydedildi ve onay sürecine gönderildi.
          </p>
          {trackingNo && (
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-6">
              İş Emri: <span className="font-semibold">{trackingNo}</span>
            </p>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-3">
          <button
            onClick={() => router.push(`/forms?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`)}
            className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-3 px-4 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 font-semibold"
          >
            Yeni Form Doldur
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => router.push('/')}
            className="w-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 py-3 px-4 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-gray-500 font-semibold"
          >
            Ana Sayfaya Dön
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

Reporting, pending-approvals ve approvals sayfalarını güncelliyorum:


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormInstanceDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function ReportingPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleSearch = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!jobOrderNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getByJobOrder(jobOrderNo)
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error searching:', error);
      setForms([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleViewDetails = async (formId: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading form details:', error);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/dashboard"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Admin Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Raporlama</h1>

        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex gap-4">
            <input
              type="text"
              value={jobOrderNo}
              onChange={(e) => setJobOrderNo(e.target.value)}
              placeholder="İş Emri No"
              className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            />
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading}
              className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50"
            >
              {loading ? 'Aranıyor...' : 'Ara'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>

        {forms.length > 0 && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden mb-6">
            <table className="min-w-full divide-y divide-gray-200">
              <thead className="bg-gray-50">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Form Adı
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Durum
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Oluşturulma
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    İşlemler
                  </th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="bg-white divide-y divide-gray-200">
                {forms.map((form) => (
                  <tr key={form.id}>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium">
                      {form.formDefinitionName}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <span className="px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                        {form.currentStatusName || form.currentStatus}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500">
                      {new Date(form.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR')}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm">
                      <button
                        onClick={() => handleViewDetails(form.id)}
                        className="text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-900"
                      >
                        Detay
                      </button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}

        {selectedForm && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Form Detayları</h2>
              <button
                onClick={() => setSelectedForm(null)}
                className="text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
              >
                ✕
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Form Verileri</h3>
                <pre className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded overflow-auto">
                  {JSON.stringify(selectedForm.dataJson, null, 2)}
                </pre>
              </div>

              {selectedForm.attachments.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Ekler</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.attachments.map((attachment) => {
                      // Convert /api/Files/... to /api/files/... for Next.js proxy route
                      const fileUrl = attachment.filePath.replace('/api/Files/', '/api/files/');
                      
                      return (
                        <a
                          key={attachment.id}
                          href={fileUrl}
                          target="_blank"
                          rel="noopener noreferrer"
                          className="block text-indigo-600 hover:underline"
                        >
                          {attachment.fileName}
                        </a>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {selectedForm.workflowActions.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">İş Akışı Geçmişi</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.workflowActions.map((action) => (
                      <div key={action.id} className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-4">
                        <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || action.actionType}</p>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                          {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} - {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                        </p>
                        {action.comment && <p className="text-sm">{action.comment}</p>}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormInstanceDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function ReportingPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleSearch = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!trackingNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getByJobOrder(jobOrderNo)
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error searching:', error);
      setForms([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleViewDetails = async (formId: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading form details:', error);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/dashboard"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Admin Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Raporlama</h1>

        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex gap-4">
            <input
              type="text"
              value={jobOrderNo}
              onChange={(e) => setJobOrderNo(e.target.value)}
              placeholder="İş Emri No"
              className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            />
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading}
              className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50"
            >
              {loading ? 'Aranıyor...' : 'Ara'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>

        {forms.length > 0 && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden mb-6">
            <table className="min-w-full divide-y divide-gray-200">
              <thead className="bg-gray-50">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Form Adı
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Durum
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Oluşturulma
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    İşlemler
                  </th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="bg-white divide-y divide-gray-200">
                {forms.map((form) => (
                  <tr key={form.id}>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium">
                      {form.formDefinitionName}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <span className="px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                        {form.currentStatusName || form.currentStatus}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500">
                      {new Date(form.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR')}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm">
                      <button
                        onClick={() => handleViewDetails(form.id)}
                        className="text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-900"
                      >
                        Detay
                      </button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}

        {selectedForm && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Form Detayları</h2>
              <button
                onClick={() => setSelectedForm(null)}
                className="text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
              >
                ✕
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Form Verileri</h3>
                <pre className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded overflow-auto">
                  {JSON.stringify(selectedForm.dataJson, null, 2)}
                </pre>
              </div>

              {selectedForm.attachments.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Ekler</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.attachments.map((attachment) => {
                      // Convert /api/Files/... to /api/files/... for Next.js proxy route
                      const fileUrl = attachment.filePath.replace('/api/Files/', '/api/files/');
                      
                      return (
                        <a
                          key={attachment.id}
                          href={fileUrl}
                          target="_blank"
                          rel="noopener noreferrer"
                          className="block text-indigo-600 hover:underline"
                        >
                          {attachment.fileName}
                        </a>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {selectedForm.workflowActions.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">İş Akışı Geçmişi</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.workflowActions.map((action) => (
                      <div key={action.id} className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-4">
                        <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || action.actionType}</p>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                          {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} - {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                        </p>
                        {action.comment && <p className="text-sm">{action.comment}</p>}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormInstanceDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function ReportingPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleSearch = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!trackingNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getByTrackingNo(trackingNo)
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error searching:', error);
      setForms([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleViewDetails = async (formId: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading form details:', error);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/dashboard"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Admin Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Raporlama</h1>

        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex gap-4">
            <input
              type="text"
              value={jobOrderNo}
              onChange={(e) => setJobOrderNo(e.target.value)}
              placeholder="İş Emri No"
              className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            />
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading}
              className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50"
            >
              {loading ? 'Aranıyor...' : 'Ara'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>

        {forms.length > 0 && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden mb-6">
            <table className="min-w-full divide-y divide-gray-200">
              <thead className="bg-gray-50">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Form Adı
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Durum
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Oluşturulma
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    İşlemler
                  </th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="bg-white divide-y divide-gray-200">
                {forms.map((form) => (
                  <tr key={form.id}>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium">
                      {form.formDefinitionName}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <span className="px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                        {form.currentStatusName || form.currentStatus}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500">
                      {new Date(form.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR')}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm">
                      <button
                        onClick={() => handleViewDetails(form.id)}
                        className="text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-900"
                      >
                        Detay
                      </button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}

        {selectedForm && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Form Detayları</h2>
              <button
                onClick={() => setSelectedForm(null)}
                className="text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
              >
                ✕
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Form Verileri</h3>
                <pre className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded overflow-auto">
                  {JSON.stringify(selectedForm.dataJson, null, 2)}
                </pre>
              </div>

              {selectedForm.attachments.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Ekler</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.attachments.map((attachment) => {
                      // Convert /api/Files/... to /api/files/... for Next.js proxy route
                      const fileUrl = attachment.filePath.replace('/api/Files/', '/api/files/');
                      
                      return (
                        <a
                          key={attachment.id}
                          href={fileUrl}
                          target="_blank"
                          rel="noopener noreferrer"
                          className="block text-indigo-600 hover:underline"
                        >
                          {attachment.fileName}
                        </a>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {selectedForm.workflowActions.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">İş Akışı Geçmişi</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.workflowActions.map((action) => (
                      <div key={action.id} className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-4">
                        <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || action.actionType}</p>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                          {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} - {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                        </p>
                        {action.comment && <p className="text-sm">{action.comment}</p>}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormInstanceDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function ReportingPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleSearch = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!trackingNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getByTrackingNo(trackingNo)
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error searching:', error);
      setForms([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleViewDetails = async (formId: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading form details:', error);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/dashboard"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Admin Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Raporlama</h1>

        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex gap-4">
            <input
              type="text"
              value={trackingNo}
              onChange={(e) => setTrackingNo(e.target.value)}
              placeholder="İş Emri No"
              className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            />
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading}
              className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50"
            >
              {loading ? 'Aranıyor...' : 'Ara'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>

        {forms.length > 0 && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden mb-6">
            <table className="min-w-full divide-y divide-gray-200">
              <thead className="bg-gray-50">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Form Adı
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Durum
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Oluşturulma
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    İşlemler
                  </th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="bg-white divide-y divide-gray-200">
                {forms.map((form) => (
                  <tr key={form.id}>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium">
                      {form.formDefinitionName}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <span className="px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                        {form.currentStatusName || form.currentStatus}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500">
                      {new Date(form.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR')}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm">
                      <button
                        onClick={() => handleViewDetails(form.id)}
                        className="text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-900"
                      >
                        Detay
                      </button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}

        {selectedForm && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Form Detayları</h2>
              <button
                onClick={() => setSelectedForm(null)}
                className="text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
              >
                ✕
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Form Verileri</h3>
                <pre className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded overflow-auto">
                  {JSON.stringify(selectedForm.dataJson, null, 2)}
                </pre>
              </div>

              {selectedForm.attachments.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Ekler</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.attachments.map((attachment) => {
                      // Convert /api/Files/... to /api/files/... for Next.js proxy route
                      const fileUrl = attachment.filePath.replace('/api/Files/', '/api/files/');
                      
                      return (
                        <a
                          key={attachment.id}
                          href={fileUrl}
                          target="_blank"
                          rel="noopener noreferrer"
                          className="block text-indigo-600 hover:underline"
                        >
                          {attachment.fileName}
                        </a>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {selectedForm.workflowActions.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">İş Akışı Geçmişi</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.workflowActions.map((action) => (
                      <div key={action.id} className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-4">
                        <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || action.actionType}</p>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                          {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} - {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                        </p>
                        {action.comment && <p className="text-sm">{action.comment}</p>}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

Pending-approvals ve approvals sayfalarını güncelliyorum:


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { FormInstanceDto, FormStatus, WorkflowActionType } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

const statusLabels: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'Taslak',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'İncelemede',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'Onaylandı',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'Reddedildi',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'Geri Gönderildi',
};

const statusClasses: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800',
};

export default function PendingApprovalsPage() {
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [actionLoading, setActionLoading] = useState<WorkflowActionType | null>(null);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [comment, setComment] = useState('');

  const loadPending = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getPendingApprovals
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.message || 'Bekleyen onaylar alınamadı.');
      setForms([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    loadPending();
  }, []);

  const handleSelect = async (formId: string) => {
    const found = forms.find((f) => f.id === formId);
    if (found) {
      setSelectedForm(found);
      return;
    }

    // fallback: fetch details if not in list
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch {
      setSelectedForm(null);
    }
  };

  const handleAction = async (actionType: WorkflowActionType) => {
    if (!selectedForm) return;
    setActionLoading(actionType);
    setError(null);
    try {
      await routeHandlerClient.post(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.performAction(selectedForm.id),
        {
          formInstanceId: selectedForm.id,
          actionType,
          comment: comment.trim() || null,
        }
      );
      await loadPending();
      setSelectedForm(null);
      setComment('');
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.message || 'İşlem başarısız.');
    } finally {
      setActionLoading(null);
    }
  };

  const sortedForms = useMemo(
    () =>
      [...forms].sort(
        (a, b) => new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(a.createdAt).getTime()
      ),
    [forms]
  );

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <Link
            href="/dashboard"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Admin Paneli
          </Link>
          <button
            onClick={loadPending}
            disabled={loading}
            className="text-sm px-3 py-1 rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Yenile
          </button>
        </div>

        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Bekleyen Onaylar</h1>

        {error && (
          <div className="mb-4 rounded-md border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3 text-red-700">
            {error}
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          <div className="lg:col-span-2 bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
            <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-between">
              <h2 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">Formlar</h2>
              {loading && <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">Yükleniyor...</span>}
            </div>
            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
              {sortedForms.length === 0 && !loading && (
                <div className="p-6 text-sm text-gray-500">Bekleyen onay bulunmuyor.</div>
              )}
              {sortedForms.map((form) => (
                <button
                  key={form.id}
                  onClick={() => handleSelect(form.id)}
                  className="w-full text-left px-4 py-3 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:bg-gray-50"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{form.trackingNo}</p>
                      <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{form.formDefinitionName}</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Adım: {form.currentStepName ?? form.currentStepOrder} / Rol:{' '}
                        {form.currentStepRole ?? '-'}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <span
                      className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[form.currentStatus]}`}
                    >
                      {form.currentStatusName || statusLabels[form.currentStatus]}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Detay</h3>
            {!selectedForm && (
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Listeden bir form seçin.</p>
            )}
            {selectedForm && (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Form</p>
                  <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">
                    {selectedForm.formDefinitionName}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">İş Emri: {selectedForm.jobOrderNo}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span
                    className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[selectedForm.currentStatus]}`}
                  >
                    {selectedForm.currentStatusName || statusLabels[selectedForm.currentStatus]}
                  </span>
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                    Adım: {selectedForm.currentStepName ?? selectedForm.currentStepOrder} (
                    {selectedForm.currentStepRole ?? '-'})
                  </span>
                </div>

                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-1">Son İşlem Geçmişi</p>
                  {selectedForm.workflowActions?.length ? (
                    <div className="space-y-2 max-h-40 overflow-auto pr-2">
                      {[...selectedForm.workflowActions]
                        .sort(
                          (a, b) =>
                            new Date(b.performedAt).getTime() -
                            new Date(a.performedAt).getTime()
                        )
                        .map((action) => (
                          <div
                            key={action.id}
                            className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-3 text-sm"
                          >
                            <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || WorkflowActionType[action.actionType] || action.actionType}</p>
                            <p className="text-gray-500">
                              {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} -{' '}
                              {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                            </p>
                            {action.comment && <p>{action.comment}</p>}
                          </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">İşlem geçmişi yok.</p>
                  )}
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <label className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">Yorum (opsiyonel)</label>
                  <textarea
                    value={comment}
                    onChange={(e) => setComment(e.target.value)}
                    rows={3}
                    className="w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                    placeholder="Onay / ret gerekçesi"
                  />
                </div>

                <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Approve)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-green-600 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-green-700 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Approve ? 'Onaylanıyor...' : 'Onayla'}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Reject)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-red-600 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-red-700 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Reject ? 'Reddediliyor...' : 'Reddet'}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Return)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-yellow-500 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-yellow-600 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Return ? 'Gönderiliyor...' : 'Geri Gönder'}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { FormInstanceDto, FormStatus, WorkflowActionType } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

const statusLabels: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'Taslak',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'İncelemede',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'Onaylandı',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'Reddedildi',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'Geri Gönderildi',
};

const statusClasses: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800',
};

export default function PendingApprovalsPage() {
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [actionLoading, setActionLoading] = useState<WorkflowActionType | null>(null);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [comment, setComment] = useState('');

  const loadPending = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getPendingApprovals
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.message || 'Bekleyen onaylar alınamadı.');
      setForms([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    loadPending();
  }, []);

  const handleSelect = async (formId: string) => {
    const found = forms.find((f) => f.id === formId);
    if (found) {
      setSelectedForm(found);
      return;
    }

    // fallback: fetch details if not in list
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch {
      setSelectedForm(null);
    }
  };

  const handleAction = async (actionType: WorkflowActionType) => {
    if (!selectedForm) return;
    setActionLoading(actionType);
    setError(null);
    try {
      await routeHandlerClient.post(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.performAction(selectedForm.id),
        {
          formInstanceId: selectedForm.id,
          actionType,
          comment: comment.trim() || null,
        }
      );
      await loadPending();
      setSelectedForm(null);
      setComment('');
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.message || 'İşlem başarısız.');
    } finally {
      setActionLoading(null);
    }
  };

  const sortedForms = useMemo(
    () =>
      [...forms].sort(
        (a, b) => new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(a.createdAt).getTime()
      ),
    [forms]
  );

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <Link
            href="/dashboard"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Admin Paneli
          </Link>
          <button
            onClick={loadPending}
            disabled={loading}
            className="text-sm px-3 py-1 rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Yenile
          </button>
        </div>

        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Bekleyen Onaylar</h1>

        {error && (
          <div className="mb-4 rounded-md border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3 text-red-700">
            {error}
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          <div className="lg:col-span-2 bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
            <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-between">
              <h2 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">Formlar</h2>
              {loading && <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">Yükleniyor...</span>}
            </div>
            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
              {sortedForms.length === 0 && !loading && (
                <div className="p-6 text-sm text-gray-500">Bekleyen onay bulunmuyor.</div>
              )}
              {sortedForms.map((form) => (
                <button
                  key={form.id}
                  onClick={() => handleSelect(form.id)}
                  className="w-full text-left px-4 py-3 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:bg-gray-50"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{form.trackingNo}</p>
                      <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{form.formDefinitionName}</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Adım: {form.currentStepName ?? form.currentStepOrder} / Rol:{' '}
                        {form.currentStepRole ?? '-'}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <span
                      className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[form.currentStatus]}`}
                    >
                      {form.currentStatusName || statusLabels[form.currentStatus]}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Detay</h3>
            {!selectedForm && (
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Listeden bir form seçin.</p>
            )}
            {selectedForm && (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Form</p>
                  <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">
                    {selectedForm.formDefinitionName}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">İş Emri: {selectedForm.trackingNo}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span
                    className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[selectedForm.currentStatus]}`}
                  >
                    {selectedForm.currentStatusName || statusLabels[selectedForm.currentStatus]}
                  </span>
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                    Adım: {selectedForm.currentStepName ?? selectedForm.currentStepOrder} (
                    {selectedForm.currentStepRole ?? '-'})
                  </span>
                </div>

                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-1">Son İşlem Geçmişi</p>
                  {selectedForm.workflowActions?.length ? (
                    <div className="space-y-2 max-h-40 overflow-auto pr-2">
                      {[...selectedForm.workflowActions]
                        .sort(
                          (a, b) =>
                            new Date(b.performedAt).getTime() -
                            new Date(a.performedAt).getTime()
                        )
                        .map((action) => (
                          <div
                            key={action.id}
                            className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-3 text-sm"
                          >
                            <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || WorkflowActionType[action.actionType] || action.actionType}</p>
                            <p className="text-gray-500">
                              {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} -{' '}
                              {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                            </p>
                            {action.comment && <p>{action.comment}</p>}
                          </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">İşlem geçmişi yok.</p>
                  )}
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <label className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">Yorum (opsiyonel)</label>
                  <textarea
                    value={comment}
                    onChange={(e) => setComment(e.target.value)}
                    rows={3}
                    className="w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                    placeholder="Onay / ret gerekçesi"
                  />
                </div>

                <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Approve)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-green-600 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-green-700 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Approve ? 'Onaylanıyor...' : 'Onayla'}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Reject)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-red-600 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-red-700 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Reject ? 'Reddediliyor...' : 'Reddet'}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Return)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-yellow-500 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-yellow-600 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Return ? 'Gönderiliyor...' : 'Geri Gönder'}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormInstanceDto, WorkflowActionType } from '@/lib/api/types';

export default function ApprovalsPage() {
  const [pendingApprovals, setPendingApprovals] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [comment, setComment] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);

  // This should come from auth context - for PoC, using a default role
  const userRole = 'TeamLeader';

  useEffect(() => {
    loadPendingApprovals();
  }, []);

  const loadPendingApprovals = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        `${API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getPendingApprovals}?role=${userRole}`
      );
      setPendingApprovals(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading approvals:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleAction = async (formId: string, actionType: WorkflowActionType) => {
    setSubmitting(true);
    try {
      await routeHandlerClient.post(API_ENDPOINTS.forms.performAction(formId), {
        formInstanceId: formId,
        actionType,
        comment: comment || undefined,
        performedBy: 'approver', // Should come from auth
      });
      setComment('');
      setSelectedForm(null);
      await loadPendingApprovals();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error performing action:', error);
      alert('İşlem gerçekleştirilemedi.');
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-lg">Yükleniyor...</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-4">
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto">
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Bekleyen Onaylarım</h1>

        {pendingApprovals.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-8 text-center text-gray-500">
            Bekleyen onayınız bulunmamaktadır.
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {pendingApprovals.map((form) => (
              <div
                key={form.id}
                className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md p-6"
              >
                <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                  {form.formDefinitionName}
                </h2>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">İş Emri: {form.trackingNo}</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
                  Adım: {form.currentStepName || `Adım ${form.currentStepOrder}`}
                </p>

                {selectedForm?.id === form.id ? (
                  <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div>
                      <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                        Yorum (Opsiyonel)
                      </label>
                      <textarea
                        value={comment}
                        onChange={(e) => setComment(e.target.value)}
                        className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                        rows={3}
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex gap-2">
                      <button
                        onClick={() => handleAction(form.id, WorkflowActionType.Approve)}
                        disabled={submitting}
                        className="flex-1 bg-green-600 text-white py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-green-700 disabled:opacity-50 font-semibold"
                      >
                        Onayla
                      </button>
                      <button
                        onClick={() => handleAction(form.id, WorkflowActionType.Reject)}
                        disabled={submitting}
                        className="flex-1 bg-red-600 text-white py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-red-700 disabled:opacity-50 font-semibold"
                      >
                        Reddet
                      </button>
                      <button
                        onClick={() => handleAction(form.id, WorkflowActionType.Return)}
                        disabled={submitting}
                        className="flex-1 bg-yellow-600 text-white py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-yellow-700 disabled:opacity-50 font-semibold"
                      >
                        Geri Gönder
                      </button>
                    </div>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => {
                        setSelectedForm(null);
                        setComment('');
                      }}
                      className="w-full text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-800"
                    >
                      İptal
                    </button>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setSelectedForm(form)}
                    className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 font-semibold"
                  >
                    İncele
                  </button>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescript
import { backendFetch } from "@/lib/api/apiClient";
import { withAuthHeader } from "@/lib/api/auth-server";
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { FormInstanceDto } from "@/lib/api/types";

// GET /api/forms/by-tracking-no/[trackingNo] - Get forms by tracking number
export async function GET(
  request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: { trackingNo: string } }
) {
  try {
    const backendUrl = `/Forms/GetByTrackingNo/${params.trackingNo}`;

    const forms = await backendFetch<FormInstanceDto[]>(backendUrl,
      await withAuthHeader()     
    );

    return Response.json(forms);
  } catch (error: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error.message || 'An error occurred' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

```

Form tanımlama sayfalarına AllowedRoles seçimi ekliyorum. Önce tenant rollerini nasıl alacağımı kontrol ediyorum:


Form tanımlama sayfalarına AllowedRoles seçimi ekliyorum. Önce new sayfasını güncelliyorum:


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormFieldSchema, FormSchema, TableColumnSchema, TenantRoleDto, FormDefinitionDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';

type FieldType = 'text' | 'number' | 'date' | 'checkbox' | 'select' | 'upload' | 'table';

const FIELD_TYPES: { type: FieldType; label: string; icon: string }[] = [
  { type: 'text', label: 'Metin', icon: '📝' },
  { type: 'number', label: 'Sayı', icon: '🔢' },
  { type: 'date', label: 'Tarih', icon: '📅' },
  { type: 'checkbox', label: 'Onay Kutusu', icon: '☑️' },
  { type: 'select', label: 'Seçim', icon: '📋' },
  { type: 'upload', label: 'Dosya Yükleme', icon: '📎' },
  { type: 'table', label: 'Tablo', icon: '📊' },
];

export default function NewFormDefinitionPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [name, setName] = useState('');
  const [code, setCode] = useState('');
  const [version, setVersion] = useState(1);
  const [isActive, setIsActive] = useState(true);
  const [fields, setFields] = useState<FormFieldSchema[]>([]);
  const [selectedField, setSelectedField] = useState<FormFieldSchema | null>(null);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  // Store raw textarea value for select options to allow multi-line editing
  const [selectOptionsText, setSelectOptionsText] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  // Store raw textarea value for table column select options: fieldId -> columnId -> text
  const [tableColumnOptionsText, setTableColumnOptionsText] = useState<Record<string, Record<string, string>>>({});

  const addField = (type: FieldType) => {
    const newField: FormFieldSchema = {
      id: `field_${Date.now()}`,
      type,
      label: '',
      required: false,
      ...(type === 'select' ? { options: [] } : {}),
      ...(type === 'table' ? {
        columns: [
          { id: `col_${Date.now()}_1`, label: 'Sütun 1', type: 'text', required: false },
          { id: `col_${Date.now()}_2`, label: 'Sütun 2', type: 'text', required: false }
        ],
        minRows: 1,
        defaultRows: 3
      } : {}),
    };
    setFields([...fields, newField]);
    setSelectedField(newField);
  };

  const removeField = (fieldId: string) => {
    const updatedFields = fields.filter((f) => f.id !== fieldId);
    setFields(updatedFields);
    if (selectedField?.id === fieldId) {
      setSelectedField(null);
    }
  };

  const updateField = (fieldId: string, updates: Partial<FormFieldSchema>) => {
    const updatedFields = fields.map((f) => (f.id === fieldId ? { ...f, ...updates } : f));
    setFields(updatedFields);
    if (selectedField?.id === fieldId) {
      setSelectedField({ ...selectedField, ...updates });
    }
  };

  const updateSelectOptions = (fieldId: string, text: string) => {
    // Store raw text for textarea
    setSelectOptionsText((prev) => ({ ...prev, [fieldId]: text }));
    // Parse and update options (filter empty lines)
    const options = text
      .split('\n')
      .map((o) => o.trim())
      .filter((o) => o.length > 0);
    updateField(fieldId, { options });
  };

  const addTableColumn = (fieldId: string) => {
    const field = fields.find(f => f.id === fieldId);
    if (field && field.type === 'table' && field.columns) {
      const newColumn: TableColumnSchema = {
        id: `col_${Date.now()}`,
        label: `Sütun ${field.columns.length + 1}`,
        type: 'text',
        required: false,
      };
      updateField(fieldId, { columns: [...field.columns, newColumn] });
    }
  };

  const removeTableColumn = (fieldId: string, columnId: string) => {
    const field = fields.find(f => f.id === fieldId);
    if (field && field.type === 'table' && field.columns) {
      const updatedColumns = field.columns.filter(c => c.id !== columnId);
      updateField(fieldId, { columns: updatedColumns });
    }
  };

  const updateTableColumn = (fieldId: string, columnId: string, updates: Partial<TableColumnSchema>) => {
    const field = fields.find(f => f.id === fieldId);
    if (field && field.type === 'table' && field.columns) {
      const updatedColumns = field.columns.map(c =>
        c.id === columnId ? { ...c, ...updates } : c
      );
      updateField(fieldId, { columns: updatedColumns });
    }
  };

  const handleSave = async () => {
    if (!name || !code) {
      alert('Lütfen form adı ve kodunu girin.');
      return;
    }

    if (fields.length === 0) {
      alert('Lütfen en az bir alan ekleyin.');
      return;
    }

    // Validate all fields have labels
    const fieldsWithoutLabels = fields.filter((f) => !f.label.trim());
    if (fieldsWithoutLabels.length > 0) {
      alert('Lütfen tüm alanlar için etiket girin.');
      return;
    }

    setSaving(true);
    try {
      const schema: FormSchema = { fields };
      const payload = {
        name,
        code,
        version,
        isActive,
        schemaJson: JSON.stringify(schema),
      };

      const response = await routeHandlerClient.post(API_ENDPOINTS.formDefinitions.create, payload);
      router.push('/form-definitions');
    } catch (error: any) {
      console.error('Error saving form:', error);
      const errorMessage = error.message || error.error || 'Form kaydedilirken bir hata oluştu.';
      alert(errorMessage);
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Yeni Form Tanımı</h1>
          <Link
            href="/form-definitions"
            className="text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-md border border-gray-300"
          >
            İptal
          </Link>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Form Bilgileri</h2>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
                Form Adı *
              </label>
              <input
                type="text"
                value={name}
                onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                placeholder="Örn: Kalite Kontrol Formu"
              />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
                Form Kodu *
              </label>
              <input
                type="text"
                value={code}
                onChange={(e) => setCode(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                placeholder="Örn: QC-001"
              />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
                Versiyon
              </label>
              <input
                type="number"
                value={version}
                onChange={(e) => setVersion(Number(e.target.value))}
                className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                min="1"
              />
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center">
              <input
                type="checkbox"
                id="isActive"
                checked={isActive}
                onChange={(e) => setIsActive(e.target.checked)}
                className="h-4 w-4 text-indigo-600 focus:ring-indigo-500 border-gray-300 rounded"
              />
              <label htmlFor="isActive" className="ml-2 block text-sm text-gray-700">
                Aktif
              </label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* Field Type Palette */}
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">Alan Tipleri</h3>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {FIELD_TYPES.map((fieldType) => (
                <button
                  key={fieldType.type}
                  onClick={() => addField(fieldType.type)}
```
