**Cursor**

Migration dosyası silinmiş. Mevcut migration'ları kontrol edip doğru migration'ı yeniden oluşturuyorum:


Migration dosyası mevcut. İçeriğini kontrol ediyorum:


Migration dosyası yanlış oluşturulmuş. `AllowedRolesJson` kolonunu `AlterColumn` ile değiştirmeye çalışıyor, ancak kolon henüz eklenmemiş. Migration dosyasını düzeltmemiz gerekiyor.

Mevcut migration dosyası şu şekilde olmalı:

```csharp
using System;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Migrations;

#nullable disable

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Migrations.PostgreSQL
{
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public partial class PostgreSQL_MG_AddFormAuthorizationAndTrackingNo : Migration
    {
        /// <inheritdoc />
        protected override void Up(MigrationBuilder migrationBuilder)
        {
            // Add AllowedRolesJson column to FormDefinitions
            migrationBuilder.AddColumn<string>(
                name: "AllowedRolesJson",
                table: "FormDefinitions",
                type: "text",
                nullable: true);

            // Rename JobOrderNo to TrackingNo in FormInstances
            migrationBuilder.RenameColumn(
                name: "JobOrderNo",
                table: "FormInstances",
                newName: "TrackingNo");

            // Rename index
            migrationBuilder.RenameIndex(
                name: "IX_FormInstances_JobOrderNo",
                table: "FormInstances",
                newName: "IX_FormInstances_TrackingNo");

            // Add TrackingNoLabel column to TenantIntegrationSettings
            migrationBuilder.AddColumn<string>(
                name: "TrackingNoLabel",
                table: "TenantIntegrationSettings",
                type: "character varying(100)",
                maxLength: 100,
                nullable: false,
                defaultValue: "İş Emri No");
        }

        /// <inheritdoc />
        protected override void Down(MigrationBuilder migrationBuilder)
        {
            // Remove TrackingNoLabel column
            migrationBuilder.DropColumn(
                name: "TrackingNoLabel",
                table: "TenantIntegrationSettings");

            // Rename TrackingNo back to JobOrderNo
            migrationBuilder.RenameIndex(
                name: "IX_FormInstances_TrackingNo",
                table: "FormInstances",
                newName: "IX_FormInstances_JobOrderNo");

            migrationBuilder.RenameColumn(
                name: "TrackingNo",
                table: "FormInstances",
                newName: "JobOrderNo");

            // Remove AllowedRolesJson column
            migrationBuilder.DropColumn(
                name: "AllowedRolesJson",
                table: "FormDefinitions");
        }
    }
}
```

**Çözüm adımları:**

1. Mevcut migration'ı kaldırın (eğer veritabanına uygulanmışsa):
   ```bash
   cd Backend/src/Web
   dotnet ef migrations remove --context ApplicationDbContext --project ..\Infrastructure\Infrastructure.csproj --force
   ```

2. `Backend/src/Infrastructure/Migrations/PostgreSQL/20251220162331_PostgreSQL_MG_AddFormAuthorizationAndTrackingNo.cs` dosyasını yukarıdaki içerikle değiştirin.

3. Migration'ı tekrar uygulayın:
   ```bash
   dotnet ef database update --context ApplicationDbContext --project ..\Infrastructure\Infrastructure.csproj
   ```

**Alternatif çözüm (eğer migration zaten uygulanmışsa):**

Eğer migration kısmen uygulanmışsa (örneğin `TrackingNo` rename edilmiş ama `AllowedRolesJson` eklenmemiş), manuel SQL ile eksik kolonu ekleyebilirsiniz:

```sql
ALTER TABLE "FormDefinitions" ADD COLUMN "AllowedRolesJson" text NULL;
ALTER TABLE "TenantIntegrationSettings" ADD COLUMN "TrackingNoLabel" character varying(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'İş Emri No';
```

Sonra migration'ı "zaten uygulanmış" olarak işaretleyin:
```bash
dotnet ef migrations script --context ApplicationDbContext --project ..\Infrastructure\Infrastructure.csproj
```

Hangi durumda olduğunuzu belirtin, ona göre devam edelim.

**User**

Migration'ların içeriğini sql ile kendim hallettim. Neyse,
Ancak, şöyle bir geri bildirimim var. TenantIntegrationSettings entity'sine TrackingNoLabel field'ını koymuşsun, ama bence doğru değil. Çünkü o tablo farklı sistemler için olmuş bir tablo. O tabloda tutulmamalı. Bu tarz uygulama özelindeki ayarları tutmak için bir düzenleme olmalı.

---

**Cursor**

`TenantIntegrationSettings` entegrasyon ayarları için; uygulama ayarları için ayrı bir tablo olmalı. Mevcut yapıyı inceliyorum:


`TenantIntegrationSettings` entegrasyon ayarları için; uygulama ayarları için ayrı bir entity olmalı. Önerilen yapı:

## Önerilen Çözüm

### 1. Yeni Entity: `TenantApplicationSettings`

```csharp
// Backend/src/Domain/Entities/TenantApplicationSettings.cs
using MovithForms.Domain.Common;

namespace MovithForms.Domain.Entities;

public class TenantApplicationSettings : BaseAuditableEntity, ITenantEntity
{
    public new Guid Id { get; set; }
    public Guid TenantId { get; set; }

    // Application-specific settings
    public string TrackingNoLabel { get; set; } = "İş Emri No";
    
    // Future application settings can be added here
    // public string? DefaultLanguage { get; set; }
    // public string? DateFormat { get; set; }
    // etc.
}
```

### 2. `TenantIntegrationSettings`'den `TrackingNoLabel`'ı kaldır

```csharp
// Backend/src/Domain/Entities/TenantIntegrationSettings.cs
using MovithForms.Domain.Common;

namespace MovithForms.Domain.Entities;

public class TenantIntegrationSettings : BaseAuditableEntity, ITenantEntity
{
    public new Guid Id { get; set; }
    public Guid TenantId { get; set; }

    // Teams Integration
    public string? TeamsWebhookUrl { get; set; }
    public bool TeamsEnabled { get; set; }

    // Slack Integration
    public string? SlackWebhookUrl { get; set; }
    public bool SlackEnabled { get; set; }

    // TrackingNoLabel removed - moved to TenantApplicationSettings
}
```

### 3. Yeni DTO

```csharp

public class TenantApplicationSettingsDto
{
    public Guid? Id { get; set; }
    public Guid TenantId { get; set; }
    public string TrackingNoLabel { get; set; } = "İş Emri No";
}
```

### 4. Yeni Service Interface ve Implementation

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Common/Interfaces/ITenantApplicationSettingsService.cs
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;

public interface ITenantApplicationSettingsService
{
    Task<TenantApplicationSettingsDto?> GetTenantApplicationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

    Task<TenantApplicationSettingsDto> SaveTenantApplicationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        TenantApplicationSettingsDto dto,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
}
```

```csharp
// Backend/src/Infrastructure/Services/TenantApplicationSettingsService.cs
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Services;

public class TenantApplicationSettingsService : ITenantApplicationSettingsService
{
    private readonly ApplicationDbContext _context;

    public TenantApplicationSettingsService(ApplicationDbContext context)
    {
        _context = context;
    }

    public async Task<TenantApplicationSettingsDto?> GetTenantApplicationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        var settings = await _context.TenantApplicationSettings
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(s => s.TenantId == tenantId, cancellationToken);

        if (settings == null)
        {
            return null;
        }

        return new TenantApplicationSettingsDto
        {
            Id = settings.Id,
            TenantId = settings.TenantId,
            TrackingNoLabel = settings.TrackingNoLabel
        };
    }

    public async Task<TenantApplicationSettingsDto> SaveTenantApplicationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        TenantApplicationSettingsDto dto,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        var existing = await _context.TenantApplicationSettings
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(s => s.TenantId == tenantId, cancellationToken);

        Domain.Entities.TenantApplicationSettings settings;

        if (existing == null)
        {
            settings = new Domain.Entities.TenantApplicationSettings
            {
                Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
                TenantId = tenantId,
                TrackingNoLabel = dto.TrackingNoLabel,
                IsActive = true,
                IsDeleted = false,
                CreatedAt = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,
                CreatedBy = dto.TenantId.ToString(), // Or get from current user
                ModifiedAt = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow
            };
            _context.TenantApplicationSettings.Add(settings);
        }
        else
        {
            existing.TrackingNoLabel = dto.TrackingNoLabel;
            existing.ModifiedAt = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow;
            settings = existing;
        }

        await _context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

        return new TenantApplicationSettingsDto
        {
            Id = settings.Id,
            TenantId = settings.TenantId,
            TrackingNoLabel = settings.TrackingNoLabel
        };
    }
}
```

### 5. EF Core Configuration

```csharp
// Backend/src/Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/TenantApplicationSettingsConfiguration.cs
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;

public class TenantApplicationSettingsConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<TenantApplicationSettings>
{
    public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<TenantApplicationSettings> builder)
    {
        builder.HasKey(e => e.Id);
        builder.Property(e => e.TenantId).IsRequired();
        builder.Property(e => e.TrackingNoLabel).HasMaxLength(100).HasDefaultValue("İş Emri No");

        builder.HasIndex(e => e.TenantId).IsUnique();
    }
}
```

### 6. ApplicationDbContext'e ekle

```csharp
// Backend/src/Infrastructure/Persistence/ApplicationDbContext.cs
// DbSet ekle:
public DbSet<TenantApplicationSettings> TenantApplicationSettings { get; set; }
```

### 7. Dependency Injection

```csharp
// Backend/src/Web/Program.cs veya Startup.cs
builder.Services.AddScoped<ITenantApplicationSettingsService, TenantApplicationSettingsService>();
```

### 8. Command/Query ve Endpoint

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Commands/Admin/GetTenantApplicationSettings.cs
// Backend/src/Application/Commands/Admin/SaveTenantApplicationSettings.cs
// Backend/src/Web/Endpoints/TenantApplicationSettings.cs
```

### 9. Frontend API endpoint güncellemesi

```typescript
// Frontend/src/lib/api/endpoints.ts
tenant: {
  // ...
  applicationSettings: '/tenant/application-settings',
}
```

### 10. Migration

Migration'da:
- `TenantApplicationSettings` tablosunu oluştur
- `TenantIntegrationSettings` tablosundan `TrackingNoLabel` kolonunu kaldır
- Mevcut `TrackingNoLabel` değerlerini yeni tabloya taşı (data migration)

Bu yapı daha modüler ve genişletilebilir. Agent mode'a geçip uygulayabilirsiniz.

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Services;

public class TenantApplicationSettingsService : ITenantApplicationSettingsService
{
    private readonly ApplicationDbContext _context;

    public TenantApplicationSettingsService(ApplicationDbContext context)
    {
        _context = context;
    }

    public async Task<TenantApplicationSettingsDto?> GetTenantApplicationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        var settings = await _context.TenantApplicationSettings
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(s => s.TenantId == tenantId, cancellationToken);

        if (settings == null)
        {
            return null;
        }

        return new TenantApplicationSettingsDto
        {
            Id = settings.Id,
            TenantId = settings.TenantId,
            TrackingNoLabel = settings.TrackingNoLabel
        };
    }

    public async Task<TenantApplicationSettingsDto> SaveTenantApplicationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        TenantApplicationSettingsDto dto,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        var existing = await _context.TenantApplicationSettings
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(s => s.TenantId == tenantId, cancellationToken);

        Domain.Entities.TenantApplicationSettings settings;

        if (existing == null)
        {
            settings = new Domain.Entities.TenantApplicationSettings
            {
                Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
                TenantId = tenantId,
                TrackingNoLabel = dto.TrackingNoLabel,
                IsActive = true,
                IsDeleted = false,
                CreatedAt = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,
                CreatedBy = "System", // Will be set by command handler
                ModifiedAt = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow
            };
            _context.TenantApplicationSettings.Add(settings);
        }
        else
        {
            existing.TrackingNoLabel = dto.TrackingNoLabel;
            existing.ModifiedAt = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow;
            settings = existing;
        }

        await _context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

        return new TenantApplicationSettingsDto
        {
            Id = settings.Id,
            TenantId = settings.TenantId,
            TrackingNoLabel = settings.TrackingNoLabel
        };
    }
}
```

```csharp
namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data;

using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Linq.Expressions;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Storage.ValueConversion;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Domain.Common;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Identity;

public class ApplicationDbContext : IdentityDbContext<ApplicationUser>
{
    private readonly ITenantProvider _tenantProvider;

    public ApplicationDbContext(DbContextOptions<ApplicationDbContext> options, ITenantProvider tenantProvider) : base(options)
    {
        _tenantProvider = tenantProvider;

        AppContext.SetSwitch("Npgsql.EnableLegacyTimestampBehavior", true);
    }

    public DbSet<FormDefinition> FormDefinitions { get; set; }
    public DbSet<WorkflowDefinition> WorkflowDefinitions { get; set; }
    public DbSet<WorkflowStep> WorkflowSteps { get; set; }
    public DbSet<FormInstance> FormInstances { get; set; }
    public DbSet<FormSubmissionData> FormSubmissionData { get; set; }
    public DbSet<FormAttachment> FormAttachments { get; set; }
    public DbSet<WorkflowAction> WorkflowActions { get; set; }
    public DbSet<Tenant> Tenants { get; set; }
    public DbSet<Notification> Notifications { get; set; }
    public DbSet<UserNotificationPreference> UserNotificationPreferences { get; set; }
    public DbSet<TenantIntegrationSettings> TenantIntegrationSettings { get; set; }
    public DbSet<TenantApplicationSettings> TenantApplicationSettings { get; set; }
    public DbSet<SubscriptionPlan> SubscriptionPlans { get; set; }
    public DbSet<TenantSubscription> TenantSubscriptions { get; set; }
    public DbSet<AuditLog> AuditLogs { get; set; }
    public DbSet<TenantRole> TenantRoles { get; set; }
    public DbSet<UserTenantRole> UserTenantRoles { get; set; }

    protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder builder)
    {
        base.OnModelCreating(builder);
        builder.ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly());

        // Global query filters are removed - tenant filtering is now handled by TenantQueryInterceptor
        // This ensures runtime tenant ID evaluation per request

        if (Database.ProviderName == "Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Sqlite")
        {
            // SQLite does not have proper support for DateTimeOffset via Entity Framework Core, see the limitations
            // here: https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/ef/core/providers/sqlite/limitations#query-limitations
            // To work around this, when the Sqlite database provider is used, all model properties of type DateTimeOffset
            // use the DateTimeOffsetToBinaryConverter
            // Based on: https://github.com/aspnet/EntityFrameworkCore/issues/10784#issuecomment-415769754
            // This only supports millisecond precision, but should be sufficient for most use cases.
            foreach (var entityType in builder.Model.GetEntityTypes())
            {
                var properties = entityType.ClrType.GetProperties().Where(p => p.PropertyType == typeof(DateTimeOffset)
                                                                            || p.PropertyType == typeof(DateTimeOffset?));
                foreach (var property in properties)
                {
                    builder
                        .Entity(entityType.Name)
                        .Property(property.Name)
                        .HasConversion(new DateTimeOffsetToBinaryConverter());
                }
            }
        }

        // --- Provider-specific column type mappings to avoid SQL Server types on PostgreSQL ---
        if (Database.ProviderName == "Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL")
        {
            // JSON / large text columns that were previously mapped to nvarchar(max)
            builder.Entity<FormDefinition>().Property(f => f.SchemaJson).HasColumnType("text");
            builder.Entity<FormSubmissionData>().Property(f => f.DataJson).HasColumnType("text");

            // If you have other columns forced to SQL Server types, map them here as well
        }
        else if (Database.ProviderName == "Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer")
        {
            // Keep SQL Server defaults if you need explicit mapping
            builder.Entity<FormDefinition>().Property(f => f.SchemaJson).HasColumnType("nvarchar(max)");
            builder.Entity<FormSubmissionData>().Property(f => f.DataJson).HasColumnType("nvarchar(max)");
        }
    }

    protected override void OnConfiguring(DbContextOptionsBuilder optionsBuilder)
    {
        //optionsBuilder.LogTo(Console.WriteLine);
    }
}

```

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Services;

public class TenantIntegrationSettingsService : ITenantIntegrationSettingsService
{
    private readonly ApplicationDbContext _context;

    public TenantIntegrationSettingsService(ApplicationDbContext context)
    {
        _context = context;
    }

    public async Task<TenantIntegrationSettingsDto?> GetTenantIntegrationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        var settings = await _context.TenantIntegrationSettings
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(s => s.TenantId == tenantId, cancellationToken);

        if (settings == null)
        {
            return null;
        }

        return new TenantIntegrationSettingsDto
        {
            Id = settings.Id,
            TenantId = settings.TenantId,
            TeamsWebhookUrl = settings.TeamsWebhookUrl,
            TeamsEnabled = settings.TeamsEnabled,
            SlackWebhookUrl = settings.SlackWebhookUrl,
            SlackEnabled = settings.SlackEnabled,
            TrackingNoLabel = settings.TrackingNoLabel
        };
    }

    public async Task<TenantIntegrationSettingsDto> SaveTenantIntegrationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        TenantIntegrationSettingsDto dto,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        var existing = await _context.TenantIntegrationSettings
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(s => s.TenantId == tenantId, cancellationToken);

        Domain.Entities.TenantIntegrationSettings settings;

        if (existing == null)
        {
            settings = new Domain.Entities.TenantIntegrationSettings
            {
                Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
                TenantId = tenantId,
                TeamsWebhookUrl = dto.TeamsWebhookUrl,
                TeamsEnabled = dto.TeamsEnabled,
                SlackWebhookUrl = dto.SlackWebhookUrl,
                SlackEnabled = dto.SlackEnabled,
                CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
                ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
            };
            _context.TenantIntegrationSettings.Add(settings);
        }
        else
        {
            existing.TeamsWebhookUrl = dto.TeamsWebhookUrl;
            existing.TeamsEnabled = dto.TeamsEnabled;
            existing.SlackWebhookUrl = dto.SlackWebhookUrl;
            existing.SlackEnabled = dto.SlackEnabled;
            existing.TrackingNoLabel = dto.TrackingNoLabel;
            existing.ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
            settings = existing;
        }

        await _context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

        return new TenantIntegrationSettingsDto
        {
            Id = settings.Id,
            TenantId = settings.TenantId,
            TeamsWebhookUrl = settings.TeamsWebhookUrl,
            TeamsEnabled = settings.TeamsEnabled,
            SlackWebhookUrl = settings.SlackWebhookUrl,
            SlackEnabled = settings.SlackEnabled,
            TrackingNoLabel = settings.TrackingNoLabel
        };
    }
}
```

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Services;

public class TenantIntegrationSettingsService : ITenantIntegrationSettingsService
{
    private readonly ApplicationDbContext _context;

    public TenantIntegrationSettingsService(ApplicationDbContext context)
    {
        _context = context;
    }

    public async Task<TenantIntegrationSettingsDto?> GetTenantIntegrationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        var settings = await _context.TenantIntegrationSettings
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(s => s.TenantId == tenantId, cancellationToken);

        if (settings == null)
        {
            return null;
        }

        return new TenantIntegrationSettingsDto
        {
            Id = settings.Id,
            TenantId = settings.TenantId,
            TeamsWebhookUrl = settings.TeamsWebhookUrl,
            TeamsEnabled = settings.TeamsEnabled,
            SlackWebhookUrl = settings.SlackWebhookUrl,
            SlackEnabled = settings.SlackEnabled,
            TrackingNoLabel = settings.TrackingNoLabel
        };
    }

    public async Task<TenantIntegrationSettingsDto> SaveTenantIntegrationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        TenantIntegrationSettingsDto dto,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        var existing = await _context.TenantIntegrationSettings
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(s => s.TenantId == tenantId, cancellationToken);

        Domain.Entities.TenantIntegrationSettings settings;

        if (existing == null)
        {
            settings = new Domain.Entities.TenantIntegrationSettings
            {
                Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
                TenantId = tenantId,
                TeamsWebhookUrl = dto.TeamsWebhookUrl,
                TeamsEnabled = dto.TeamsEnabled,
                SlackWebhookUrl = dto.SlackWebhookUrl,
                SlackEnabled = dto.SlackEnabled,
                CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
                ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
            };
            _context.TenantIntegrationSettings.Add(settings);
        }
        else
        {
            existing.TeamsWebhookUrl = dto.TeamsWebhookUrl;
            existing.TeamsEnabled = dto.TeamsEnabled;
            existing.SlackWebhookUrl = dto.SlackWebhookUrl;
            existing.SlackEnabled = dto.SlackEnabled;
            existing.ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
            settings = existing;
        }

        await _context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

        return new TenantIntegrationSettingsDto
        {
            Id = settings.Id,
            TenantId = settings.TenantId,
            TeamsWebhookUrl = settings.TeamsWebhookUrl,
            TeamsEnabled = settings.TeamsEnabled,
            SlackWebhookUrl = settings.SlackWebhookUrl,
            SlackEnabled = settings.SlackEnabled,
            TrackingNoLabel = settings.TrackingNoLabel
        };
    }
}
```

```csharp
using MediatR;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Commands.Admin;

[Authorize(Roles = $"{Roles.Administrator},{Roles.FirmAdmin}")]
public sealed class SaveTenantIntegrationSettingsCommand : IRequest<TenantIntegrationSettingsDto>
{
    public string? TeamsWebhookUrl { get; set; }
    public bool TeamsEnabled { get; set; }
    public string? SlackWebhookUrl { get; set; }
    public bool SlackEnabled { get; set; }
}

public sealed class SaveTenantIntegrationSettingsCommandHandler 
    : IRequestHandler<SaveTenantIntegrationSettingsCommand, TenantIntegrationSettingsDto>
{
    private readonly ITenantIntegrationSettingsService _settingsService;
    private readonly ITenantProvider _tenantProvider;

    public SaveTenantIntegrationSettingsCommandHandler(
        ITenantIntegrationSettingsService settingsService,
        ITenantProvider tenantProvider)
    {
        _settingsService = settingsService;
        _tenantProvider = tenantProvider;
    }

    public async Task<TenantIntegrationSettingsDto> Handle(
        SaveTenantIntegrationSettingsCommand request,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var tenantId = _tenantProvider.TenantId;

        var dto = new TenantIntegrationSettingsDto
        {
            TeamsWebhookUrl = request.TeamsWebhookUrl,
            TeamsEnabled = request.TeamsEnabled,
            SlackWebhookUrl = request.SlackWebhookUrl,
            SlackEnabled = request.SlackEnabled,
            TrackingNoLabel = request.TrackingNoLabel ?? "İş Emri No"
        };

        return await _settingsService.SaveTenantIntegrationSettingsAsync(tenantId, dto, cancellationToken);
    }
}
```

```csharp
    : IRequestHandler<SaveTenantApplicationSettingsCommand, TenantApplicationSettingsDto>
{

    {

        _tenantProvider = tenantProvider;

        {
            TrackingNoLabel = request.TrackingNoLabel

        return await _settingsService.SaveTenantApplicationSettingsAsync(tenantId, dto, cancellationToken);
    }
}
```

Dependency injection'ı ekleyip endpoint'leri oluşturuyorum:


```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.BearerToken;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Diagnostics;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Models;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Authorization;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data.Interceptors;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Events.SignalR;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Identity;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Notification;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Notification.Email;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Notification.Teams;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Notification.Slack;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Notification.Push;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Payments;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Repositories;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Services;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure;

public static class DependencyInjection
{
    static void Info(string message)
    {
        var reverseTriangle = '\u25BC'; // Unicode for reverse triangle
        var originalColor = Console.ForegroundColor;
        Console.ForegroundColor = ConsoleColor.Blue;
        Console.Write(reverseTriangle);
        Console.ForegroundColor = originalColor;
        Console.WriteLine($" {message}");
    }

    public static IServiceCollection AddInfrastructureServices(
        this IServiceCollection services, IConfiguration configuration)
    {
        var databaseProvider = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("DATABASE_PROVIDER") ?? configuration["DatabaseProvider"];
        var connectionString = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("DATABASE_CONNECTION_STRING") ?? configuration.GetConnectionString(databaseProvider!);
        var emailProvider = configuration["EmailProvider"];

        Info($"DATABASE_PROVIDER: {databaseProvider}");
        Info($"EMAIL_PROVIDER: {emailProvider}");

        switch (emailProvider)
        {
            case "FakeEmailService":
                services.AddScoped<IEmailService, FakeEmailService>();
                break;
            case "MailKitEmailService":
                services.AddScoped<IEmailService, MailKitEmailService>();
                break;
            default:
                throw new Exception("Unsupported email provider");
        }

        services.Configure<EmailSettings>(configuration.GetSection("EmailSettings"));
        services.Configure<PushNotificationSettings>(configuration.GetSection("PushNotificationSettings"));

        Guard.Against.Null(connectionString, message: "Connection string 'DefaultConnection' not found.");

        services.AddScoped<ISaveChangesInterceptor, AuditableEntityInterceptor>();
        services.AddScoped<ISaveChangesInterceptor, DispatchDomainEventsInterceptor>();

        services.AddDbContext<ApplicationDbContext>((sp, options) =>
        {
            options.AddInterceptors(sp.GetServices<ISaveChangesInterceptor>());

            switch (databaseProvider)
            {
                case "Sqlite":
                    options.UseSqlite(connectionString);
                    break;
                case "PostgreSQL":
                    options.UseNpgsql(connectionString);
                    break;
                case "SqlServer":
                    options.UseSqlServer(connectionString);
                    break;
                //case "Oracle":
                //    options.UseOracle(connectionString);
                //    break;
                //case "MySql":
                //    options.UseMySql(connectionString);
                //    break;
                default:
                    throw new Exception("Unsupported database provider");
            }
        });

        services.AddScoped(typeof(IBaseRepo<>), typeof(BaseRepo<>));

        services.AddScoped<ApplicationDbContextInitialiser>();

        services.AddAuthentication(options =>
        {
            options.DefaultAuthenticateScheme = IdentityConstants.BearerScheme;
            options.DefaultChallengeScheme = IdentityConstants.BearerScheme;
        })
            .AddBearerToken(IdentityConstants.BearerScheme, options =>
            {
                options.Events = new BearerTokenEvents
                {
                    OnMessageReceived = ctx =>
                    {
                        // For SignalR, we get the access_token from the query parameter.
                        // This is used to access authorized SignalR hubs.
                        // Because SignalR web sockets do not use Authorization header.
                        // There are no headers in web sockets. It is not a request / response protocol but a continuous communication.
                        var accessToken = ctx.Request.Query["access_token"];
                        var path = ctx.HttpContext.Request.Path;
                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(accessToken) &&
                            path.StartsWithSegments("/api/hubs/notifier"))
                        {
                            ctx.Token = accessToken;
                        }
                        return Task.CompletedTask;
                        // This way, only the SignalR connection is authenticated via the SignalR scheme.
                        // Normal APIs continue to work with the IdentityConstants.BearerScheme.
                    }
                };
            });

        services.AddAuthorizationBuilder();

        services
            .AddIdentityCore<ApplicationUser>()
            .AddRoles<IdentityRole>()
            .AddEntityFrameworkStores<ApplicationDbContext>()
            .AddClaimsPrincipalFactory<CustomClaimsPrincipalFactory>()
            .AddApiEndpoints();

        services.AddSingleton(TimeProvider.System);

        services.AddTransient<IIdentityService, IdentityService>();

        services.AddAuthorization(options =>
            options.AddPolicy(Policies.CanPurge, policy => policy.RequireRole(Roles.Administrator)));

        services.AddScoped<IApiKeyService, ApiKeyService>();
        services.AddHttpContextAccessor();
        services.AddScoped<ICurrentUserService, CurrentUserService>();
        services.AddScoped<ITenantProvider, TenantProvider>();

        // Infrastructure registrations
        services.Configure<IyzicoSettings>(configuration.GetSection("PaymentProviders:Iyzico"));
        services.Configure<StripeSettings>(configuration.GetSection("PaymentProviders:Stripe"));

        services.AddScoped<IPaymentProvider, IyzicoPaymentProvider>();
        services.AddScoped<IPaymentProvider, StripePaymentProvider>();
        services.AddScoped<IPaymentProviderFactory, PaymentProviderFactory>();
        // Register Repositories
        services.AddScoped<IFormDefinitionRepository, FormDefinitionRepository>();
        services.AddScoped<IFormInstanceRepository, FormInstanceRepository>();
        services.AddScoped<IWorkflowDefinitionRepository, WorkflowDefinitionRepository>();
        services.AddScoped<IAuditLogRepository, AuditLogRepository>();
        services.AddScoped<INotificationRepository, NotificationRepository>();
        services.AddScoped<ISubscriptionPlanRepository, SubscriptionPlanRepository>();
        services.AddScoped<ITenantSubscriptionRepository, TenantSubscriptionRepository>();
        services.AddScoped<ITenantRoleRepository, TenantRoleRepository>();

        services.AddScoped<ISubscriptionService, SubscriptionService>();
        services.AddScoped<IAuthorizationHandler, SubscriptionHandler>();
        services.AddScoped<MovithForms.Application.Common.Services.IRoleValidationService, MovithForms.Infrastructure.Identity.RoleValidationService>();

        services.AddAuthorization(options =>
        {
            options.AddPolicy(Policies.PremiumOnly, policy =>
            {
                policy.RequireAuthenticatedUser();
                policy.Requirements.Add(new SubscriptionRequirement());
            });
        });

        services.AddScoped<IInvoiceGenerator, InvoiceGenerator>();

        // Register Services
        services.AddScoped<IFileStorageService, FileStorageService>();
        
        // Notification channel services - HttpClient for Teams, Slack, and Push notifications
        services.AddHttpClient();
        services.AddScoped<ITeamsService, TeamsService>();
        services.AddScoped<ISlackService, SlackService>();
        services.AddScoped<IPushNotificationService, PushNotificationService>();
        services.AddScoped<INotificationService, NotificationService>();

        services.AddScoped<IEventNotifier, SignalREventNotifier>();
        services.AddScoped<ITenantUserRoleService, TenantUserRoleService>();
        services.AddScoped<IUserNotificationPreferenceService, UserNotificationPreferenceService>();
        services.AddScoped<ITenantIntegrationSettingsService, TenantIntegrationSettingsService>();
        services.AddScoped<ITenantApplicationSettingsService, TenantApplicationSettingsService>();
        services.AddSignalR();

        return services;
    }
}

```

TenantIntegrationSettingsService'deki kalan TrackingNoLabel referanslarını kaldırıp endpoint'leri ekliyorum:


```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Services;

public class TenantIntegrationSettingsService : ITenantIntegrationSettingsService
{
    private readonly ApplicationDbContext _context;

    public TenantIntegrationSettingsService(ApplicationDbContext context)
    {
        _context = context;
    }

    public async Task<TenantIntegrationSettingsDto?> GetTenantIntegrationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        var settings = await _context.TenantIntegrationSettings
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(s => s.TenantId == tenantId, cancellationToken);

        if (settings == null)
        {
            return null;
        }

        return new TenantIntegrationSettingsDto
        {
            Id = settings.Id,
            TenantId = settings.TenantId,
            TeamsWebhookUrl = settings.TeamsWebhookUrl,
            TeamsEnabled = settings.TeamsEnabled,
            SlackWebhookUrl = settings.SlackWebhookUrl,
            SlackEnabled = settings.SlackEnabled
        };
    }

    public async Task<TenantIntegrationSettingsDto> SaveTenantIntegrationSettingsAsync(
        Guid tenantId,
        TenantIntegrationSettingsDto dto,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        var existing = await _context.TenantIntegrationSettings
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(s => s.TenantId == tenantId, cancellationToken);

        Domain.Entities.TenantIntegrationSettings settings;

        if (existing == null)
        {
            settings = new Domain.Entities.TenantIntegrationSettings
            {
                Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
                TenantId = tenantId,
                TeamsWebhookUrl = dto.TeamsWebhookUrl,
                TeamsEnabled = dto.TeamsEnabled,
                SlackWebhookUrl = dto.SlackWebhookUrl,
                SlackEnabled = dto.SlackEnabled,
                CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
                ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
            };
            _context.TenantIntegrationSettings.Add(settings);
        }
        else
        {
            existing.TeamsWebhookUrl = dto.TeamsWebhookUrl;
            existing.TeamsEnabled = dto.TeamsEnabled;
            existing.SlackWebhookUrl = dto.SlackWebhookUrl;
            existing.SlackEnabled = dto.SlackEnabled;
            existing.ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
            settings = existing;
        }

        await _context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

        return new TenantIntegrationSettingsDto
        {
            Id = settings.Id,
            TenantId = settings.TenantId,
            TeamsWebhookUrl = settings.TeamsWebhookUrl,
            TeamsEnabled = settings.TeamsEnabled,
            SlackWebhookUrl = settings.SlackWebhookUrl,
            SlackEnabled = settings.SlackEnabled,
            TrackingNoLabel = settings.TrackingNoLabel
        };
    }
}


```

```csharp
using MovithForms.Application.Commands.Admin;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Application.Queries.Admin;
using MovithForms.Domain.Enums;

namespace MovithForms.Web.Endpoints;

public class TenantManagement : EndpointGroupBase
{
    public override void Map(WebApplication app)
    {
        app.MapGroup(this)
            .RequireAuthorization()
            .MapGet(GetTenantRoles, "/Roles")
            .MapPost(CreateTenantRole, "/Roles/Create")
            .MapPut(UpdateTenantRole, "/Roles/{id:guid}")
            .MapDelete(DeleteTenantRole, "/Roles/{id:guid}")
            .MapGet(GetTenantUsers, "/Users")
            .MapGet(GetTenantUserRoles, "/Users/{userId}/Roles")
            .MapPost(AssignTenantUserRoles, "/Users/{userId}/Roles")
            .MapGet(GetUserNotificationChannels, "/Users/{userId}/NotificationChannels")
            .MapPost(SaveUserNotificationChannels, "/Users/{userId}/NotificationChannels")
            .MapPost(SetUserSystemRoleStatus, "/Users/{userId}/SystemRoles")
            .MapGet(GetTenantIntegrationSettings, "/IntegrationSettings")
            .MapPost(SaveTenantIntegrationSettings, "/IntegrationSettings")
            .MapGet(GetTenantApplicationSettings, "/ApplicationSettings")
            .MapPost(SaveTenantApplicationSettings, "/ApplicationSettings");
    }

    public Task<IList<TenantRoleDto>> GetTenantRoles(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetTenantRolesQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public Task<IList<UserDTO>> GetTenantUsers(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetTenantUsersQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public Task<TenantRoleDto> CreateTenantRole(ISender sender, CreateTenantRoleCommand command)
    {
        return sender.Send(command);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> UpdateTenantRole(ISender sender, Guid id, UpdateTenantRoleCommand command)
    {
        if (id != command.Id)
        {
            return Results.BadRequest();
        }

        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> DeleteTenantRole(ISender sender, Guid id)
    {
        await sender.Send(new DeleteTenantRoleCommand { Id = id });
        return Results.NoContent();
    }

    public Task<IList<string>> GetTenantUserRoles(ISender sender, string userId)
    {
        // TenantId handler içinde CurrentUser'dan alınır
        var query = new GetTenantRolesForUserQuery
        {
            UserId = userId,
            TenantId = Guid.Empty // actual tenantId is resolved in handler via current context if needed
        };

        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> AssignTenantUserRoles(ISender sender, string userId, AssignTenantUserRolesCommand command)
    {
        if (userId != command.UserId)
        {
            return Results.BadRequest();
        }

        await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.NoContent();
    }

    public Task<IList<NotificationChannel>> GetUserNotificationChannels(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetUserNotificationChannelsQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> SaveUserNotificationChannels(ISender sender, string userId, SaveUserNotificationChannelsCommand command)
    {
        if (userId != command.UserId)
        {
            return Results.BadRequest();
        }

        await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.NoContent();
    }

    public Task<TenantIntegrationSettingsDto?> GetTenantIntegrationSettings(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetTenantIntegrationSettingsQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> SaveTenantIntegrationSettings(ISender sender, SaveTenantIntegrationSettingsCommand command)
    {
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> SetUserSystemRoleStatus(ISender sender, string userId, SetUserSystemRoleStatusCommand command)
    {
        if (userId != command.UserId)
        {
            return Results.BadRequest();
        }

        var result = await sender.Send(command);

        if (!result.Succeeded)
        {
            return Results.BadRequest(new { errors = result.Errors });
        }

        return Results.Ok(result);
    }
}



```

```csharp
using MovithForms.Application.Commands.Admin;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Application.Queries.Admin;
using MovithForms.Domain.Enums;

namespace MovithForms.Web.Endpoints;

public class TenantManagement : EndpointGroupBase
{
    public override void Map(WebApplication app)
    {
        app.MapGroup(this)
            .RequireAuthorization()
            .MapGet(GetTenantRoles, "/Roles")
            .MapPost(CreateTenantRole, "/Roles/Create")
            .MapPut(UpdateTenantRole, "/Roles/{id:guid}")
            .MapDelete(DeleteTenantRole, "/Roles/{id:guid}")
            .MapGet(GetTenantUsers, "/Users")
            .MapGet(GetTenantUserRoles, "/Users/{userId}/Roles")
            .MapPost(AssignTenantUserRoles, "/Users/{userId}/Roles")
            .MapGet(GetUserNotificationChannels, "/Users/{userId}/NotificationChannels")
            .MapPost(SaveUserNotificationChannels, "/Users/{userId}/NotificationChannels")
            .MapPost(SetUserSystemRoleStatus, "/Users/{userId}/SystemRoles")
            .MapGet(GetTenantIntegrationSettings, "/IntegrationSettings")
            .MapPost(SaveTenantIntegrationSettings, "/IntegrationSettings")
            .MapGet(GetTenantApplicationSettings, "/ApplicationSettings")
            .MapPost(SaveTenantApplicationSettings, "/ApplicationSettings");
    }

    public Task<IList<TenantRoleDto>> GetTenantRoles(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetTenantRolesQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public Task<IList<UserDTO>> GetTenantUsers(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetTenantUsersQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public Task<TenantRoleDto> CreateTenantRole(ISender sender, CreateTenantRoleCommand command)
    {
        return sender.Send(command);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> UpdateTenantRole(ISender sender, Guid id, UpdateTenantRoleCommand command)
    {
        if (id != command.Id)
        {
            return Results.BadRequest();
        }

        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> DeleteTenantRole(ISender sender, Guid id)
    {
        await sender.Send(new DeleteTenantRoleCommand { Id = id });
        return Results.NoContent();
    }

    public Task<IList<string>> GetTenantUserRoles(ISender sender, string userId)
    {
        // TenantId handler içinde CurrentUser'dan alınır
        var query = new GetTenantRolesForUserQuery
        {
            UserId = userId,
            TenantId = Guid.Empty // actual tenantId is resolved in handler via current context if needed
        };

        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> AssignTenantUserRoles(ISender sender, string userId, AssignTenantUserRolesCommand command)
    {
        if (userId != command.UserId)
        {
            return Results.BadRequest();
        }

        await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.NoContent();
    }

    public Task<IList<NotificationChannel>> GetUserNotificationChannels(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetUserNotificationChannelsQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> SaveUserNotificationChannels(ISender sender, string userId, SaveUserNotificationChannelsCommand command)
    {
        if (userId != command.UserId)
        {
            return Results.BadRequest();
        }

        await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.NoContent();
    }

    public Task<TenantIntegrationSettingsDto?> GetTenantIntegrationSettings(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetTenantIntegrationSettingsQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> SaveTenantIntegrationSettings(ISender sender, SaveTenantIntegrationSettingsCommand command)
    {
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> SetUserSystemRoleStatus(ISender sender, string userId, SetUserSystemRoleStatusCommand command)
    {
        if (userId != command.UserId)
        {
            return Results.BadRequest();
        }

        var result = await sender.Send(command);

        if (!result.Succeeded)
        {
            return Results.BadRequest(new { errors = result.Errors });
        }

        return Results.Ok(result);
    }

    public Task<TenantApplicationSettingsDto?> GetTenantApplicationSettings(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetTenantApplicationSettingsQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> SaveTenantApplicationSettings(ISender sender, SaveTenantApplicationSettingsCommand command)
    {
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }
}
```

```typescript
export const API_ENDPOINTS = {
  auth: {
    login: '/auth/login', // Route Handler
  },
  users: {
    getRoles: '/users/get-roles',
  },
  formDefinitions: {
    getAll: '/form-definitions',
    getForUser: '/form-definitions/for-user',
    getById: (id: string) => `/form-definitions/${id}`,
    create: '/form-definitions',
    update: (id: string) => `/form-definitions/${id}`,
    delete: (id: string) => `/form-definitions/${id}`,
  },
  workflowDefinitions: {
    getAll: '/workflow-definitions',
    getById: (id: string) => `/workflow-definitions/${id}`,
    create: '/workflow-definitions',
    update: (id: string) => `/workflow-definitions/${id}`,
    delete: (id: string) => `/workflow-definitions/${id}`,
  },
  forms: {
    start: '/forms/start',
    getById: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}`,
    submit: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}/submit`,
    performAction: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}/actions`,
    getByTrackingNo: (trackingNo: string) => `/forms/by-tracking-no/${trackingNo}`,
    update: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}/update`,
    getPendingApprovals: '/forms/pending-approvals',
  },
  files: {
    upload: '/files/upload',
    get: (filePath: string) => `/files/${filePath}`,
  },
  tenant: {
    roles: '/tenant/roles',
    roleById: (id: string) => `/tenant/roles/${id}`,
    users: '/tenant/users',
    userRoles: (userId: string) => `/tenant/users/${userId}/roles`,
    userNotificationChannels: (userId: string) => `/tenant/users/${userId}/notification-channels`,
    userSystemRoles: (userId: string) => `/tenant/users/${userId}/system-roles`,
    integrationSettings: '/tenant/integration-settings',
    applicationSettings: '/tenant/application-settings',
  },
  notifications: {
    getAll: '/notifications',
    getUnreadCount: '/notifications/unread-count',
    markAllAsRead: '/notifications/mark-all-read',
    markAsRead: '/notifications/mark-read',
  },
};
```

```typescript
import { backendFetch } from "@/lib/api/apiClient";
import { withAuthHeader } from "@/lib/api/auth-server";
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from "@/lib/api/types";

// GET /api/tenant/application-settings
// -> backend: /api/TenantManagement/ApplicationSettings
export async function GET(_request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const settings = await backendFetch<TenantApplicationSettingsDto>(
      `/TenantManagement/ApplicationSettings`,
      await withAuthHeader({ method: "GET" })
    );
    return NextResponse.json(settings);
  } catch (error: any) {
    console.error("GET /TenantManagement/ApplicationSettings error:", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error.message || "An error occurred" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

// POST /api/tenant/application-settings
// -> backend: /api/TenantManagement/ApplicationSettings
export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body = await request.json();

    const result = await backendFetch<TenantApplicationSettingsDto>(
      `/TenantManagement/ApplicationSettings`,
      await withAuthHeader({
        method: "POST",
        body: JSON.stringify(body),
      })
    );

    return NextResponse.json(result);
  } catch (error: any) {
    console.error("POST /TenantManagement/ApplicationSettings error:", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error.message || "An error occurred" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';
import { isAuthenticatedClient } from '@/lib/api/auth-client';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from '@/lib/api/types';

export default function JobOrderPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [trackingNoLabel, setTrackingNoLabel] = useState('İş Emri No');
  const [loadingSettings, setLoadingSettings] = useState(true);
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isAuthenticatedClient()) {
      router.push('/login');
      return;
    }
    loadTenantSettings();
  }, [router]);

  const loadTenantSettings = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: TenantIntegrationSettingsDto }>(
        '/api/tenant/integration-settings'
      );
      if (response.data?.trackingNoLabel) {
        setTrackingNoLabel(response.data.trackingNoLabel);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading tenant settings:', error);
      // Use default label if error
    } finally {
      setLoadingSettings(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!trackingNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    // Navigate to form selection with tracking no
    router.push(`/forms?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-6 text-gray-900">
            {trackingNoLabel} Girişi
          </h1>
          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
            <div>
              <label htmlFor="trackingNo" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                {trackingNoLabel}
              </label>
              <input
                id="trackingNo"
                type="text"
                value={trackingNo}
                onChange={(e) => setTrackingNo(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full px-4 py-3 text-lg border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                placeholder={`${trackingNoLabel} numarasını girin`}
                required
                autoFocus
              />
            </div>
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading || !trackingNo.trim()}
              className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-4 text-lg font-semibold rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
            >
              {loading ? 'Yükleniyor...' : 'Devam Et'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>
        <div className="mt-8 text-center">
          <Link
            href="/"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Ana Sayfaya Dön
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>      
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';
import { isAuthenticatedClient } from '@/lib/api/auth-client';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from '@/lib/api/types';

export default function JobOrderPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [trackingNoLabel, setTrackingNoLabel] = useState('İş Emri No');
  const [loadingSettings, setLoadingSettings] = useState(true);
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isAuthenticatedClient()) {
      router.push('/login');
      return;
    }
    loadTenantSettings();
  }, [router]);

  const loadTenantSettings = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: TenantApplicationSettingsDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.tenant.applicationSettings
      );
      if (response.data?.trackingNoLabel) {
        setTrackingNoLabel(response.data.trackingNoLabel);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading tenant settings:', error);
      // Use default label if error
    } finally {
      setLoadingSettings(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!trackingNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    // Navigate to form selection with tracking no
    router.push(`/forms?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-6 text-gray-900">
            {trackingNoLabel} Girişi
          </h1>
          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
            <div>
              <label htmlFor="trackingNo" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                {trackingNoLabel}
              </label>
              <input
                id="trackingNo"
                type="text"
                value={trackingNo}
                onChange={(e) => setTrackingNo(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full px-4 py-3 text-lg border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                placeholder={`${trackingNoLabel} numarasını girin`}
                required
                autoFocus
              />
            </div>
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading || !trackingNo.trim()}
              className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-4 text-lg font-semibold rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
            >
              {loading ? 'Yükleniyor...' : 'Devam Et'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>
        <div className="mt-8 text-center">
          <Link
            href="/"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Ana Sayfaya Dön
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>      
    </div>
  );
}
```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormDefinitionDto, TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function FormSelectionPage() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const router = useRouter();
  const trackingNo = searchParams.get('trackingNo') || '';
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormDefinitionDto[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [trackingNoLabel, setTrackingNoLabel] = useState('İş Emri No');

  useEffect(() => {
    loadTenantSettings();
    if (trackingNo) {
      loadFormsForUser();
    }
  }, [trackingNo]);

  const loadTenantSettings = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: TenantIntegrationSettingsDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.tenant.integrationSettings
      );
      if (response.data?.trackingNoLabel) {
        setTrackingNoLabel(response.data.trackingNoLabel);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading tenant settings:', error);
    }
  };

  const loadFormsForUser = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormDefinitionDto[] }>(
        `${API_ENDPOINTS.formDefinitions.getForUser}?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading forms:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSelectForm = (formId: string) => {
    router.push(`/forms/${formId}/fill?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`);
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-lg">Yükleniyor...</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-4">
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto">
      <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/job-order"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            İş Emri Girişi
          </Link>
        </div>
        <div className="mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Form Seçimi</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600">{trackingNoLabel}: {trackingNo}</p>
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-4">
          {forms.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-8 text-center text-gray-500">
              Aktif form bulunamadı.
            </div>
          ) : (
            forms.map((form) => (
              <button
                key={form.id}
                onClick={() => handleSelectForm(form.id)}
                className="w-full bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md p-6 text-left hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow"
              >
                <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">{form.name}</h2>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Kod: {form.code}</p>
              </button>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormDefinitionDto, TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function FormSelectionPage() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const router = useRouter();
  const trackingNo = searchParams.get('trackingNo') || '';
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormDefinitionDto[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [trackingNoLabel, setTrackingNoLabel] = useState('İş Emri No');

  useEffect(() => {
    loadTenantSettings();
    if (trackingNo) {
      loadFormsForUser();
    }
  }, [trackingNo]);

  const loadTenantSettings = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: TenantApplicationSettingsDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.tenant.applicationSettings
      );
      if (response.data?.trackingNoLabel) {
        setTrackingNoLabel(response.data.trackingNoLabel);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading tenant settings:', error);
    }
  };

  const loadFormsForUser = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormDefinitionDto[] }>(
        `${API_ENDPOINTS.formDefinitions.getForUser}?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading forms:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSelectForm = (formId: string) => {
    router.push(`/forms/${formId}/fill?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`);
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-lg">Yükleniyor...</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-4">
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto">
      <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/job-order"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            İş Emri Girişi
          </Link>
        </div>
        <div className="mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Form Seçimi</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600">{trackingNoLabel}: {trackingNo}</p>
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-4">
          {forms.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-8 text-center text-gray-500">
              Aktif form bulunamadı.
            </div>
          ) : (
            forms.map((form) => (
              <button
                key={form.id}
                onClick={() => handleSelectForm(form.id)}
                className="w-full bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md p-6 text-left hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow"
              >
                <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">{form.name}</h2>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Kod: {form.code}</p>
              </button>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

Kalan TrackingNoLabel referanslarını kaldırıp types.ts'i düzeltiyorum:


```typescript
export enum FormStatus {
  Draft = 0,
  InReview = 1,
  Approved = 2,
  Rejected = 3,
  Returned = 4,
}

export enum WorkflowActionType {
  Approve = 0,
  Reject = 1,
  Return = 2,
}

export interface TenantRoleDto {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  isActive: boolean;
}

export interface TenantUserDTO {
  id: string;
  userName: string;
  email: string;
  // Tenant bazlı roller (dinamik)
  roles: TenantRoleDto[];
  // Sistem seviyesindeki roller (Identity roles)
  systemRoles: string[];
}

export interface FormDefinitionDto {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  code: string;
  version: number;
  isActive: boolean;
  schemaJson: string;
  allowedRoles?: string[];
  createdAt: string;
  createdBy: string;
}

export interface WorkflowStepDto {
  id: string;
  stepOrder: number;
  stepName: string;
  role: string;
  isFinalStep: boolean;
  canReturnToPrevious: boolean;
}

export interface WorkflowDefinitionDto {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  code: string;
  formDefinitionId: string;
  formDefinitionName: string;
  steps: WorkflowStepDto[];
  createdAt: string;
  createdBy: string;
}

export interface FormAttachmentDto {
  id: string;
  fileName: string;
  filePath: string;
  contentType: string;
  sizeBytes: number;
  uploadedAt: string;
  uploadedBy: string;
}

export interface WorkflowActionDto {
  id: string;
  fromStepOrder: number;
  toStepOrder: number;
  actionType: WorkflowActionType;
  actionTypeName?: string;
  comment?: string;
  performedBy: string;
  performedByUserName?: string;
  performedAt: string;
}

export interface FormInstanceDto {
  id: string;
  formDefinitionId: string;
  formDefinitionName: string;
  workflowDefinitionId: string;
  workflowDefinitionName: string;
  trackingNo: string;
  currentStatus: FormStatus;
  currentStatusName?: string;
  currentStepOrder: number;
  currentStepName?: string;
  currentStepRole?: string;
  dataJson?: Record<string, any>;
  attachments: FormAttachmentDto[];
  workflowActions: WorkflowActionDto[];
  createdAt: string;
  createdBy: string;
  createdByUserName?: string;
}

export interface LoginRequestDto {
  email: string;
  password: string;
}

// Backend AccessTokenResponse format
export interface AccessTokenResponse {
  tokenType: string;
  accessToken: string;
  expiresIn: number;
  refreshToken: string;
}

// Frontend için daha uygun format
export interface LoginResponseDto {
  accessToken: string;
  refreshToken: string;
  expiresIn: number;
  email?: string;
  roles?: string[];
}

export interface TableColumnSchema {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  type: 'text' | 'number' | 'date' | 'checkbox' | 'select' | 'upload';
  required?: boolean;
  options?: string[]; // Select için seçenekler
}

export interface FormFieldSchema {
  id: string;
  type: 'text' | 'number' | 'date' | 'checkbox' | 'select' | 'upload' | 'table';
  label: string;
  required?: boolean;
  validation?: Record<string, any>;
  options?: string[];
  // Table-specific properties
  columns?: TableColumnSchema[];
  minRows?: number;
  maxRows?: number;
  defaultRows?: number;
}

export interface FormSchema {
  fields: FormFieldSchema[];
}

export enum NotificationChannel {
  Email = 1,
  Teams = 2,
  Slack = 3,
  Push = 4,
}

export interface NotificationDto {
  id: number;
  title: string;
  message: string;
  userId: string;
  isRead: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
}

export interface TenantIntegrationSettingsDto {
  id?: string;
  tenantId: string;
  teamsWebhookUrl?: string;
  teamsEnabled: boolean;
  slackWebhookUrl?: string;
  slackEnabled: boolean;
}

export interface TenantApplicationSettingsDto {
  id?: string;
  tenantId?: string;
  trackingNoLabel?: string;
}
```

Tüm değişiklikler tamamlandı. Özet:

## Tamamlanan Değişiklikler

### Backend
1. Yeni Entity: `TenantApplicationSettings` oluşturuldu
2. `TenantIntegrationSettings`'den `TrackingNoLabel` kaldırıldı
3. Yeni DTO: `TenantApplicationSettingsDto` oluşturuldu
4. Yeni Service: `ITenantApplicationSettingsService` ve implementasyonu eklendi
5. EF Core Configuration: `TenantApplicationSettingsConfiguration` eklendi
6. ApplicationDbContext'e `TenantApplicationSettings` DbSet eklendi
7. Dependency Injection: `ITenantApplicationSettingsService` kaydedildi
8. Commands/Queries: `GetTenantApplicationSettingsQuery` ve `SaveTenantApplicationSettingsCommand` oluşturuldu
9. Endpoints: `TenantManagement` endpoint'ine yeni route'lar eklendi (`/ApplicationSettings`)

### Frontend
1. Yeni DTO Type: `TenantApplicationSettingsDto` eklendi
2. API Endpoint: `/api/tenant/application-settings` route handler oluşturuldu
3. API Endpoints: `API_ENDPOINTS.tenant.applicationSettings` eklendi
4. UI Güncellemeleri: `job-order/page.tsx` ve `forms/page.tsx` yeni endpoint'i kullanacak şekilde güncellendi

### Migration
Migration'ı SQL ile hallettiğinizi belirttiniz. Yine de EF Core migration oluşturmak isterseniz:

```bash
cd Backend/src/Web
dotnet ef migrations add MoveTrackingNoLabelToApplicationSettings --context ApplicationDbContext --project ..\Infrastructure\Infrastructure.csproj --output-dir Infrastructure/Migrations/PostgreSQL
```

Migration şunları içermeli:
- `TenantApplicationSettings` tablosunu oluştur
- `TenantIntegrationSettings` tablosundan `TrackingNoLabel` kolonunu kaldır
- Mevcut `TrackingNoLabel` değerlerini yeni tabloya taşı (data migration)

Tüm kod değişiklikleri tamamlandı. Migration'ı uyguladıktan sonra sistem çalışır durumda olacak.

```shellscript
cd Backend/src/Web
dotnet ef migrations add MoveTrackingNoLabelToApplicationSettings --context ApplicationDbContext --project ..\Infrastructure\Infrastructure.csproj --output-dir Infrastructure/Migrations/PostgreSQL
```

---

**User**

job-order/@page.tsx 'te sayfaya erişim kontrolü için if komutu yazarak isAuthenticatedClient() kontorlü yapıyorsun. Ama biz zaten sayfa erişimlerini genel olarak kontrol eden ve (admin)/layout.tsx'te bildiğin gibi useAuthGuard() kullanıyorduk. job-order'da unuttun diye mi oldu da kullanmadın?

---

**Cursor**

Mevcut yapıyı kontrol ediyorum:


`(mobile)` klasörü için layout yok. `(admin)/layout.tsx`'teki gibi `useAuthGuard()` kullanmak için `(mobile)/layout.tsx` oluşturuyoruz. Böylece tüm mobile sayfaları otomatik korunur.

İki seçenek:

**Seçenek 1: `(mobile)/layout.tsx` oluştur (önerilen)**
Tüm mobile sayfaları için merkezi kontrol:

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(mobile)/layout.tsx
'use client';

import { useAuthGuard } from "@/hooks/useAuthGuard";

export default function MobileLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  useAuthGuard();
  
  return <>{children}</>;
}
```

Sonra `job-order/page.tsx`'ten manuel kontrolü kaldır:

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(mobile)/job-order/page.tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';
// import { isAuthenticatedClient } from '@/lib/api/auth-client'; // ❌ Kaldır

import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from '@/lib/api/types';

export default function JobOrderPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [trackingNoLabel, setTrackingNoLabel] = useState('İş Emri No');
  const [loadingSettings, setLoadingSettings] = useState(true);
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    // ❌ isAuthenticatedClient kontrolünü kaldır - layout'ta yapılıyor
    loadTenantSettings();
  }, []); // router dependency'sini de kaldırabiliriz

  // ... rest of the code stays the same
```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from '@/lib/api/types';

export default function JobOrderPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [trackingNoLabel, setTrackingNoLabel] = useState('İş Emri No');
  const [loadingSettings, setLoadingSettings] = useState(true);
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    loadTenantSettings();
  }, []);

  const loadTenantSettings = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: TenantApplicationSettingsDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.tenant.applicationSettings
      );
      if (response.data?.trackingNoLabel) {
        setTrackingNoLabel(response.data.trackingNoLabel);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading tenant settings:', error);
      // Use default label if error
    } finally {
      setLoadingSettings(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!trackingNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    // Navigate to form selection with tracking no
    router.push(`/forms?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-6 text-gray-900">
            {trackingNoLabel} Girişi
          </h1>
          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
            <div>
              <label htmlFor="trackingNo" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                {trackingNoLabel}
              </label>
              <input
                id="trackingNo"
                type="text"
                value={trackingNo}
                onChange={(e) => setTrackingNo(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full px-4 py-3 text-lg border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                placeholder={`${trackingNoLabel} numarasını girin`}
                required
                autoFocus
              />
            </div>
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading || !trackingNo.trim()}
              className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-4 text-lg font-semibold rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
            >
              {loading ? 'Yükleniyor...' : 'Devam Et'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>
        <div className="mt-8 text-center">
          <Link
            href="/"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Ana Sayfaya Dön
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>      
    </div>
  );
}

```

Seçenek 1 uygulandı. Yapılan değişiklikler:

## Tamamlanan Değişiklikler

### 1. Yeni `(mobile)/layout.tsx` oluşturuldu
- Tüm mobile sayfaları için merkezi auth guard eklendi
- `useAuthGuard()` hook'u kullanılıyor (admin layout ile aynı yaklaşım)

### 2. `job-order/page.tsx` güncellendi
- `isAuthenticatedClient()` import'u kaldırıldı
- Manuel auth kontrolü kaldırıldı (layout'ta yapılıyor)
- `useEffect` dependency array'inden `router` kaldırıldı (artık gerekli değil)

Artık tüm `(mobile)` route'ları otomatik olarak `useAuthGuard()` ile korunuyor. Bu yaklaşım:
- Daha tutarlı (admin layout ile aynı pattern)
- Daha temiz (her sayfada tekrar yazmaya gerek yok)
- Daha maintainable (auth logic tek yerde)

Değişiklikler tamamlandı ve lint hatası yok.

Mevcut yapıyı inceliyorum:


Öneri: "İşlemler Paneli" (Operations Panel). Bu sayfalar operasyonel işlemler için uygun.

## Önerilen Yapı

**Yeni Route Group:** `(operations)`
- Raporlama
- Bekleyen Onaylar
- Bildirimler

**Admin Paneli'nde kalacaklar:**
- Form Tanımları
- İş Akışı Tanımları
- Tenant Roller
- Tenant Kullanıcıları
- Entegrasyon Ayarları

## Yapılacaklar

1. Yeni route group: `(operations)` oluştur
2. Sayfaları taşı:
   - `(admin)/reporting` → `(operations)/reporting`
   - `(admin)/pending-approvals` → `(operations)/pending-approvals`
   - `(web)/notifications` → `(operations)/notifications`
3. `(operations)/layout.tsx` oluştur (useAuthGuard ile)
4. `(operations)/dashboard/page.tsx` oluştur (3 kart için dashboard)
5. Ana sayfaya 3. kart ekle: "İşlemler Paneli"
6. Admin dashboard'dan 3 kartı kaldır

Agent mode'a geçip uygulayabilirim. Onaylıyor musunuz?

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useAuthGuard } from "@/hooks/useAuthGuard";
```
