Sayfaları taşıyıp link'leri güncelliyorum:


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormInstanceDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function ReportingPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleSearch = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!trackingNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getByTrackingNo(trackingNo)
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error searching:', error);
      setForms([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleViewDetails = async (formId: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading form details:', error);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/operations"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            İşlemler Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Raporlama</h1>

        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex gap-4">
            <input
              type="text"
              value={trackingNo}
              onChange={(e) => setTrackingNo(e.target.value)}
              placeholder="Takip No"
              className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            />
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading}
              className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50"
            >
              {loading ? 'Aranıyor...' : 'Ara'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>

        {forms.length > 0 && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden mb-6">
            <table className="min-w-full divide-y divide-gray-200">
              <thead className="bg-gray-50">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Form Adı
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Durum
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Oluşturulma
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    İşlemler
                  </th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="bg-white divide-y divide-gray-200">
                {forms.map((form) => (
                  <tr key={form.id}>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium">
                      {form.formDefinitionName}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <span className="px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                        {form.currentStatusName || form.currentStatus}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500">
                      {new Date(form.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR')}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm">
                      <button
                        onClick={() => handleViewDetails(form.id)}
                        className="text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-900"
                      >
                        Detay
                      </button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}

        {selectedForm && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Form Detayları</h2>
              <button
                onClick={() => setSelectedForm(null)}
                className="text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
              >
                ✕
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Form Verileri</h3>
                <pre className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded overflow-auto">
                  {JSON.stringify(selectedForm.dataJson, null, 2)}
                </pre>
              </div>

              {selectedForm.attachments.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Ekler</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.attachments.map((attachment) => {
                      // Convert /api/Files/... to /api/files/... for Next.js proxy route
                      const fileUrl = attachment.filePath.replace('/api/Files/', '/api/files/');
                      
                      return (
                        <a
                          key={attachment.id}
                          href={fileUrl}
                          target="_blank"
                          rel="noopener noreferrer"
                          className="block text-indigo-600 hover:underline"
                        >
                          {attachment.fileName}
                        </a>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {selectedForm.workflowActions.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">İş Akışı Geçmişi</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.workflowActions.map((action) => (
                      <div key={action.id} className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-4">
                        <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || action.actionType}</p>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                          {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} - {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                        </p>
                        {action.comment && <p className="text-sm">{action.comment}</p>}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { FormInstanceDto, FormStatus, WorkflowActionType } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

const statusLabels: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'Taslak',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'İncelemede',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'Onaylandı',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'Reddedildi',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'Geri Gönderildi',
};

const statusClasses: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800',
};

export default function PendingApprovalsPage() {
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [actionLoading, setActionLoading] = useState<WorkflowActionType | null>(null);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [comment, setComment] = useState('');

  const loadPending = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getPendingApprovals
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.message || 'Bekleyen onaylar alınamadı.');
      setForms([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    loadPending();
  }, []);

  const handleSelect = async (formId: string) => {
    const found = forms.find((f) => f.id === formId);
    if (found) {
      setSelectedForm(found);
      return;
    }

    // fallback: fetch details if not in list
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch {
      setSelectedForm(null);
    }
  };

  const handleAction = async (actionType: WorkflowActionType) => {
    if (!selectedForm) return;
    setActionLoading(actionType);
    setError(null);
    try {
      await routeHandlerClient.post(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.performAction(selectedForm.id),
        {
          formInstanceId: selectedForm.id,
          actionType,
          comment: comment.trim() || null,
        }
      );
      await loadPending();
      setSelectedForm(null);
      setComment('');
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.message || 'İşlem başarısız.');
    } finally {
      setActionLoading(null);
    }
  };

  const sortedForms = useMemo(
    () =>
      [...forms].sort(
        (a, b) => new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(a.createdAt).getTime()
      ),
    [forms]
  );

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <Link
            href="/operations"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            İşlemler Paneli
          </Link>
          <button
            onClick={loadPending}
            disabled={loading}
            className="text-sm px-3 py-1 rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Yenile
          </button>
        </div>

        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Bekleyen Onaylar</h1>

        {error && (
          <div className="mb-4 rounded-md border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3 text-red-700">
            {error}
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          <div className="lg:col-span-2 bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
            <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-between">
              <h2 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">Formlar</h2>
              {loading && <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">Yükleniyor...</span>}
            </div>
            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
              {sortedForms.length === 0 && !loading && (
                <div className="p-6 text-sm text-gray-500">Bekleyen onay bulunmuyor.</div>
              )}
              {sortedForms.map((form) => (
                <button
                  key={form.id}
                  onClick={() => handleSelect(form.id)}
                  className="w-full text-left px-4 py-3 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:bg-gray-50"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{form.trackingNo}</p>
                      <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{form.formDefinitionName}</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Adım: {form.currentStepName ?? form.currentStepOrder} / Rol:{' '}
                        {form.currentStepRole ?? '-'}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <span
                      className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[form.currentStatus]}`}
                    >
                      {form.currentStatusName || statusLabels[form.currentStatus]}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Detay</h3>
            {!selectedForm && (
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Listeden bir form seçin.</p>
            )}
            {selectedForm && (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Form</p>
                  <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">
                    {selectedForm.formDefinitionName}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Takip No: {selectedForm.trackingNo}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span
                    className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[selectedForm.currentStatus]}`}
                  >
                    {selectedForm.currentStatusName || statusLabels[selectedForm.currentStatus]}
                  </span>
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                    Adım: {selectedForm.currentStepName ?? selectedForm.currentStepOrder} (
                    {selectedForm.currentStepRole ?? '-'})
                  </span>
                </div>

                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-1">Son İşlem Geçmişi</p>
                  {selectedForm.workflowActions?.length ? (
                    <div className="space-y-2 max-h-40 overflow-auto pr-2">
                      {[...selectedForm.workflowActions]
                        .sort(
                          (a, b) =>
                            new Date(b.performedAt).getTime() -
                            new Date(a.performedAt).getTime()
                        )
                        .map((action) => (
                          <div
                            key={action.id}
                            className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-3 text-sm"
                          >
                            <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || WorkflowActionType[action.actionType] || action.actionType}</p>
                            <p className="text-gray-500">
                              {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} -{' '}
                              {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                            </p>
                            {action.comment && <p>{action.comment}</p>}
                          </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">İşlem geçmişi yok.</p>
                  )}
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <label className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">Yorum (opsiyonel)</label>
                  <textarea
                    value={comment}
                    onChange={(e) => setComment(e.target.value)}
                    rows={3}
                    className="w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                    placeholder="Onay / ret gerekçesi"
                  />
                </div>

                <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Approve)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-green-600 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-green-700 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Approve ? 'Onaylanıyor...' : 'Onayla'}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Reject)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-red-600 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-red-700 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Reject ? 'Reddediliyor...' : 'Reddet'}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Return)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-yellow-500 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-yellow-600 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Return ? 'Gönderiliyor...' : 'Geri Gönder'}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { NotificationDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { tr } from 'date-fns/locale';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function NotificationsPage() {
  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<NotificationDto[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadNotifications();
  }, []);

  const loadNotifications = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: NotificationDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.notifications.getAll
      );
      setNotifications(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading notifications:', error);
      toast.error('Bildirimler yüklenemedi.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const markAsRead = async (id: number) => {
    try {
      await routeHandlerClient.post(
        API_ENDPOINTS.notifications.markAsRead,
        { notificationId: id }
      );
      setNotifications(prev => 
        prev.map(n => n.id === id ? { ...n, isRead: true } : n)
      );
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error marking as read:', error);
      toast.error('Bildirim okunmuş olarak işaretlenemedi.');
    }
  };

  const markAllAsRead = async () => {
    try {
      await routeHandlerClient.post(API_ENDPOINTS.notifications.markAllAsRead);
      setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, isRead: true })));
      toast.success('Tüm bildirimler okunmuş olarak işaretlendi.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error marking all as read:', error);
      toast.error('Bildirimler okunmuş olarak işaretlenemedi.');
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return <div className="p-8">Yükleniyor...</div>;
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/operations"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            İşlemler Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Bildirimler</h1>
          {notifications.some(n => !n.isRead) && (
            <button
              onClick={markAllAsRead}
              className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700"
            >
              Tümünü Okundu İşaretle
            </button>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
          {notifications.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="text-center text-gray-500 p-8">
              Henüz bildiriminiz yok.
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
              {notifications.map(notif => (
                <div
                  key={notif.id}
                  className={`p-4 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors ${
                    !notif.isRead ? 'bg-blue-50' : ''
                  }`}
                  onClick={() => !notif.isRead && markAsRead(notif.id!)}
                >
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                    <div className="flex-1">
                      <h3 className={`font-semibold ${!notif.isRead ? 'text-gray-900' : 'text-gray-700'}`}>
                        {notif.title}
                      </h3>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">{notif.message}</p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">
                        {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(notif.createdAt!), {
                          addSuffix: true,
                          locale: tr,
                        })}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    {!notif.isRead && (
                      <span className="ml-4 inline-flex items-center justify-center w-2 h-2 bg-blue-600 rounded-full"></span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { BarChart3, CheckCircle2, Bell, LayoutDashboard, LogOut } from 'lucide-react';
import { useLogout } from '@/hooks/useLogout';
import { NotificationBell } from '@/components/notifications/NotificationBell';
import { PendingApprovalsBadge } from '@/components/pending-approvals/PendingApprovalsBadge';

export default function OperationsDashboard() {
  const logout = useLogout();

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100">
      <div className="max-w-6xl w-full px-4">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900">İşlemler Paneli</h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">Operasyonel işlemleri yönetin</p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* Reporting Card */}
          <Link
            href="/reporting"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-green-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-green-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-green-200 transition-colors">
                <BarChart3 className="w-12 h-12 text-green-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Raporlama</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Form örneklerini görüntüleyin ve raporları inceleyin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-green-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-green-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Pending Approvals Card */}
          <Link
            href="/pending-approvals"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-amber-500"
          >
            <PendingApprovalsBadge />
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-amber-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-amber-200 transition-colors">
                <CheckCircle2 className="w-12 h-12 text-amber-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Bekleyen Onaylar</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Rollerine göre bekleyen form onaylarını görüntüle ve işle
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-amber-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-amber-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Notifications Card */}
          <Link
            href="/notifications"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-pink-500"
          >
            <NotificationBell badgeOnly={true} />
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-pink-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-pink-200 transition-colors">
                <Bell className="w-12 h-12 text-pink-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Bildirimler</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Form bildirimlerini görüntüleyin ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-pink-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-pink-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-8 text-center flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
          <Link
            href="/"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Ana Sayfaya Dön
          </Link>
          <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
          <button
            onClick={logout}
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors"
          >
            <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
            Çıkış Yap
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { FileText, Workflow, BarChart3, LayoutDashboard, CheckCircle2, User, HandCoins, LogOut, Bell, Plug } from 'lucide-react';
import { useLogout } from '@/hooks/useLogout';
import { NotificationBell } from '@/components/notifications/NotificationBell';
import { PendingApprovalsBadge } from '@/components/pending-approvals/PendingApprovalsBadge';

export default function AdminDashboard() {
  const logout = useLogout();

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100">
      <div className="max-w-6xl w-full px-4">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900">Admin Paneli</h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">Yönetim işlemlerini seçin</p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
          {/* Form Definitions Card */}
          <Link
            href="/form-definitions"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-indigo-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-indigo-200 transition-colors">
                <FileText className="w-12 h-12 text-indigo-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Form Tanımları</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Form tanımlarını oluşturun, düzenleyin ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-indigo-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-indigo-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Workflow Definitions Card */}
          <Link
            href="/workflow-definitions"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-blue-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-blue-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors">
                <Workflow className="w-12 h-12 text-blue-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">İş Akışı Tanımları</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                İş akışı tanımlarını oluşturun ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-blue-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-blue-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>


          {/* Tenant Roles Card */}
          <Link
            href="/tenant/roles"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-purple-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-purple-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-purple-200 transition-colors">
                <HandCoins className="w-12 h-12 text-purple-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Tenant Roller</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Tenant'a özel roller oluşturun ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-purple-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-purple-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Tenant Users Card */}
          <Link
            href="/tenant/users"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-teal-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-teal-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-teal-200 transition-colors">
                <User className="w-12 h-12 text-teal-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Tenant Kullanıcıları</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Kullanıcıları görüntüleyin ve tenant rollerini yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-teal-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-teal-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Notifications Card */}
          <Link
            href="/notifications"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-pink-500"
          >
            <NotificationBell badgeOnly={true} />
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-pink-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-pink-200 transition-colors">
                <Bell className="w-12 h-12 text-pink-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Bildirimler</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Form bildirimlerini görüntüleyin ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-pink-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-pink-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Integration Settings Card */}
          <Link
            href="/tenant/settings"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-cyan-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-cyan-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-cyan-200 transition-colors">
                <Plug className="w-12 h-12 text-cyan-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Entegrasyon Ayarları</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Teams ve Slack entegrasyonlarını yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-cyan-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-cyan-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-8 text-center flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
          <Link
            href="/"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Ana Sayfaya Dön
          </Link>
          <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
          <button
            onClick={logout}
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors"
          >
            <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
            Çıkış Yap
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { FileText, Workflow, BarChart3, LayoutDashboard, CheckCircle2, User, HandCoins, LogOut, Bell, Plug } from 'lucide-react';
import { useLogout } from '@/hooks/useLogout';
import { NotificationBell } from '@/components/notifications/NotificationBell';
import { PendingApprovalsBadge } from '@/components/pending-approvals/PendingApprovalsBadge';

export default function AdminDashboard() {
  const logout = useLogout();

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100">
      <div className="max-w-6xl w-full px-4">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900">Admin Paneli</h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">Yönetim işlemlerini seçin</p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
          {/* Form Definitions Card */}
          <Link
            href="/form-definitions"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-indigo-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-indigo-200 transition-colors">
                <FileText className="w-12 h-12 text-indigo-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Form Tanımları</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Form tanımlarını oluşturun, düzenleyin ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-indigo-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-indigo-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Workflow Definitions Card */}
          <Link
            href="/workflow-definitions"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-blue-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-blue-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors">
                <Workflow className="w-12 h-12 text-blue-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">İş Akışı Tanımları</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                İş akışı tanımlarını oluşturun ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-blue-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-blue-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>


          {/* Tenant Roles Card */}
          <Link
            href="/tenant/roles"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-purple-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-purple-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-purple-200 transition-colors">
                <HandCoins className="w-12 h-12 text-purple-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Tenant Roller</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Tenant'a özel roller oluşturun ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-purple-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-purple-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Tenant Users Card */}
          <Link
            href="/tenant/users"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-teal-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-teal-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-teal-200 transition-colors">
                <User className="w-12 h-12 text-teal-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Tenant Kullanıcıları</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Kullanıcıları görüntüleyin ve tenant rollerini yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-teal-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-teal-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>


          {/* Integration Settings Card */}
          <Link
            href="/tenant/settings"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-cyan-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-cyan-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-cyan-200 transition-colors">
                <Plug className="w-12 h-12 text-cyan-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Entegrasyon Ayarları</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Teams ve Slack entegrasyonlarını yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-cyan-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-cyan-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-8 text-center flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
          <Link
            href="/"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Ana Sayfaya Dön
          </Link>
          <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
          <button
            onClick={logout}
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors"
          >
            <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
            Çıkış Yap
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard, Smartphone } from 'lucide-react';

export default function Home() {
  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100">
      <div className="max-w-4xl w-full px-4">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900">Movith Forms</h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">No-Code Form Management & Workflow Platform</p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* Admin Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/dashboard"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-indigo-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-indigo-200 transition-colors">
                <LayoutDashboard className="w-12 h-12 text-indigo-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Admin Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Form ve iş akışı tanımlamalarını yönetin, raporları görüntüleyin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-indigo-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-indigo-700">
                Giriş Yap →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Mobile Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/job-order"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-green-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-green-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-green-200 transition-colors">
                <Smartphone className="w-12 h-12 text-green-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Mobil Panel</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                İş emri girin, formları doldurun ve onayları yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-green-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-green-700">
                Başla →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
          <p>Admin paneli için giriş yapmanız gerekmektedir</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```typescriptreact
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Mobil Panel</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                İş emri girin, formları doldurun ve onayları yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-green-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-green-700">
                Başla →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Operations Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/operations"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-blue-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-blue-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors">
                <Briefcase className="w-12 h-12 text-blue-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">İşlemler Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Raporları görüntüleyin, onayları yönetin ve bildirimleri takip edin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-blue-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-blue-700">
                Giriş Yap →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
          <p>Admin ve İşlemler panelleri için giriş yapmanız gerekmektedir</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

`/operations` route'unu doğru yönlendirmek için kontrol ediyorum:

```typescriptreact
'use client';

export default function Home() {
  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100">

              </p>

              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-green-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-green-700">
                Başla →
              </div>
            </div>

          {/* Operations Panel Card */}

          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">

                <Briefcase className="w-12 h-12 text-blue-600" />

              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-blue-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-blue-700">

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormInstanceDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function ReportingPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleSearch = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!trackingNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getByTrackingNo(trackingNo)
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error searching:', error);
      setForms([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleViewDetails = async (formId: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading form details:', error);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/operations/dashboard"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            İşlemler Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Raporlama</h1>

        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex gap-4">
            <input
              type="text"
              value={trackingNo}
              onChange={(e) => setTrackingNo(e.target.value)}
              placeholder="Takip No"
              className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            />
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading}
              className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50"
            >
              {loading ? 'Aranıyor...' : 'Ara'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>

        {forms.length > 0 && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden mb-6">
            <table className="min-w-full divide-y divide-gray-200">
              <thead className="bg-gray-50">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Form Adı
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Durum
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Oluşturulma
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    İşlemler
                  </th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="bg-white divide-y divide-gray-200">
                {forms.map((form) => (
                  <tr key={form.id}>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium">
                      {form.formDefinitionName}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <span className="px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                        {form.currentStatusName || form.currentStatus}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500">
                      {new Date(form.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR')}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm">
                      <button
                        onClick={() => handleViewDetails(form.id)}
                        className="text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-900"
                      >
                        Detay
                      </button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}

        {selectedForm && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Form Detayları</h2>
              <button
                onClick={() => setSelectedForm(null)}
                className="text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
              >
                ✕
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Form Verileri</h3>
                <pre className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded overflow-auto">
                  {JSON.stringify(selectedForm.dataJson, null, 2)}
                </pre>
              </div>

              {selectedForm.attachments.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Ekler</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.attachments.map((attachment) => {
                      // Convert /api/Files/... to /api/files/... for Next.js proxy route
                      const fileUrl = attachment.filePath.replace('/api/Files/', '/api/files/');
                      
                      return (
                        <a
                          key={attachment.id}
                          href={fileUrl}
                          target="_blank"
                          rel="noopener noreferrer"
                          className="block text-indigo-600 hover:underline"
                        >
                          {attachment.fileName}
                        </a>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {selectedForm.workflowActions.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">İş Akışı Geçmişi</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.workflowActions.map((action) => (
                      <div key={action.id} className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-4">
                        <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || action.actionType}</p>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                          {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} - {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                        </p>
                        {action.comment && <p className="text-sm">{action.comment}</p>}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { FormInstanceDto, FormStatus, WorkflowActionType } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

const statusLabels: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'Taslak',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'İncelemede',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'Onaylandı',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'Reddedildi',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'Geri Gönderildi',
};

const statusClasses: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800',
};

export default function PendingApprovalsPage() {
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [actionLoading, setActionLoading] = useState<WorkflowActionType | null>(null);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [comment, setComment] = useState('');

  const loadPending = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getPendingApprovals
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.message || 'Bekleyen onaylar alınamadı.');
      setForms([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    loadPending();
  }, []);

  const handleSelect = async (formId: string) => {
    const found = forms.find((f) => f.id === formId);
    if (found) {
      setSelectedForm(found);
      return;
    }

    // fallback: fetch details if not in list
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch {
      setSelectedForm(null);
    }
  };

  const handleAction = async (actionType: WorkflowActionType) => {
    if (!selectedForm) return;
    setActionLoading(actionType);
    setError(null);
    try {
      await routeHandlerClient.post(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.performAction(selectedForm.id),
        {
          formInstanceId: selectedForm.id,
          actionType,
          comment: comment.trim() || null,
        }
      );
      await loadPending();
      setSelectedForm(null);
      setComment('');
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.message || 'İşlem başarısız.');
    } finally {
      setActionLoading(null);
    }
  };

  const sortedForms = useMemo(
    () =>
      [...forms].sort(
        (a, b) => new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(a.createdAt).getTime()
      ),
    [forms]
  );

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <Link
            href="/operations/dashboard"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            İşlemler Paneli
          </Link>
          <button
            onClick={loadPending}
            disabled={loading}
            className="text-sm px-3 py-1 rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Yenile
          </button>
        </div>

        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Bekleyen Onaylar</h1>

        {error && (
          <div className="mb-4 rounded-md border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3 text-red-700">
            {error}
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          <div className="lg:col-span-2 bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
            <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-between">
              <h2 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">Formlar</h2>
              {loading && <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">Yükleniyor...</span>}
            </div>
            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
              {sortedForms.length === 0 && !loading && (
                <div className="p-6 text-sm text-gray-500">Bekleyen onay bulunmuyor.</div>
              )}
              {sortedForms.map((form) => (
                <button
                  key={form.id}
                  onClick={() => handleSelect(form.id)}
                  className="w-full text-left px-4 py-3 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:bg-gray-50"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{form.trackingNo}</p>
                      <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{form.formDefinitionName}</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Adım: {form.currentStepName ?? form.currentStepOrder} / Rol:{' '}
                        {form.currentStepRole ?? '-'}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <span
                      className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[form.currentStatus]}`}
                    >
                      {form.currentStatusName || statusLabels[form.currentStatus]}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Detay</h3>
            {!selectedForm && (
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Listeden bir form seçin.</p>
            )}
            {selectedForm && (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Form</p>
                  <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">
                    {selectedForm.formDefinitionName}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Takip No: {selectedForm.trackingNo}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span
                    className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[selectedForm.currentStatus]}`}
                  >
                    {selectedForm.currentStatusName || statusLabels[selectedForm.currentStatus]}
                  </span>
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                    Adım: {selectedForm.currentStepName ?? selectedForm.currentStepOrder} (
                    {selectedForm.currentStepRole ?? '-'})
                  </span>
                </div>

                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-1">Son İşlem Geçmişi</p>
                  {selectedForm.workflowActions?.length ? (
                    <div className="space-y-2 max-h-40 overflow-auto pr-2">
                      {[...selectedForm.workflowActions]
                        .sort(
                          (a, b) =>
                            new Date(b.performedAt).getTime() -
                            new Date(a.performedAt).getTime()
                        )
                        .map((action) => (
                          <div
                            key={action.id}
                            className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-3 text-sm"
                          >
                            <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || WorkflowActionType[action.actionType] || action.actionType}</p>
                            <p className="text-gray-500">
                              {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} -{' '}
                              {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                            </p>
                            {action.comment && <p>{action.comment}</p>}
                          </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">İşlem geçmişi yok.</p>
                  )}
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <label className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">Yorum (opsiyonel)</label>
                  <textarea
                    value={comment}
                    onChange={(e) => setComment(e.target.value)}
                    rows={3}
                    className="w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                    placeholder="Onay / ret gerekçesi"
                  />
                </div>

                <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Approve)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-green-600 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-green-700 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Approve ? 'Onaylanıyor...' : 'Onayla'}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Reject)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-red-600 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-red-700 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Reject ? 'Reddediliyor...' : 'Reddet'}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Return)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-yellow-500 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-yellow-600 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Return ? 'Gönderiliyor...' : 'Geri Gönder'}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { NotificationDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { tr } from 'date-fns/locale';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function NotificationsPage() {
  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<NotificationDto[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadNotifications();
  }, []);

  const loadNotifications = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: NotificationDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.notifications.getAll
      );
      setNotifications(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading notifications:', error);
      toast.error('Bildirimler yüklenemedi.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const markAsRead = async (id: number) => {
    try {
      await routeHandlerClient.post(
        API_ENDPOINTS.notifications.markAsRead,
        { notificationId: id }
      );
      setNotifications(prev => 
        prev.map(n => n.id === id ? { ...n, isRead: true } : n)
      );
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error marking as read:', error);
      toast.error('Bildirim okunmuş olarak işaretlenemedi.');
    }
  };

  const markAllAsRead = async () => {
    try {
      await routeHandlerClient.post(API_ENDPOINTS.notifications.markAllAsRead);
      setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, isRead: true })));
      toast.success('Tüm bildirimler okunmuş olarak işaretlendi.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error marking all as read:', error);
      toast.error('Bildirimler okunmuş olarak işaretlenemedi.');
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return <div className="p-8">Yükleniyor...</div>;
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/operations/dashboard"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            İşlemler Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Bildirimler</h1>
          {notifications.some(n => !n.isRead) && (
            <button
              onClick={markAllAsRead}
              className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700"
            >
              Tümünü Okundu İşaretle
            </button>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
          {notifications.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="text-center text-gray-500 p-8">
              Henüz bildiriminiz yok.
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
              {notifications.map(notif => (
                <div
                  key={notif.id}
                  className={`p-4 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors ${
                    !notif.isRead ? 'bg-blue-50' : ''
                  }`}
                  onClick={() => !notif.isRead && markAsRead(notif.id!)}
                >
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                    <div className="flex-1">
                      <h3 className={`font-semibold ${!notif.isRead ? 'text-gray-900' : 'text-gray-700'}`}>
                        {notif.title}
                      </h3>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">{notif.message}</p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">
                        {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(notif.createdAt!), {
                          addSuffix: true,
                          locale: tr,
                        })}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    {!notif.isRead && (
                      <span className="ml-4 inline-flex items-center justify-center w-2 h-2 bg-blue-600 rounded-full"></span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

Ana sayfadaki linki `/operations/dashboard` olarak güncelledim. `/operations` route'unu doğrudan dashboard'a yönlendirmek için `/operations/page.tsx` oluşturuyorum:


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { BarChart3, CheckCircle2, Bell, LayoutDashboard, LogOut } from 'lucide-react';
import { useLogout } from '@/hooks/useLogout';
import { NotificationBell } from '@/components/notifications/NotificationBell';
import { PendingApprovalsBadge } from '@/components/pending-approvals/PendingApprovalsBadge';

export default function OperationsDashboard() {
  const logout = useLogout();

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100">
      <div className="max-w-6xl w-full px-4">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900">İşlemler Paneli</h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">Operasyonel işlemleri yönetin</p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* Reporting Card */}
          <Link
            href="/reporting"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-green-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-green-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-green-200 transition-colors">
                <BarChart3 className="w-12 h-12 text-green-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Raporlama</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Form örneklerini görüntüleyin ve raporları inceleyin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-green-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-green-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Pending Approvals Card */}
          <Link
            href="/pending-approvals"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-amber-500"
          >
            <PendingApprovalsBadge />
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-amber-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-amber-200 transition-colors">
                <CheckCircle2 className="w-12 h-12 text-amber-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Bekleyen Onaylar</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Rollerine göre bekleyen form onaylarını görüntüle ve işle
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-amber-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-amber-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Notifications Card */}
          <Link
            href="/notifications"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-pink-500"
          >
            <NotificationBell badgeOnly={true} />
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-pink-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-pink-200 transition-colors">
                <Bell className="w-12 h-12 text-pink-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Bildirimler</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Form bildirimlerini görüntüleyin ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-pink-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-pink-700">
                Git →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-8 text-center flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
          <Link
            href="/"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Ana Sayfaya Dön
          </Link>
          <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
          <button
            onClick={logout}
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors"
          >
            <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
            Çıkış Yap
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';

export default function Home() {
  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100">
      <div className="max-w-4xl w-full px-4">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900">Movith Forms</h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">No-Code Form Management & Workflow Platform</p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* Admin Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/dashboard"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-indigo-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-indigo-200 transition-colors">
                <LayoutDashboard className="w-12 h-12 text-indigo-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Admin Paneli</h2>

          {/* Operations Panel Card */}

          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-blue-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors">
                <Briefcase className="w-12 h-12 text-blue-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">İşlemler Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">

              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-blue-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-blue-700">
                Giriş Yap →

            </div>

        </div>
```
