```typescriptreact
          <p>Admin ve İşlemler panelleri için giriş yapmanız gerekmektedir</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormInstanceDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function ReportingPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleSearch = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!trackingNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getByTrackingNo(trackingNo)
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error searching:', error);
      setForms([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleViewDetails = async (formId: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading form details:', error);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/operations"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            İşlemler Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Raporlama</h1>

        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex gap-4">
            <input
              type="text"
              value={trackingNo}
              onChange={(e) => setTrackingNo(e.target.value)}
              placeholder="Takip No"
              className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            />
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading}
              className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50"
            >
              {loading ? 'Aranıyor...' : 'Ara'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>

        {forms.length > 0 && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden mb-6">
            <table className="min-w-full divide-y divide-gray-200">
              <thead className="bg-gray-50">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Form Adı
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Durum
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    Oluşturulma
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">
                    İşlemler
                  </th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="bg-white divide-y divide-gray-200">
                {forms.map((form) => (
                  <tr key={form.id}>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium">
                      {form.formDefinitionName}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <span className="px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-800">
                        {form.currentStatusName || form.currentStatus}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500">
                      {new Date(form.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR')}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm">
                      <button
                        onClick={() => handleViewDetails(form.id)}
                        className="text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-900"
                      >
                        Detay
                      </button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}

        {selectedForm && (
          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Form Detayları</h2>
              <button
                onClick={() => setSelectedForm(null)}
                className="text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
              >
                ✕
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Form Verileri</h3>
                <pre className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded overflow-auto">
                  {JSON.stringify(selectedForm.dataJson, null, 2)}
                </pre>
              </div>

              {selectedForm.attachments.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Ekler</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.attachments.map((attachment) => {
                      // Convert /api/Files/... to /api/files/... for Next.js proxy route
                      const fileUrl = attachment.filePath.replace('/api/Files/', '/api/files/');
                      
                      return (
                        <a
                          key={attachment.id}
                          href={fileUrl}
                          target="_blank"
                          rel="noopener noreferrer"
                          className="block text-indigo-600 hover:underline"
                        >
                          {attachment.fileName}
                        </a>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {selectedForm.workflowActions.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">İş Akışı Geçmişi</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {selectedForm.workflowActions.map((action) => (
                      <div key={action.id} className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-4">
                        <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || action.actionType}</p>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                          {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} - {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                        </p>
                        {action.comment && <p className="text-sm">{action.comment}</p>}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { FormInstanceDto, FormStatus, WorkflowActionType } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

const statusLabels: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'Taslak',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'İncelemede',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'Onaylandı',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'Reddedildi',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'Geri Gönderildi',
};

const statusClasses: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800',
};

export default function PendingApprovalsPage() {
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [actionLoading, setActionLoading] = useState<WorkflowActionType | null>(null);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [comment, setComment] = useState('');

  const loadPending = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getPendingApprovals
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.message || 'Bekleyen onaylar alınamadı.');
      setForms([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    loadPending();
  }, []);

  const handleSelect = async (formId: string) => {
    const found = forms.find((f) => f.id === formId);
    if (found) {
      setSelectedForm(found);
      return;
    }

    // fallback: fetch details if not in list
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch {
      setSelectedForm(null);
    }
  };

  const handleAction = async (actionType: WorkflowActionType) => {
    if (!selectedForm) return;
    setActionLoading(actionType);
    setError(null);
    try {
      await routeHandlerClient.post(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.performAction(selectedForm.id),
        {
          formInstanceId: selectedForm.id,
          actionType,
          comment: comment.trim() || null,
        }
      );
      await loadPending();
      setSelectedForm(null);
      setComment('');
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.message || 'İşlem başarısız.');
    } finally {
      setActionLoading(null);
    }
  };

  const sortedForms = useMemo(
    () =>
      [...forms].sort(
        (a, b) => new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(a.createdAt).getTime()
      ),
    [forms]
  );

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <Link
            href="/operations"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            İşlemler Paneli
          </Link>
          <button
            onClick={loadPending}
            disabled={loading}
            className="text-sm px-3 py-1 rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Yenile
          </button>
        </div>

        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Bekleyen Onaylar</h1>

        {error && (
          <div className="mb-4 rounded-md border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3 text-red-700">
            {error}
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          <div className="lg:col-span-2 bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
            <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-between">
              <h2 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">Formlar</h2>
              {loading && <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">Yükleniyor...</span>}
            </div>
            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
              {sortedForms.length === 0 && !loading && (
                <div className="p-6 text-sm text-gray-500">Bekleyen onay bulunmuyor.</div>
              )}
              {sortedForms.map((form) => (
                <button
                  key={form.id}
                  onClick={() => handleSelect(form.id)}
                  className="w-full text-left px-4 py-3 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:bg-gray-50"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{form.trackingNo}</p>
                      <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{form.formDefinitionName}</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                        Adım: {form.currentStepName ?? form.currentStepOrder} / Rol:{' '}
                        {form.currentStepRole ?? '-'}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <span
                      className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[form.currentStatus]}`}
                    >
                      {form.currentStatusName || statusLabels[form.currentStatus]}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Detay</h3>
            {!selectedForm && (
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Listeden bir form seçin.</p>
            )}
            {selectedForm && (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Form</p>
                  <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">
                    {selectedForm.formDefinitionName}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Takip No: {selectedForm.trackingNo}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span
                    className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[selectedForm.currentStatus]}`}
                  >
                    {selectedForm.currentStatusName || statusLabels[selectedForm.currentStatus]}
                  </span>
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                    Adım: {selectedForm.currentStepName ?? selectedForm.currentStepOrder} (
                    {selectedForm.currentStepRole ?? '-'})
                  </span>
                </div>

                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-1">Son İşlem Geçmişi</p>
                  {selectedForm.workflowActions?.length ? (
                    <div className="space-y-2 max-h-40 overflow-auto pr-2">
                      {[...selectedForm.workflowActions]
                        .sort(
                          (a, b) =>
                            new Date(b.performedAt).getTime() -
                            new Date(a.performedAt).getTime()
                        )
                        .map((action) => (
                          <div
                            key={action.id}
                            className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-3 text-sm"
                          >
                            <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || WorkflowActionType[action.actionType] || action.actionType}</p>
                            <p className="text-gray-500">
                              {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} -{' '}
                              {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                            </p>
                            {action.comment && <p>{action.comment}</p>}
                          </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">İşlem geçmişi yok.</p>
                  )}
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <label className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">Yorum (opsiyonel)</label>
                  <textarea
                    value={comment}
                    onChange={(e) => setComment(e.target.value)}
                    rows={3}
                    className="w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                    placeholder="Onay / ret gerekçesi"
                  />
                </div>

                <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Approve)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-green-600 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-green-700 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Approve ? 'Onaylanıyor...' : 'Onayla'}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Reject)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-red-600 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-red-700 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Reject ? 'Reddediliyor...' : 'Reddet'}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => handleAction(WorkflowActionType.Return)}
                    disabled={actionLoading !== null}
                    className="bg-yellow-500 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-yellow-600 disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {actionLoading === WorkflowActionType.Return ? 'Gönderiliyor...' : 'Geri Gönder'}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { NotificationDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { tr } from 'date-fns/locale';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function NotificationsPage() {
  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<NotificationDto[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadNotifications();
  }, []);

  const loadNotifications = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: NotificationDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.notifications.getAll
      );
      setNotifications(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading notifications:', error);
      toast.error('Bildirimler yüklenemedi.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const markAsRead = async (id: number) => {
    try {
      await routeHandlerClient.post(
        API_ENDPOINTS.notifications.markAsRead,
        { notificationId: id }
      );
      setNotifications(prev => 
        prev.map(n => n.id === id ? { ...n, isRead: true } : n)
      );
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error marking as read:', error);
      toast.error('Bildirim okunmuş olarak işaretlenemedi.');
    }
  };

  const markAllAsRead = async () => {
    try {
      await routeHandlerClient.post(API_ENDPOINTS.notifications.markAllAsRead);
      setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, isRead: true })));
      toast.success('Tüm bildirimler okunmuş olarak işaretlendi.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error marking all as read:', error);
      toast.error('Bildirimler okunmuş olarak işaretlenemedi.');
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return <div className="p-8">Yükleniyor...</div>;
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/operations"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            İşlemler Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Bildirimler</h1>
          {notifications.some(n => !n.isRead) && (
            <button
              onClick={markAllAsRead}
              className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700"
            >
              Tümünü Okundu İşaretle
            </button>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
          {notifications.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="text-center text-gray-500 p-8">
              Henüz bildiriminiz yok.
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
              {notifications.map(notif => (
                <div
                  key={notif.id}
                  className={`p-4 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors ${
                    !notif.isRead ? 'bg-blue-50' : ''
                  }`}
                  onClick={() => !notif.isRead && markAsRead(notif.id!)}
                >
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                    <div className="flex-1">
                      <h3 className={`font-semibold ${!notif.isRead ? 'text-gray-900' : 'text-gray-700'}`}>
                        {notif.title}
                      </h3>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">{notif.message}</p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">
                        {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(notif.createdAt!), {
                          addSuffix: true,
                          locale: tr,
                        })}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    {!notif.isRead && (
                      <span className="ml-4 inline-flex items-center justify-center w-2 h-2 bg-blue-600 rounded-full"></span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

Tüm değişiklikler tamamlandı. Özet:

## Tamamlanan Değişiklikler

### 1. Yeni Route Group: `(operations)`
- `(operations)/layout.tsx` oluşturuldu (useAuthGuard ile)
- `(operations)/page.tsx` oluşturuldu (dashboard)

### 2. Sayfalar Taşındı
- `(admin)/reporting` → `(operations)/reporting`
- `(admin)/pending-approvals` → `(operations)/pending-approvals`
- `(web)/notifications` → `(operations)/notifications`
- Tüm sayfalardaki linkler güncellendi (Admin Paneli → İşlemler Paneli)

### 3. Ana Sayfa Güncellendi
- 3. kart eklendi: "İşlemler Paneli" (Briefcase ikonu, mavi tema)
- Grid `md:grid-cols-3` olarak güncellendi
- Açıklama metni güncellendi

### 4. Admin Dashboard Temizlendi
- Raporlama kartı kaldırıldı
- Bekleyen Onaylar kartı kaldırıldı
- Bildirimler kartı kaldırıldı
- Grid `md:grid-cols-5` olarak güncellendi (5 kart: Form Tanımları, İş Akışı Tanımları, Tenant Roller, Tenant Kullanıcıları, Entegrasyon Ayarları)
- Gereksiz import'lar temizlendi

### 5. İşlemler Paneli Dashboard
- 3 kart: Raporlama, Bekleyen Onaylar, Bildirimler
- Badge'ler korundu (PendingApprovalsBadge, NotificationBell)
- Ana sayfaya dön ve çıkış yap linkleri eklendi

## Sonuç

Artık sistem 3 ayrı panel içeriyor:
1. Admin Paneli (`/dashboard`) - Tenant yönetim işlemleri (FirmAdmin)
2. İşlemler Paneli (`/operations`) - Operasyonel işlemler (Raporlama, Onaylar, Bildirimler)
3. Mobil Panel (`/job-order`) - Form doldurma işlemleri

Tüm değişiklikler tamamlandı ve lint hatası yok.

---

**User**

Dizin yapısını daha anlamlı olacak şekilde güncelledim. Bilgin olsun.

Bu arada bir form gönderdim. Sonra Manager rolüyle onay ekranında Geri Gönder dedim. Şimdi bu formu güncellemek için nasıl yapacağım? Güncelleme ekranına erişim kısmını bulamadım.

---

**Cursor**

Geri gönderilen formların güncelleme akışını inceliyorum:


Geri gönderilen formların listelenmesi ve güncelleme akışı eksik. İnceliyorum:


Geri gönderilen formların listelenmesi ve güncelleme akışı eksik. Öneri:

## Sorun
- Form doldurma ekranı (`/forms/[id]/fill`) `formInstanceId` ile güncelleme modunu destekliyor.
- Ancak geri gönderilen formları gösteren ve güncellemeye yönlendiren bir sayfa yok.

## Çözüm Önerisi

### 1. Backend: Geri gönderilen formları getiren query
Backend'de kullanıcının geri gönderilen formlarını getiren bir query ekleyin:

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Queries/Forms/GetReturnedFormsForUser.cs
[Authorize]
public class GetReturnedFormsForUserQuery : IRequest<List<FormInstanceDto>>
{
}

public class GetReturnedFormsForUserQueryHandler : IRequestHandler<GetReturnedFormsForUserQuery, List<FormInstanceDto>>
{
    // Kullanıcının oluşturduğu ve Returned status'ünde olan formları getir
    // currentStepOrder == 1 olanları (ilk adıma geri gönderilmiş)
}
```

### 2. Frontend: `/forms` sayfasını güncelleme
`/forms` sayfasında iki bölüm gösterin:
- Yeni form seçimi (mevcut)
- Geri gönderilen formlar (yeni)

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(mobile)/forms/page.tsx
const [returnedForms, setReturnedForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);

// Geri gönderilen formları yükle
const loadReturnedForms = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getReturnedForUser
    );
    setReturnedForms(response.data ?? []);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error loading returned forms:', error);
  }
};

// Geri gönderilen forma tıklandığında
const handleReturnedFormClick = (formInstance: FormInstanceDto) => {
  router.push(
    `/forms/${formInstance.formDefinitionId}/fill?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(formInstance.trackingNo)}&formInstanceId=${formInstance.id}`
  );
};
```

### 3. UI önerisi
Sayfada iki bölüm:
- "Yeni Form Doldur" — mevcut form tanımları
- "Geri Gönderilen Formlar" — güncellenebilir formlar (badge ile vurgulanabilir)

Bu değişiklikleri uygulamamı ister misiniz? Agent moduna geçerseniz uygulayabilirim.

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Queries/Forms/GetReturnedFormsForUser.cs
[Authorize]
public class GetReturnedFormsForUserQuery : IRequest<List<FormInstanceDto>>
{
}

public class GetReturnedFormsForUserQueryHandler : IRequestHandler<GetReturnedFormsForUserQuery, List<FormInstanceDto>>
{
    // Kullanıcının oluşturduğu ve Returned status'ünde olan formları getir
    // currentStepOrder == 1 olanları (ilk adıma geri gönderilmiş)
}
```

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(mobile)/forms/page.tsx
const [returnedForms, setReturnedForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);

// Geri gönderilen formları yükle
const loadReturnedForms = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getReturnedForUser
    );
    setReturnedForms(response.data ?? []);
  } catch (error) {

  }

// Geri gönderilen forma tıklandığında
```

---

**User**

Bir dakika. Güncelleme işini geri gönderilen formlarla sınırlamamak lazım. Chat'in başında bahsettiğim gibi şu not önemli:
=> Doldurulan formlar güncellenedebilmeli.İş akışı yoksa direk güncelleyebilir zaten ama onay akışı başlamışsa güncelleme kapalı olur ancak geri gönderilirse güncellenebilir ve tekrar onaya gönderilir.

---

**Cursor**

Güncelleme mantığını genişletmek gerekiyor. Mevcut durumu inceliyorum:


Güncelleme mantığını ve kullanıcının formlarını listeleme akışını düzeltmek gerekiyor. Öneriler:

## 1. Backend: UpdateFormInstance mantığını düzelt

Şu anki kod sadece `Returned && firstStepOrder` kontrolü yapıyor. Tüm `Returned` durumları güncellenebilir olmalı:

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Commands/Forms/UpdateFormInstance.cs
// Mevcut kontrol:
else if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Returned && formInstance.CurrentStepOrder == firstStepOrder)
{
    canUpdate = true;
}

// Olması gereken:
else if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Returned)
{
    // Geri gönderilmiş formlar her zaman güncellenebilir (hangi adıma geri gönderilmiş olursa olsun)
    canUpdate = true;
}
```

Ayrıca iş akışı olmayan formlar için de kontrol eklenmeli:

```csharp
// İş akışı yoksa (WorkflowDefinition null veya Steps boşsa) → Direk güncellenebilir
if (formInstance.WorkflowDefinition == null || !formInstance.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.Any())
{
    // İş akışı yok, direk güncellenebilir
    canUpdate = true;
}
else if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Draft)
{
    canUpdate = true;
}
else if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Returned)
{
    // Geri gönderilmiş formlar güncellenebilir
    canUpdate = true;
}
// InReview, Approved, Rejected → güncellenemez
```

## 2. Backend: Kullanıcının kendi formlarını getiren query

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Queries/Forms/GetMyForms.cs
[Authorize]
public class GetMyFormsQuery : IRequest<List<FormInstanceDto>>
{
    public string? TrackingNo { get; set; } // Opsiyonel filtreleme
}

public class GetMyFormsQueryHandler : IRequestHandler<GetMyFormsQuery, List<FormInstanceDto>>
{
    private readonly IFormInstanceRepository _repository;
    private readonly IUser _user;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;
    private readonly IIdentityService _identityService;

    public async Task<List<FormInstanceDto>> Handle(GetMyFormsQuery request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        // Kullanıcının oluşturduğu tüm formları getir
        var entities = await _repository.GetByCreatedByAsync(_user.Id, cancellationToken);
        
        // TrackingNo ile filtrele (varsa)
        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(request.TrackingNo))
        {
            entities = entities.Where(f => f.TrackingNo == request.TrackingNo).ToList();
        }
        
        var dtos = _mapper.Map<List<FormInstanceDto>>(entities);
        await PopulateUserNamesAsync(dtos, cancellationToken);
        
        return dtos;
    }
}
```

Repository metodunu ekle:

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Common/Interfaces/IFormInstanceRepository.cs
Task<List<FormInstance>> GetByCreatedByAsync(string createdBy, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

// Backend/src/Infrastructure/Repositories/FormInstanceRepository.cs
public async Task<List<FormInstance>> GetByCreatedByAsync(string createdBy, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
{
    return await _context.FormInstances
        .ForTenant(_tenantProvider)
        .Include(f => f.FormDefinition)
        .Include(f => f.WorkflowDefinition)
            .ThenInclude(w => w.Steps)
        .Where(f => f.CreatedBy == createdBy)
        .OrderByDescending(f => f.CreatedAt)
        .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
}
```

## 3. Frontend: `/forms` sayfasını güncelle

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(mobile)/forms/page.tsx
const [myForms, setMyForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);

const loadMyForms = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
      `${API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getMyForms}${trackingNo ? `?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}` : ''}`
    );
    setMyForms(response.data ?? []);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error loading my forms:', error);
  }
};

// Güncellenebilir form kontrolü
const canUpdateForm = (form: FormInstanceDto) => {
  // İş akışı yoksa → güncellenebilir
  if (!form.workflowDefinitionId || !form.workflowDefinition?.steps?.length) {
    return form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft;
  }
  
  // İş akışı varsa:
  // - Draft → güncellenebilir
  // - Returned → güncellenebilir
  // - Diğerleri → güncellenemez
  return form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft || 
         form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Returned;
};

// UI'da iki bölüm:
// 1. "Yeni Form Doldur" - Form tanımları
// 2. "Formlarım" - Kullanıcının oluşturduğu formlar (güncellenebilir olanlar vurgulanır)
```

Bu değişiklikleri uygulamamı ister misiniz? Agent moduna geçerseniz uygulayabilirim.

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Commands/Forms/UpdateFormInstance.cs
// Mevcut kontrol:
else if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Returned && formInstance.CurrentStepOrder == firstStepOrder)
{
    canUpdate = true;
}

// Olması gereken:
else if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Returned)
{
    // Geri gönderilmiş formlar her zaman güncellenebilir (hangi adıma geri gönderilmiş olursa olsun)
    canUpdate = true;
}
```

```csharp
// İş akışı yoksa (WorkflowDefinition null veya Steps boşsa) → Direk güncellenebilir
if (formInstance.WorkflowDefinition == null || !formInstance.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.Any())
{
    // İş akışı yok, direk güncellenebilir
    canUpdate = true;
}
else if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Draft)
{
    canUpdate = true;
}
else if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Returned)
{
    // Geri gönderilmiş formlar güncellenebilir
    canUpdate = true;
}
// InReview, Approved, Rejected → güncellenemez
```

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Queries/Forms/GetMyForms.cs
[Authorize]
public class GetMyFormsQuery : IRequest<List<FormInstanceDto>>
{
    public string? TrackingNo { get; set; } // Opsiyonel filtreleme
}

public class GetMyFormsQueryHandler : IRequestHandler<GetMyFormsQuery, List<FormInstanceDto>>
{
    private readonly IFormInstanceRepository _repository;
    private readonly IUser _user;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;
    private readonly IIdentityService _identityService;

    public async Task<List<FormInstanceDto>> Handle(GetMyFormsQuery request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        // Kullanıcının oluşturduğu tüm formları getir
        var entities = await _repository.GetByCreatedByAsync(_user.Id, cancellationToken);
        
        // TrackingNo ile filtrele (varsa)
        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(request.TrackingNo))
        {
            entities = entities.Where(f => f.TrackingNo == request.TrackingNo).ToList();
        }
        
        var dtos = _mapper.Map<List<FormInstanceDto>>(entities);
        await PopulateUserNamesAsync(dtos, cancellationToken);
        
        return dtos;
    }
}
```

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Common/Interfaces/IFormInstanceRepository.cs
Task<List<FormInstance>> GetByCreatedByAsync(string createdBy, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

// Backend/src/Infrastructure/Repositories/FormInstanceRepository.cs
public async Task<List<FormInstance>> GetByCreatedByAsync(string createdBy, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
{
    return await _context.FormInstances
        .ForTenant(_tenantProvider)
        .Include(f => f.FormDefinition)
        .Include(f => f.WorkflowDefinition)
            .ThenInclude(w => w.Steps)
        .Where(f => f.CreatedBy == createdBy)
        .OrderByDescending(f => f.CreatedAt)
        .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
}
```

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(mobile)/forms/page.tsx
const [myForms, setMyForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);

const loadMyForms = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
      `${API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getMyForms}${trackingNo ? `?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}` : ''}`
    );
    setMyForms(response.data ?? []);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error loading my forms:', error);
  }
};

// Güncellenebilir form kontrolü
const canUpdateForm = (form: FormInstanceDto) => {
  // İş akışı yoksa → güncellenebilir
  if (!form.workflowDefinitionId || !form.workflowDefinition?.steps?.length) {
    return form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft;
  }
  
  // İş akışı varsa:
  // - Draft → güncellenebilir
  // - Returned → güncellenebilir
  // - Diğerleri → güncellenemez
  return form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft || 
         form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Returned;
};

// UI'da iki bölüm:
// 1. "Yeni Form Doldur" - Form tanımları
// 2. "Formlarım" - Kullanıcının oluşturduğu formlar (güncellenebilir olanlar vurgulanır)
```

---

**User**

Bir düzeltme. Şu anki kod sadece Returned && firstStepOrder kontrolü yapıyor. Bu doğruydu. Tüm Returned durumları güncellenmemeli. Formu doldurana dönmüşse güncelleyebilir, diyelim 5 onay akışı var. 3 onay sırasındayken 2. onaya geri döndü. Formu dolduran kişi neden güncellesin ki. Güncellememesi lazım, çünkü form ondan çıkmış ve onay akışlarında ilerlemeye başlamış.

---

**Cursor**

Mantık doğru. Güncelleme kuralları:

1. İş akışı yoksa → Draft durumunda güncellenebilir
2. İş akışı varsa:
   - Draft → Güncellenebilir
   - Returned && currentStepOrder == firstStepOrder → Güncellenebilir (formu doldurana geri dönmüş)
   - Returned && currentStepOrder != firstStepOrder → Güncellenemez (başka bir adıma geri dönmüş)
   - InReview, Approved, Rejected → Güncellenemez

Mevcut kodu kontrol ediyorum:


Backend mantığı doğru. İyileştirmeler:

## 1. Backend: İş akışı olmayan durumları kontrol et

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Commands/Forms/UpdateFormInstance.cs
// Mevcut kod iş akışı olmayan durumları kontrol etmiyor

// Düzeltme:
var canUpdate = false;

// İş akışı yoksa → Direk güncellenebilir (Draft durumunda)
if (formInstance.WorkflowDefinition == null || !formInstance.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.Any())
{
    if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Draft)
    {
        canUpdate = true;
    }
}
else
{
    // İş akışı varsa
    var firstStepOrder = formInstance.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder).FirstOrDefault()?.StepOrder ?? 0;
    
    if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Draft)
    {
        canUpdate = true;
    }
    else if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Returned && formInstance.CurrentStepOrder == firstStepOrder)
    {
        // Can update if returned to first step (form creator)
        canUpdate = true;
    }
}
```

## 2. Frontend: İlk adım kontrolünü düzelt

Frontend'de `currentStepOrder === 1` kontrolü yanlış; ilk adımın stepOrder'ı her zaman 1 olmayabilir. Workflow'dan ilk adımı bulmalı:

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(mobile)/forms/[id]/fill/page.tsx
const loadFormInstance = async () => {
  if (!formInstanceId) return;

  try {
    const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formInstanceId)
    );
    const instance = response.data;

    // İş akışı yoksa
    if (!instance.workflowDefinitionId || !instance.workflowDefinition?.steps?.length) {
      const canUpdateForm = instance.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft;
      setCanUpdate(canUpdateForm);
      setIsUpdateMode(true);
    } else {
      // İş akışı varsa - ilk adımı bul
      const firstStepOrder = instance.workflowDefinition.steps
        .sort((a, b) => a.stepOrder - b.stepOrder)[0]?.stepOrder ?? 0;
      
      const canUpdateForm = instance.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft || 
        (instance.currentStatus === FormStatus.Returned && instance.currentStepOrder === firstStepOrder);
      setCanUpdate(canUpdateForm);
      setIsUpdateMode(true);
    }

    // Load existing form data
    if (instance.dataJson) {
      const existingData = typeof instance.dataJson === 'string' 
        ? JSON.parse(instance.dataJson) 
        : instance.dataJson;
      setFormData(existingData);
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error loading form instance:', error);
  }
};
```

## 3. Kullanıcının formlarını listeleme

Kullanıcının kendi formlarını görebilmesi için backend query ve frontend entegrasyonu gerekiyor (önceki mesajdaki gibi).

Özet:
- Backend: İş akışı olmayan durumları kontrol et
- Frontend: İlk adım kontrolünü workflow'dan al
- Kullanıcının formlarını listeleme: Backend query + Frontend entegrasyonu

Bu değişiklikleri uygulamamı ister misiniz? Agent moduna geçerseniz uygulayabilirim.

```csharp
// Backend/src/Application/Commands/Forms/UpdateFormInstance.cs
// Mevcut kod iş akışı olmayan durumları kontrol etmiyor

// Düzeltme:
var canUpdate = false;

// İş akışı yoksa → Direk güncellenebilir (Draft durumunda)
if (formInstance.WorkflowDefinition == null || !formInstance.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.Any())
{
    if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Draft)
    {
        canUpdate = true;
    }
}
else
{
    // İş akışı varsa
    var firstStepOrder = formInstance.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder).FirstOrDefault()?.StepOrder ?? 0;
    
    if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Draft)
    {
        canUpdate = true;
    }
    else if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Returned && formInstance.CurrentStepOrder == firstStepOrder)
    {
        // Can update if returned to first step (form creator)
        canUpdate = true;
    }
}
```

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(mobile)/forms/[id]/fill/page.tsx
const loadFormInstance = async () => {
  if (!formInstanceId) return;

  try {
    const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formInstanceId)
    );
    const instance = response.data;

    // İş akışı yoksa
    if (!instance.workflowDefinitionId || !instance.workflowDefinition?.steps?.length) {
      const canUpdateForm = instance.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft;
      setCanUpdate(canUpdateForm);
      setIsUpdateMode(true);
    } else {
      // İş akışı varsa - ilk adımı bul
      const firstStepOrder = instance.workflowDefinition.steps
        .sort((a, b) => a.stepOrder - b.stepOrder)[0]?.stepOrder ?? 0;
      
      const canUpdateForm = instance.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft || 
        (instance.currentStatus === FormStatus.Returned && instance.currentStepOrder === firstStepOrder);
      setCanUpdate(canUpdateForm);
      setIsUpdateMode(true);
    }

    // Load existing form data
    if (instance.dataJson) {
      const existingData = typeof instance.dataJson === 'string' 
        ? JSON.parse(instance.dataJson) 
        : instance.dataJson;
      setFormData(existingData);
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error loading form instance:', error);
  }
};
```

Backend ve frontend değişikliklerini uyguluyoruz:


```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Exceptions;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;
using MovithForms.Domain.Enums;
using System.Text.Json;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Commands.Forms;

[Authorize]
public class UpdateFormInstanceCommand : IRequest<FormInstanceDto>
{
    public Guid FormInstanceId { get; set; }
    public Dictionary<string, object> DataJson { get; set; } = new();
    public string UpdatedBy { get; set; } = default!;
}

public class UpdateFormInstanceCommandHandler : IRequestHandler<UpdateFormInstanceCommand, FormInstanceDto>
{
    private readonly IFormInstanceRepository _repository;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;

    public UpdateFormInstanceCommandHandler(
        IFormInstanceRepository repository, 
        IMapper mapper)
    {
        _repository = repository;
        _mapper = mapper;
    }

    public async Task<FormInstanceDto> Handle(UpdateFormInstanceCommand request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var formInstance = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(request.FormInstanceId, cancellationToken);
        if (formInstance == null)
            throw new KeyNotFoundException($"FormInstance with ID {request.FormInstanceId} not found.");

        // Check if form can be updated
        var canUpdate = false;

        // İş akışı yoksa → Direk güncellenebilir (Draft durumunda)
        if (formInstance.WorkflowDefinition == null || !formInstance.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.Any())
        {
            if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Draft)
            {
                canUpdate = true;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            // İş akışı varsa
            var firstStepOrder = formInstance.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder).FirstOrDefault()?.StepOrder ?? 0;

            if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Draft)
            {
                canUpdate = true;
            }
            else if (formInstance.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Returned && formInstance.CurrentStepOrder == firstStepOrder)
            {
                // Can update if returned to first step (form creator)
                canUpdate = true;
            }
        }

        if (!canUpdate)
        {
            throw new InvalidOperationException(
                $"Form can only be updated when status is Draft or Returned (at first step). Current status: {formInstance.CurrentStatus}, Step: {formInstance.CurrentStepOrder}");
        }

        // Save submission data
        var submissionData = new FormSubmissionData
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            FormInstanceId = formInstance.Id,
            FormInstance = formInstance,
            DataJson = JsonSerializer.Serialize(request.DataJson),
            SubmittedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
            SubmittedBy = request.UpdatedBy
        };

        formInstance.ModifiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
        formInstance.ModifiedBy = request.UpdatedBy;

        // Use the same method as SubmitFormData
        await _repository.SubmitFormDataWithSubmissionAsync(formInstance, submissionData, cancellationToken);
        await _repository.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
        
        return _mapper.Map<FormInstanceDto>(formInstance);
    }
}


```

```csharp
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;

public interface IFormInstanceRepository : IBaseRepo<FormInstance>
{
    Task<FormInstance?> GetByIdAsync(Guid id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    Task<List<FormInstance>> GetByTrackingNoAsync(string trackingNo, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    Task<List<FormInstance>> GetPendingApprovalsByRoleAsync(string role, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    Task<List<FormInstance>> GetByCreatedByAsync(string createdBy, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    Task SubmitFormDataWithSubmissionAsync(FormInstance entity, FormSubmissionData submissionData, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    Task PerformWorkflowActionWithActionAsync(FormInstance entity, WorkflowAction workflowAction, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
}


```

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Domain.Entities;
using MovithForms.Domain.Enums;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data;
using MovithForms.Infrastructure.Data.Extensions;

namespace MovithForms.Infrastructure.Repositories;

public class FormInstanceRepository : BaseRepo<FormInstance>, IFormInstanceRepository
{
    private readonly ITenantProvider _tenantProvider;

    public FormInstanceRepository(ApplicationDbContext context, ITenantProvider tenantProvider) : base(context)
    {
        _tenantProvider = tenantProvider;
    }

    public async Task<FormInstance?> GetByIdAsync(Guid id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        return await _context.FormInstances
            .ForTenant(_tenantProvider)
            .Include(f => f.FormDefinition)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowDefinition)
                .ThenInclude(w => w.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder))
            .Include(f => f.SubmissionData.OrderByDescending(s => s.SubmittedAt))
            .Include(f => f.Attachments)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowActions.OrderBy(a => a.PerformedAt))
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(e => e.Id == id, cancellationToken);
    }

    public async Task<List<FormInstance>> GetByTrackingNoAsync(string trackingNo, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        return await _context.FormInstances
            .ForTenant(_tenantProvider)
            .Include(f => f.FormDefinition)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowDefinition)
                .ThenInclude(w => w.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder))
            .Include(f => f.SubmissionData.OrderByDescending(s => s.SubmittedAt))
            .Include(f => f.Attachments)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowActions.OrderBy(a => a.PerformedAt))
            .Where(e => e.TrackingNo == trackingNo)
            .OrderByDescending(e => e.CreatedAt)
            .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
    }

    public async Task<List<FormInstance>> GetPendingApprovalsByRoleAsync(string role, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        return await _context.FormInstances
            .ForTenant(_tenantProvider)
            .Include(f => f.FormDefinition)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowDefinition)
                .ThenInclude(w => w.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder))
            .Include(f => f.SubmissionData.OrderByDescending(s => s.SubmittedAt))
            .Include(f => f.Attachments)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowActions.OrderBy(a => a.PerformedAt))
            .Where(e => e.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.InReview || e.CurrentStatus == FormStatus.Returned)
            .Where(e => e.WorkflowDefinition.Steps.Any(s => s.StepOrder == e.CurrentStepOrder && s.Role == role))
            .OrderByDescending(e => e.CreatedAt)
            .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
    }

    public async Task<List<FormInstance>> GetByCreatedByAsync(string createdBy, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        return await _context.FormInstances
            .ForTenant(_tenantProvider)
            .Include(f => f.FormDefinition)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowDefinition)
                .ThenInclude(w => w.Steps.OrderBy(s => s.StepOrder))
            .Include(f => f.SubmissionData.OrderByDescending(s => s.SubmittedAt))
            .Include(f => f.Attachments)
            .Include(f => f.WorkflowActions.OrderBy(a => a.PerformedAt))
            .Where(f => f.CreatedBy == createdBy)
            .OrderByDescending(f => f.CreatedAt)
            .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
    }

    public Task SubmitFormDataWithSubmissionAsync(FormInstance entity, FormSubmissionData submissionData, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        // Yeni submission data'yı ekle
        entity.SubmissionData.Add(submissionData);
        _context.Entry(submissionData).State = EntityState.Added;

        // Entity'nin kendisini Modified olarak işaretle
        var entityEntry = _context.Entry(entity);
        entityEntry.State = EntityState.Modified;

        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    public Task PerformWorkflowActionWithActionAsync(FormInstance entity, WorkflowAction workflowAction, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        // Yeni workflow action'ı ekle
        entity.WorkflowActions.Add(workflowAction);
        _context.Entry(workflowAction).State = EntityState.Added;

        // Entity'nin kendisini Modified olarak işaretle
        var entityEntry = _context.Entry(entity);
        entityEntry.State = EntityState.Modified;

        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }
}


```

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Interfaces;
using MovithForms.Application.Common.Security;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;

namespace MovithForms.Application.Queries.Forms;

[Authorize]
public class GetMyFormsQuery : IRequest<List<FormInstanceDto>>
{
    public string? TrackingNo { get; set; }
}

public class GetMyFormsQueryHandler : IRequestHandler<GetMyFormsQuery, List<FormInstanceDto>>
{
    private readonly IFormInstanceRepository _repository;
    private readonly IUser _user;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;
    private readonly IIdentityService _identityService;

    public GetMyFormsQueryHandler(
        IFormInstanceRepository repository,
        IUser user,
        IMapper mapper,
        IIdentityService identityService)
    {
        _repository = repository;
        _user = user;
        _mapper = mapper;
        _identityService = identityService;
    }

    public async Task<List<FormInstanceDto>> Handle(GetMyFormsQuery request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_user.Id))
            throw new UnauthorizedAccessException("User must be authenticated.");

        // Kullanıcının oluşturduğu tüm formları getir
        var entities = await _repository.GetByCreatedByAsync(_user.Id, cancellationToken);

        // TrackingNo ile filtrele (varsa)
        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(request.TrackingNo))
        {
            entities = entities.Where(f => f.TrackingNo == request.TrackingNo).ToList();
        }

        var dtos = _mapper.Map<List<FormInstanceDto>>(entities);

        // Batch olarak tüm username'leri doldur
        await PopulateUserNamesAsync(dtos, cancellationToken);

        return dtos;
    }

    private async Task PopulateUserNamesAsync(List<FormInstanceDto> dtos, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        // Tüm form instance'lardan unique user ID'leri topla
        var userIds = new HashSet<string>();

        foreach (var dto in dtos)
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(dto.CreatedBy))
                userIds.Add(dto.CreatedBy);

            foreach (var action in dto.WorkflowActions)
            {
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(action.PerformedBy))
                    userIds.Add(action.PerformedBy);
            }
        }

        if (userIds.Count == 0) return;

        // Tek bir batch sorgu ile tüm username'leri al
        var userNames = await _identityService.GetUserNamesAsync(userIds);

        // Tüm DTO'lara set et
        foreach (var dto in dtos)
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(dto.CreatedBy) &&
                userNames.TryGetValue(dto.CreatedBy, out var createdByUserName))
            {
                dto.CreatedByUserName = createdByUserName;
            }

            foreach (var action in dto.WorkflowActions)
            {
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(action.PerformedBy) &&
                    userNames.TryGetValue(action.PerformedBy, out var performedByUserName))
                {
                    action.PerformedByUserName = performedByUserName;
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

```

Backend endpoint'ini ekleyip frontend'i güncelliyoruz:


```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using MovithForms.Application.Commands.Forms;
using MovithForms.Application.DTOs;
using MovithForms.Application.Queries.Forms;
using MovithForms.Application.Queries.Workflows;
using MovithForms.Domain.Constants;
using System.Security.Claims;

namespace MovithForms.Web.Endpoints;

public class Forms : EndpointGroupBase
{
    public override void Map(WebApplication app)
    {
        app.MapGroup(this)
            .RequireAuthorization()
            .MapPost(Start, nameof(Start))
            .MapGet(GetById, "{id:guid}")
            .MapPost(SubmitFormData, "{id:guid}/submit")
            .MapPut(Update, "{id:guid}/update")
            .MapPost(PerformAction, "{id:guid}/actions")
            .MapGet(GetByTrackingNo, "GetByTrackingNo/{trackingNo}")
            .MapGet(GetPendingApprovals, nameof(GetPendingApprovals))
            .MapGet(GetMyForms, nameof(GetMyForms));
    }
    
    public async Task<IResult> Start(ISender sender, StartFormInstanceCommand command, ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        command.CreatedBy = user.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) ?? "System";
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Created($"/api/Forms/{result.Id}", result);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> GetById(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetFormInstanceQuery query)
    {
        var result = await sender.Send(query);
        return result != null ? Results.Ok(result) : Results.NotFound();
    }
    
    public async Task<IResult> SubmitFormData(ISender sender, Guid id, SubmitFormDataCommand command, ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        if (id != command.FormInstanceId)
            return Results.BadRequest();

        command.SubmittedBy = user.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) ?? "System";
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> Update(ISender sender, Guid id, UpdateFormInstanceCommand command, ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        if (id != command.FormInstanceId)
            return Results.BadRequest();

        command.UpdatedBy = user.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) ?? "System";
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }

    public async Task<IResult> PerformAction(ISender sender, Guid id, PerformWorkflowActionCommand command, ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        if (id != command.FormInstanceId)
            return Results.BadRequest();

        command.PerformedBy = user.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) ?? "System";
        var result = await sender.Send(command);
        return Results.Ok(result);
    }
    
    public Task<List<FormInstanceDto>> GetByTrackingNo(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetFormsByTrackingNoQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }

    public Task<List<FormInstanceDto>> GetPendingApprovals(ISender sender, [AsParameters] GetPendingApprovalsQuery query)
    {
        return sender.Send(query);
    }
}

```

```typescript
export const API_ENDPOINTS = {
  auth: {
    login: '/auth/login', // Route Handler
  },
  users: {
    getRoles: '/users/get-roles',
  },
  formDefinitions: {
    getAll: '/form-definitions',
    getForUser: '/form-definitions/for-user',
    getById: (id: string) => `/form-definitions/${id}`,
    create: '/form-definitions',
    update: (id: string) => `/form-definitions/${id}`,
    delete: (id: string) => `/form-definitions/${id}`,
  },
  workflowDefinitions: {
    getAll: '/workflow-definitions',
    getById: (id: string) => `/workflow-definitions/${id}`,
    create: '/workflow-definitions',
    update: (id: string) => `/workflow-definitions/${id}`,
    delete: (id: string) => `/workflow-definitions/${id}`,
  },
  forms: {
    start: '/forms/start',
    getById: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}`,
    submit: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}/submit`,
    performAction: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}/actions`,
    getByTrackingNo: (trackingNo: string) => `/forms/by-tracking-no/${trackingNo}`,
    update: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}/update`,
    getPendingApprovals: '/forms/pending-approvals',
    getMyForms: '/forms/my-forms',
  },
  files: {
    upload: '/files/upload',
    get: (filePath: string) => `/files/${filePath}`,
  },
  tenant: {
    roles: '/tenant/roles',
    roleById: (id: string) => `/tenant/roles/${id}`,
    users: '/tenant/users',
    userRoles: (userId: string) => `/tenant/users/${userId}/roles`,
    userNotificationChannels: (userId: string) => `/tenant/users/${userId}/notification-channels`,
    userSystemRoles: (userId: string) => `/tenant/users/${userId}/system-roles`,
    integrationSettings: '/tenant/integration-settings',
    applicationSettings: '/tenant/application-settings',
  },
  notifications: {
    getAll: '/notifications',
    getUnreadCount: '/notifications/unread-count',
    markAllAsRead: '/notifications/mark-all-read',
    markAsRead: '/notifications/mark-read',
  },
};
```
