```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormInstanceDto, FormStatus } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard, Edit, Eye } from 'lucide-react';

const statusLabels: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'Taslak',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'İncelemede',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'Onaylandı',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'Reddedildi',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'Geri Gönderildi',
};

const statusClasses: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800',
};

export default function MyFormsPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [myForms, setMyForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadMyForms();
  }, []);

  const loadMyForms = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getMyForms
      );
      setMyForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading my forms:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleEditForm = (formInstance: FormInstanceDto) => {
    router.push(
      `/forms/${formInstance.formDefinitionId}/fill?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(formInstance.trackingNo)}&formInstanceId=${formInstance.id}`
    );
  };

  const handleViewDetails = async (formId: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading form details:', error);
    }
  };

  // Güncellenebilir form kontrolü
  const canUpdateForm = (form: FormInstanceDto) => {
    // İş akışı yoksa → güncellenebilir
    if (!form.workflowDefinitionId || !form.workflowDefinition?.steps?.length) {
      return form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft;
    }

    // İş akışı varsa:
    // - Draft → güncellenebilir
    // - Returned && firstStepOrder → güncellenebilir
    const firstStepOrder = form.workflowDefinition.steps
      .sort((a, b) => a.stepOrder - b.stepOrder)[0]?.stepOrder ?? 0;

    return form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft ||
      (form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Returned && form.currentStepOrder === firstStepOrder);
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-lg">Yükleniyor...</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-4">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/forms"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Form Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>

        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Formlarım</h1>

        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* Form List */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-2">
            {myForms.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-8 text-center text-gray-500">
                Henüz form doldurmadınız.
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {myForms.map((formInstance) => {
                  const canUpdate = canUpdateForm(formInstance);
                  return (
                    <div
                      key={formInstance.id}
                      className={`bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md p-6 border-2 ${
                        canUpdate ? 'border-amber-300 hover:border-amber-400' : 'border-gray-200'
                      } transition-all`}
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                        <div className="flex-1">
                          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                            {formInstance.formDefinitionName}
                          </h3>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-2">
                            <span
                              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[formInstance.currentStatus]}`}
                            >
                              {statusLabels[formInstance.currentStatus]}
                            </span>
                            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                              Takip No: {formInstance.trackingNo}
                            </p>
                          </div>
                          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                            Oluşturulma: {new Date(formInstance.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
                              year: 'numeric',
                              month: 'long',
                              day: 'numeric',
                              hour: '2-digit',
                              minute: '2-digit'
                            })}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex gap-2 ml-4">
                          {canUpdate ? (
                            <button
                              onClick={() => handleEditForm(formInstance)}
                              className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-amber-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-amber-600 transition-colors"
                            >
                              <Edit className="w-4 h-4" />
                              <span>Düzenle</span>
                            </button>
                          ) : (
                            <button
                              onClick={() => handleViewDetails(formInstance.id)}
                              className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-colors"
                            >
                              <Eye className="w-4 h-4" />
                              <span>Detay</span>
                            </button>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      {canUpdate && (
                        <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-amber-600">
                          Bu form güncellenebilir
                        </p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Detail Panel */}
          {selectedForm && (
            <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6 sticky top-4">
              <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Form Detayları</h2>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setSelectedForm(null)}
                  className="text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
                >
                  ✕
                </button>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Form Bilgileri</h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-1">
                    <span className="font-medium">Form:</span> {selectedForm.formDefinitionName}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-1">
                    <span className="font-medium">Takip No:</span> {selectedForm.trackingNo}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-1">
                    <span className="font-medium">Durum:</span>{' '}
                    <span className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[selectedForm.currentStatus]}`}>
                      {statusLabels[selectedForm.currentStatus]}
                    </span>
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                    <span className="font-medium">Oluşturulma:</span>{' '}
                    {new Date(selectedForm.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
                      year: 'numeric',
                      month: 'long',
                      day: 'numeric',
                      hour: '2-digit',
                      minute: '2-digit'
                    })}
                  </p>
                </div>

                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Form Verileri</h3>
                  <pre className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded overflow-auto text-xs max-h-60">
                    {JSON.stringify(selectedForm.dataJson, null, 2)}
                  </pre>
                </div>

                {selectedForm.attachments && selectedForm.attachments.length > 0 && (
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Ekler</h3>
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      {selectedForm.attachments.map((attachment) => {
                        const fileUrl = attachment.filePath.replace('/api/Files/', '/api/files/');
                        return (
                          <a
                            key={attachment.id}
                            href={fileUrl}
                            target="_blank"
                            rel="noopener noreferrer"
                            className="block text-indigo-600 hover:underline text-sm"
                          >
                            {attachment.fileName}
                          </a>
                        );
                      })}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {selectedForm.workflowActions && selectedForm.workflowActions.length > 0 && (
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">İş Akışı Geçmişi</h3>
                    <div className="space-y-2 max-h-60 overflow-auto">
                      {selectedForm.workflowActions
                        .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.performedAt).getTime() - new Date(a.performedAt).getTime())
                        .map((action) => (
                          <div key={action.id} className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-3 text-sm">
                            <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || action.actionType}</p>
                            <p className="text-gray-500 text-xs">
                              {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} -{' '}
                              {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                            </p>
                            {action.comment && (
                              <p className="text-gray-600 text-xs mt-1">{action.comment}</p>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from '@/lib/api/types';

export default function JobOrderPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [trackingNoLabel, setTrackingNoLabel] = useState('İş Emri No');
  const [loadingSettings, setLoadingSettings] = useState(true);
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    loadTenantSettings();
  }, []);

  const loadTenantSettings = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: TenantApplicationSettingsDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.tenant.applicationSettings
      );
      if (response.data?.trackingNoLabel) {
        setTrackingNoLabel(response.data.trackingNoLabel);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading tenant settings:', error);
      // Use default label if error
    } finally {
      setLoadingSettings(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!trackingNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    // Navigate to form selection with tracking no
    router.push(`/forms?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-6 text-gray-900">
            {trackingNoLabel} Girişi
          </h1>
          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
            <div>
              <label htmlFor="trackingNo" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                {trackingNoLabel}
              </label>
              <input
                id="trackingNo"
                type="text"
                value={trackingNo}
                onChange={(e) => setTrackingNo(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full px-4 py-3 text-lg border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                placeholder={`${trackingNoLabel} numarasını girin`}
                required
                autoFocus
              />
            </div>
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading || !trackingNo.trim()}
              className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-4 text-lg font-semibold rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
            >
              {loading ? 'Yükleniyor...' : 'Devam Et'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>
        <div className="mt-8 text-center">
          <Link
            href="/forms"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Form Paneline Dön
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>      
    </div>
  );
}

```

Form doldurma sayfasındaki linki güncelliyoruz. TrackingNo ile form seçimi için yeni bir route oluşturuyoruz:


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormDefinitionDto, TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';

export default function FormSelectionPage() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const router = useRouter();
  const trackingNo = searchParams.get('trackingNo') || '';
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormDefinitionDto[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [trackingNoLabel, setTrackingNoLabel] = useState('İş Emri No');

  useEffect(() => {
    loadTenantSettings();
    if (trackingNo) {
      loadFormsForUser();
    }
  }, [trackingNo]);

  const loadTenantSettings = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: TenantApplicationSettingsDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.tenant.applicationSettings
      );
      if (response.data?.trackingNoLabel) {
        setTrackingNoLabel(response.data.trackingNoLabel);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading tenant settings:', error);
    }
  };

  const loadFormsForUser = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormDefinitionDto[] }>(
        `${API_ENDPOINTS.formDefinitions.getForUser}?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`
      );
      setForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading forms:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSelectForm = (formId: string) => {
    router.push(`/forms/${formId}/fill?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`);
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-lg">Yükleniyor...</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-4">
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/job-order"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            {trackingNoLabel} Girişi
          </Link>
        </div>
        <div className="mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Form Seçimi</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600">{trackingNoLabel}: {trackingNo}</p>
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-4">
          {forms.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-8 text-center text-gray-500">
              Aktif form bulunamadı.
            </div>
          ) : (
            forms.map((form) => (
              <button
                key={form.id}
                onClick={() => handleSelectForm(form.id)}
                className="w-full bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md p-6 text-left hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow"
              >
                <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">{form.name}</h2>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Kod: {form.code}</p>
              </button>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useParams, useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormDefinitionDto, FormSchema, FormFieldSchema, FormInstanceDto, WorkflowDefinitionDto, TableColumnSchema, FormStatus } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';

export default function FormFillPage() {
  const params = useParams();
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const router = useRouter();
  const formId = params.id as string;
  const trackingNo = searchParams.get('trackingNo') || '';
  const formInstanceId = searchParams.get('formInstanceId') || '';

  const [formDefinition, setFormDefinition] = useState<FormDefinitionDto | null>(null);
  const [formSchema, setFormSchema] = useState<FormSchema | null>(null);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<Record<string, any>>({});
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [files, setFiles] = useState<File[]>([]);
  const [workflowDefinitionId, setWorkflowDefinitionId] = useState<string>('');
  const [isUpdateMode, setIsUpdateMode] = useState(false);
  const [canUpdate, setCanUpdate] = useState(false);
  // Tablo içindeki dosyalar için state: fieldId -> rowIndex -> columnId -> File[]
  const [tableFiles, setTableFiles] = useState<Record<string, Record<number, Record<string, File[]>>>>({});

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadData = async () => {
      setLoading(true);
      await Promise.all([loadFormDefinition(), loadWorkflowDefinition()]);
      if (formInstanceId) {
        await loadFormInstance();
      }
      setLoading(false);
    };

    loadData();
  }, [formId, formInstanceId]);

  // Initialize table fields with default rows and minimum rows
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!formSchema) return;

    setFormData((prev) => {
      const updated = { ...prev };
      let changed = false;

      formSchema.fields.forEach((field) => {
        if (field.type === 'table') {
          let tableData = updated[field.id] || [];
          const originalLength = tableData.length;

          // Initialize with default rows if empty
          if (tableData.length === 0 && field.defaultRows) {
            tableData = Array(field.defaultRows).fill(null).map(() => ({}));
          }

          // Ensure minimum rows
          while (tableData.length < (field.minRows || 0)) {
            tableData = [...tableData, {}];
          }

          if (tableData.length !== originalLength) {
            updated[field.id] = tableData;
            changed = true;
          }
        }
      });

      return changed ? updated : prev;
    });
  }, [formSchema]);

  const loadFormDefinition = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormDefinitionDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.formDefinitions.getById(formId)
      );
      setFormDefinition(response.data);
      const schema = JSON.parse(response.data.schemaJson) as FormSchema;
      setFormSchema(schema);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading form:', error);
    } finally {
    }
  };

  const loadWorkflowDefinition = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: WorkflowDefinitionDto[] }>(
        `${API_ENDPOINTS.workflowDefinitions.getAll}?activeOnly=true`
      );

      const workflow = response.data.find((w) => w.formDefinitionId === formId);
      if (workflow) {
        setWorkflowDefinitionId(workflow.id);
      } else {
        console.error('Form için aktif iş akışı bulunamadı');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Workflow yüklenirken hata:', error);
    }
  };

  const loadFormInstance = async () => {
    if (!formInstanceId) return;

    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formInstanceId)
      );
      const instance = response.data;

      // Check if form can be updated
      let canUpdateForm = false;

      // İş akışı yoksa → Direk güncellenebilir (Draft durumunda)
      if (!instance.workflowDefinitionId || !instance.workflowDefinition?.steps?.length) {
        canUpdateForm = instance.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft;
      } else {
        // İş akışı varsa - ilk adımı bul
        const firstStepOrder = instance.workflowDefinition.steps
          .sort((a, b) => a.stepOrder - b.stepOrder)[0]?.stepOrder ?? 0;

        if (instance.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft) {
          canUpdateForm = true;
        } else if (instance.currentStatus === FormStatus.Returned && instance.currentStepOrder === firstStepOrder) {
          // Can update if returned to first step (form creator)
          canUpdateForm = true;
        }
      }

      setCanUpdate(canUpdateForm);
      setIsUpdateMode(true);

      // Load existing form data
      if (instance.dataJson) {
        const existingData = typeof instance.dataJson === 'string' 
          ? JSON.parse(instance.dataJson) 
          : instance.dataJson;
        setFormData(existingData);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading form instance:', error);
    }
  };

  const handleFieldChange = (fieldId: string, value: any) => {
    setFormData((prev) => ({ ...prev, [fieldId]: value }));
  };

  const handleTableRowChange = (fieldId: string, rowIndex: number, columnId: string, value: any) => {
    setFormData((prev) => {
      const tableData = prev[fieldId] || [];
      const updatedTableData = [...tableData];
      if (!updatedTableData[rowIndex]) {
        updatedTableData[rowIndex] = {};
      }
      updatedTableData[rowIndex][columnId] = value;
      return { ...prev, [fieldId]: updatedTableData };
    });
  };

  const addTableRow = (fieldId: string, field: FormFieldSchema) => {
    setFormData((prev) => {
      const tableData = prev[fieldId] || [];
      if (field.maxRows && tableData.length >= field.maxRows) {
        return prev; // Max row limit reached
      }
      return { ...prev, [fieldId]: [...tableData, {}] };
    });
  };

  const removeTableRow = (fieldId: string, rowIndex: number, field: FormFieldSchema) => {
    setFormData((prev) => {
      const tableData = prev[fieldId] || [];
      if (field.minRows && tableData.length <= field.minRows) {
        return prev; // Can't remove below min rows
      }
      const updatedTableData = tableData.filter((_: any, index: number) => index !== rowIndex);
      return { ...prev, [fieldId]: updatedTableData };
    });

    // Dosyaları da temizle ve satır indekslerini yeniden düzenle
    setTableFiles((prev) => {
      const fieldFiles = prev[fieldId] || {};
      const updated: Record<number, Record<string, File[]>> = {};
      
      Object.keys(fieldFiles).forEach((key) => {
        const idx = parseInt(key);
        if (idx < rowIndex) {
          // Önceki satırlar olduğu gibi kalır
          updated[idx] = fieldFiles[idx];
        } else if (idx > rowIndex) {
          // Sonraki satırlar bir yukarı kayar
          updated[idx - 1] = fieldFiles[idx];
        }
        // rowIndex'teki satır silinir
      });
      
      return { ...prev, [fieldId]: updated };
    });
  };

  const handleTableFileChange = (fieldId: string, rowIndex: number, columnId: string, fileList: FileList | null) => {
    if (!fileList || fileList.length === 0) return;

    const filesArray = Array.from(fileList);
    
    // Dosyaları state'e kaydet
    setTableFiles((prev) => {
      const fieldFiles = prev[fieldId] || {};
      const rowFiles = fieldFiles[rowIndex] || {};
      return {
        ...prev,
        [fieldId]: {
          ...fieldFiles,
          [rowIndex]: {
            ...rowFiles,
            [columnId]: filesArray,
          },
        },
      };
    });

    // Dosya isimlerini formData'ya kaydet
    setFormData((prev) => {
      const tableData = prev[fieldId] || [];
      const updatedTableData = [...tableData];
      if (!updatedTableData[rowIndex]) {
        updatedTableData[rowIndex] = {};
      }
      updatedTableData[rowIndex][columnId] = filesArray.map((f) => f.name).join(', ');
      return { ...prev, [fieldId]: updatedTableData };
    });
  };

  const handleFileChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    if (e.target.files) {
      setFiles(Array.from(e.target.files));
    }
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();

    // Validate form fields
    if (!formSchema) {
      alert('Form şeması yüklenemedi.');
      return;
    }

    const errors: string[] = [];

    formSchema.fields.forEach((field) => {
      if (field.required) {
        if (field.type === 'table') {
          // Tablo için validasyon: en az bir satırda en az bir hücre dolu olmalı
          const tableData = formData[field.id] || [];
          let hasData = false;

          for (const row of tableData) {
            if (row && typeof row === 'object') {
              // En az bir hücrenin dolu olduğunu kontrol et
              const hasValue = Object.values(row).some((value: any) => {
                if (value === null || value === undefined) return false;
                if (typeof value === 'string' && value.trim() === '') return false;
                if (typeof value === 'number' && isNaN(value)) return false;
                if (typeof value === 'boolean') return value; // checkbox için true olması gerekiyor
                return true;
              });
              if (hasValue) {
                hasData = true;
                break;
              }
            }
          }

          if (!hasData) {
            errors.push(`${field.label} alanı için en az bir satır doldurulmalıdır.`);
          }
        } else if (field.type !== 'checkbox') {
          // Diğer alanlar için standart kontrol (checkbox hariç)
          const value = formData[field.id];
          if (value === undefined || value === null || value === '') {
            errors.push(`${field.label} alanı zorunludur.`);
          }
        }
      }
    });

    // Hata varsa göster ve submit etme
    if (errors.length > 0) {
      alert('Lütfen zorunlu alanları doldurun:\n\n' + errors.join('\n'));
      return;
    }

    setSubmitting(true);

    try {
      // If updating existing form instance
      if (isUpdateMode && formInstanceId && canUpdate) {
        // Update form instance
        await routeHandlerClient.put(API_ENDPOINTS.forms.update(formInstanceId), {
          formInstanceId,
          dataJson: formData,
          updatedBy: 'operator',
        });

        // Upload new files (form level files)
        for (const file of files) {
          const formData = new FormData();
          formData.append('file', file);
          formData.append('formInstanceId', formInstanceId);
          await routeHandlerClient.post(API_ENDPOINTS.files.upload, formData);
        }

        // Upload new table files
        for (const [fieldId, fieldFiles] of Object.entries(tableFiles)) {
          for (const [rowIndexStr, columnFiles] of Object.entries(fieldFiles)) {
            const rowIndex = parseInt(rowIndexStr);
            for (const [columnId, filesArray] of Object.entries(columnFiles)) {
              for (const file of filesArray as File[]) {
                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('file', file);
                formData.append('formInstanceId', formInstanceId);
                formData.append('fieldId', fieldId);
                formData.append('rowIndex', rowIndex.toString());
                formData.append('columnId', columnId);
                await routeHandlerClient.post(API_ENDPOINTS.files.upload, formData);
              }
            }
          }
        }

        router.push(`/forms/success?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`);
        return;
      }

      // Create new form instance
      if (!workflowDefinitionId) {
        alert('Form için aktif iş akışı bulunamadı.');
        setSubmitting(false);
        return;
      }

      // Start form instance
      const startResponse = await routeHandlerClient.post<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(API_ENDPOINTS.forms.start, {
        formDefinitionId: formId,
        workflowDefinitionId,
        trackingNo,
      });

      const newFormInstanceId = startResponse.data?.id;

      // Upload files (form level files)
      for (const file of files) {
        const formData = new FormData();
        formData.append('file', file);
        formData.append('formInstanceId', newFormInstanceId);
        await routeHandlerClient.post(API_ENDPOINTS.files.upload, formData);
      }

      // Upload table files
      for (const [fieldId, fieldFiles] of Object.entries(tableFiles)) {
        for (const [rowIndexStr, columnFiles] of Object.entries(fieldFiles)) {
          const rowIndex = parseInt(rowIndexStr);
          for (const [columnId, filesArray] of Object.entries(columnFiles)) {
            for (const file of filesArray as File[]) {
              const formData = new FormData();
              formData.append('file', file);
              formData.append('formInstanceId', newFormInstanceId);
              formData.append('fieldId', fieldId);
              formData.append('rowIndex', rowIndex.toString());
              formData.append('columnId', columnId);
              await routeHandlerClient.post(API_ENDPOINTS.files.upload, formData);
            }
          }
        }
      }

      // Submit form data
      await routeHandlerClient.post(API_ENDPOINTS.forms.submit(newFormInstanceId), {
        formInstanceId: newFormInstanceId,
        dataJson: formData,
        submittedBy: 'operator',
      });

      router.push(`/forms/success?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error submitting form:', error);
      alert('Form gönderilirken bir hata oluştu.');
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  const renderField = (field: FormFieldSchema) => {
    switch (field.type) {
      case 'text':
        return (
          <input
            type="text"
            value={formData[field.id] || ''}
            onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, e.target.value)}
            required={field.required}
            className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            placeholder={field.label}
          />
        );
      case 'number':
        return (
          <input
            type="number"
            value={formData[field.id] || ''}
            onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, parseFloat(e.target.value))}
            required={field.required}
            className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            placeholder={field.label}
          />
        );
      case 'date':
        return (
          <input
            type="date"
            value={formData[field.id] || ''}
            onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, e.target.value)}
            required={field.required}
            className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
          />
        );
      case 'checkbox':
        return (
          <label className="flex items-center">
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              checked={formData[field.id] || false}
              onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, e.target.checked)}
              className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600 border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-indigo-500"
            />
            <span className="ml-2 text-gray-700">{field.label}</span>
          </label>
        );
      case 'select':
        return (
          <select
            value={formData[field.id] || ''}
            onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, e.target.value)}
            required={field.required}
            className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
          >
            <option value="">Seçiniz</option>
            {field.options?.map((option) => (
              <option key={option} value={option}>
                {option}
              </option>
            ))}
          </select>
        );
      case 'table':
        const tableData = formData[field.id] || [];

        return (
          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
            <table className="min-w-full border-collapse border border-gray-300">
              <thead>
                <tr className="bg-gray-50">
                  {field.columns?.map((column) => (
                    <th
                      key={column.id}
                      className="border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-700"
                    >
                      {column.label}
                      {column.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
                    </th>
                  ))}
                  <th className="border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 w-20">
                    İşlemler
                  </th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {tableData.map((row: any, rowIndex: number) => (
                  <tr key={rowIndex} className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                    {field.columns?.map((column) => (
                      <td key={column.id} className="border border-gray-300 px-2 py-1">
                        {column.type === 'checkbox' ? (
                          <input
                            type="checkbox"
                            checked={row[column.id] || false}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              handleTableRowChange(field.id, rowIndex, column.id, e.target.checked)
                            }
                            className="mx-auto block h-4 w-4 text-indigo-600 border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-indigo-500"
                          />
                        ) : column.type === 'date' ? (
                          <input
                            type="date"
                            value={row[column.id] || ''}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              handleTableRowChange(field.id, rowIndex, column.id, e.target.value)
                            }
                            required={column.required}
                            className="w-full px-2 py-1 text-sm border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                          />
                        ) : column.type === 'number' ? (
                          <input
                            type="number"
                            value={row[column.id] || ''}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              handleTableRowChange(field.id, rowIndex, column.id, parseFloat(e.target.value) || '')
                            }
                            required={column.required}
                            className="w-full px-2 py-1 text-sm border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                          />
                        ) : column.type === 'select' ? (
                          <select
                            value={row[column.id] || ''}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              handleTableRowChange(field.id, rowIndex, column.id, e.target.value)
                            }
                            required={column.required}
                            className="w-full px-2 py-1 text-sm border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                          >
                            <option value="">Seçiniz</option>
                            {column.options?.map((option) => (
                              <option key={option} value={option}>
                                {option}
                              </option>
                            ))}
                          </select>
                        ) : column.type === 'upload' ? (
                          <div>
                            <input
                              type="file"
                              multiple
                              accept="image/*,.pdf,.doc,.docx"
                              onChange={(e) =>
                                handleTableFileChange(field.id, rowIndex, column.id, e.target.files)
                              }
                              className="w-full px-2 py-1 text-xs border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                            />
                            {tableFiles[field.id]?.[rowIndex]?.[column.id]?.length > 0 && (
                              <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-600">
                                {tableFiles[field.id][rowIndex][column.id].length} dosya seçildi
                              </p>
                            )}
                            {row[column.id] && (
                              <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">{row[column.id]}</p>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        ) : (
                          <input
                            type="text"
                            value={row[column.id] || ''}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              handleTableRowChange(field.id, rowIndex, column.id, e.target.value)
                            }
                            required={column.required}
                            className="w-full px-2 py-1 text-sm border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                          />
                        )}
                      </td>
                    ))}
                    <td className="border border-gray-300 px-2 py-1 text-center">
                      {(!field.minRows || tableData.length > field.minRows) && (
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => removeTableRow(field.id, rowIndex, field)}
                          className="text-red-600 hover:text-red-800 text-sm"
                        >
                          Sil
                        </button>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
            {(!field.maxRows || tableData.length < field.maxRows) && (
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => addTableRow(field.id, field)}
                className="mt-2 text-sm text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-800 px-3 py-1 border border-indigo-300 rounded-md"
              >
                + Satır Ekle
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        );
      default:
        return null;
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-lg">Yükleniyor...</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!formSchema) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-lg text-red-600">Form yüklenemedi.</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-4">
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">
            {formDefinition?.name}
          </h1>
          <Link
            href={`/forms/select?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`}
            className="text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-md border border-gray-300"
          >
            İptal
          </Link>
        </div>
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
          {formSchema.fields.map((field) => (
            <div key={field.id}>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                {field.label}
                {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
              </label>
              {renderField(field)}
            </div>
          ))}

          <div>
            <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
              Fotoğraf/Dosya Ekle
            </label>
            <input
              type="file"
              multiple
              accept="image/*,.pdf,.doc,.docx"
              onChange={handleFileChange}
              className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            />
            {files.length > 0 && (
              <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                {files.length} dosya seçildi
              </p>
            )}
          </div>

          {isUpdateMode && !canUpdate && (
            <div className="bg-yellow-50 border border-yellow-200 rounded-md p-4 mb-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-yellow-800">
                Bu form güncellenemez. Form onay sürecinde olduğu için güncelleme yapılamaz.
              </p>
            </div>
          )}

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={submitting || (isUpdateMode && !canUpdate)}
            className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-4 text-lg font-semibold rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            {submitting 
              ? (isUpdateMode ? 'Güncelleniyor...' : 'Gönderiliyor...') 
              : (isUpdateMode ? 'Güncelle' : 'Gönder')}
          </button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

Kalan linkleri güncelliyoruz:


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard } from 'lucide-react';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from '@/lib/api/types';

export default function JobOrderPage() {
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [trackingNoLabel, setTrackingNoLabel] = useState('İş Emri No');
  const [loadingSettings, setLoadingSettings] = useState(true);
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    loadTenantSettings();
  }, []);

  const loadTenantSettings = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: TenantApplicationSettingsDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.tenant.applicationSettings
      );
      if (response.data?.trackingNoLabel) {
        setTrackingNoLabel(response.data.trackingNoLabel);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading tenant settings:', error);
      // Use default label if error
    } finally {
      setLoadingSettings(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!trackingNo.trim()) return;

    setLoading(true);
    // Navigate to form selection with tracking no
    router.push(`/forms/select?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-6 text-gray-900">
            {trackingNoLabel} Girişi
          </h1>
          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
            <div>
              <label htmlFor="trackingNo" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                {trackingNoLabel}
              </label>
              <input
                id="trackingNo"
                type="text"
                value={trackingNo}
                onChange={(e) => setTrackingNo(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full px-4 py-3 text-lg border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                placeholder={`${trackingNoLabel} numarasını girin`}
                required
                autoFocus
              />
            </div>
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading || !trackingNo.trim()}
              className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-4 text-lg font-semibold rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
            >
              {loading ? 'Yükleniyor...' : 'Devam Et'}
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>
        <div className="mt-8 text-center">
          <Link
            href="/forms"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Form Paneline Dön
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>      
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';

export default function FormSuccessPage() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const router = useRouter();
  const trackingNo = searchParams.get('trackingNo') || '';

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="max-w-md w-full bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8 text-center">
        <div className="mb-6">
          <div className="mx-auto flex items-center justify-center h-16 w-16 rounded-full bg-green-100 mb-4">
            <svg
              className="h-8 w-8 text-green-600"
              fill="none"
              stroke="currentColor"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
              <path
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
                strokeWidth={2}
                d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"
              />
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
            Form Başarıyla Gönderildi
          </h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
            Formunuz başarıyla kaydedildi ve onay sürecine gönderildi.
          </p>
          {trackingNo && (
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-6">
              İş Emri: <span className="font-semibold">{trackingNo}</span>
            </p>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-3">
          <button
            onClick={() => router.push(`/forms/select?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(trackingNo)}`)}
            className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-3 px-4 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 font-semibold"
          >
            Yeni Form Doldur
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => router.push('/')}
            className="w-full bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 py-3 px-4 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-gray-500 font-semibold"
          >
            Ana Sayfaya Dön
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

Tüm değişiklikler tamamlandı. Özet:

## Tamamlanan Değişiklikler

### 1. Ana Sayfa Güncellendi
- "Mobil Panel" → "Form Paneli"
- İkon: `Smartphone` → `FileText`
- Link: `/job-order` → `/forms` (dashboard)
- Açıklama metni güncellendi

### 2. Yeni Dashboard: `/forms`
- İki kart:
  - "Yeni Form Doldur" → `/job-order` (takip no girişi)
  - "Formlarım" → `/my-forms` (tüm formlar)

### 3. Yeni Sayfa: `/my-forms`
- Kullanıcının tüm formlarını listeler (trackingNo olmadan)
- Güncellenebilir formlar:
  - Amber border ile vurgulanır
  - "Düzenle" butonu
  - "Bu form güncellenebilir" mesajı
- Diğer formlar:
  - "Detay" butonu
  - Sağ tarafta detay paneli (reporting sayfasındaki gibi):
    - Form bilgileri
    - Form verileri (JSON)
    - Ekler
    - İş akışı geçmişi

### 4. Form Seçimi Sayfası
- `/forms/select?trackingNo=xxx` route'u oluşturuldu
- Eski `/forms?trackingNo=xxx` mantığı buraya taşındı
- Tüm linkler güncellendi:
  - `/job-order` → `/forms/select?trackingNo=xxx`
  - Form doldurma sayfasındaki "İptal" butonu
  - Success sayfasındaki "Yeni Form Doldur" butonu

### 5. Navigasyon İyileştirmeleri
- `/job-order` sayfasındaki "Ana Sayfaya Dön" → "Form Paneline Dön" olarak güncellendi

## Yeni Kullanıcı Akışı

1. Ana Sayfa → "Form Paneli" kartı
2. Form Paneli Dashboard → İki seçenek:
   - "Yeni Form Doldur" → Takip no girişi → Form seçimi → Form doldurma
   - "Formlarım" → Tüm formlar listesi → Düzenle/Detay

Tüm değişiklikler tamamlandı ve lint hatası yok.

---

**User**

Süper, ellerine sağlık.
Ufak bir ekleme daha isteyebilir miyim? http://localhost:3000/my-forms sayfasında ileride çok form girilirse belli bir formu bulmak zorlaşabilir. Bu nedenle Formlarım  header'ının hemen altında http://localhost:3000/reporting sayfasında olduğu gibi Takip No arama panelini ekleyebilir miyiz? Eğer oraya belli takip no girmişse onllara göre fitlreler, değilse zaten hepsi gelir.

---

**Cursor**

Reporting sayfasındaki arama kutusunu inceleyip `/my-forms` sayfasına benzer bir arama ekliyorum:


`/my-forms` sayfasına takip no arama kutusu ekliyorum. Reporting sayfasındaki gibi:


`/my-forms` sayfasına takip no arama kutusu ekliyorum. Reporting sayfasındaki gibi:

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(mobile)/my-forms/page.tsx
// Değişiklikler:

export default function MyFormsPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [myForms, setMyForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState(''); // Eklendi
  const [searchLoading, setSearchLoading] = useState(false); // Eklendi
  const [trackingNoLabel, setTrackingNoLabel] = useState('Takip No'); // Eklendi

  useEffect(() => {
    loadTenantSettings(); // Eklendi
    loadMyForms();
  }, []);

  // Eklendi
  const loadTenantSettings = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: TenantApplicationSettingsDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.tenant.applicationSettings
      );
      if (response.data?.trackingNoLabel) {
        setTrackingNoLabel(response.data.trackingNoLabel);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading tenant settings:', error);
    }
  };

  // Güncellendi
  const loadMyForms = async (filterTrackingNo?: string) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const url = filterTrackingNo 
        ? `${API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getMyForms}?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(filterTrackingNo)}`
        : API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getMyForms;
      
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(url);
      setMyForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading my forms:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  // Eklendi
  const handleSearch = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setSearchLoading(true);
    try {
      if (trackingNo.trim()) {
        await loadMyForms(trackingNo.trim());
      } else {
        await loadMyForms(); // Tüm formları getir
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error searching:', error);
    } finally {
      setSearchLoading(false);
    }
  };

  // Eklendi
  const handleClearSearch = async () => {
    setTrackingNo('');
    await loadMyForms(); // Tüm formları getir
  };

  // ... mevcut kod ...

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-4">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        {/* ... mevcut link ... */}

        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Formlarım</h1>

        {/* Arama Kutusu - Eklendi */}
        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex gap-4">
            <input
              type="text"
              value={trackingNo}
              onChange={(e) => setTrackingNo(e.target.value)}
              placeholder={trackingNoLabel}
              className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            />
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={searchLoading}
              className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50"
            >
              {searchLoading ? 'Aranıyor...' : 'Ara'}
            </button>
            {trackingNo && (
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={handleClearSearch}
                className="bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-300"
              >
                Temizle
              </button>
            )}
          </form>
        </div>

        {/* ... mevcut form listesi ... */}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

Ayrıca import'a `TenantApplicationSettingsDto` eklenmeli:


Agent moduna geçerseniz uygulayabilirim.

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/(mobile)/my-forms/page.tsx
// Değişiklikler:

export default function MyFormsPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [myForms, setMyForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState(''); // Eklendi
  const [searchLoading, setSearchLoading] = useState(false); // Eklendi
  const [trackingNoLabel, setTrackingNoLabel] = useState('Takip No'); // Eklendi

  useEffect(() => {
    loadTenantSettings(); // Eklendi
    loadMyForms();
  }, []);

  // Eklendi
  const loadTenantSettings = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: TenantApplicationSettingsDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.tenant.applicationSettings
      );
      if (response.data?.trackingNoLabel) {
        setTrackingNoLabel(response.data.trackingNoLabel);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading tenant settings:', error);
    }
  };

  // Güncellendi
  const loadMyForms = async (filterTrackingNo?: string) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const url = filterTrackingNo 
        ? `${API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getMyForms}?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(filterTrackingNo)}`
        : API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getMyForms;
      
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(url);
      setMyForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading my forms:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  // Eklendi
  const handleSearch = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setSearchLoading(true);
    try {
      if (trackingNo.trim()) {
        await loadMyForms(trackingNo.trim());
      } else {
        await loadMyForms(); // Tüm formları getir
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error searching:', error);
    } finally {
      setSearchLoading(false);
    }
  };

  // Eklendi
  const handleClearSearch = async () => {
    setTrackingNo('');
    await loadMyForms(); // Tüm formları getir
  };

  // ... mevcut kod ...

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-4">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        {/* ... mevcut link ... */}

        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Formlarım</h1>

        {/* Arama Kutusu - Eklendi */}
        <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex gap-4">
            <input
              type="text"
              value={trackingNo}
              onChange={(e) => setTrackingNo(e.target.value)}
              placeholder={trackingNoLabel}
              className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            />
            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={searchLoading}
              className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50"
            >
              {searchLoading ? 'Aranıyor...' : 'Ara'}
            </button>
            {trackingNo && (
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={handleClearSearch}
                className="bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-300"
              >
                Temizle
              </button>
            )}
          </form>
        </div>

        {/* ... mevcut form listesi ... */}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```typescript
import { FormInstanceDto, FormStatus, TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
```

---

**User**

Agent moda geçtim.

---

**Cursor**

`/my-forms` sayfasına takip no arama kutusu ekliyorum:


```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormInstanceDto, FormStatus, TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard, Edit, Eye } from 'lucide-react';

const statusLabels: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'Taslak',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'İncelemede',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'Onaylandı',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'Reddedildi',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'Geri Gönderildi',
};

const statusClasses: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800',
};

export default function MyFormsPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [myForms, setMyForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadMyForms();
  }, []);

  const loadMyForms = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getMyForms
      );
      setMyForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading my forms:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleEditForm = (formInstance: FormInstanceDto) => {
    router.push(
      `/forms/${formInstance.formDefinitionId}/fill?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(formInstance.trackingNo)}&formInstanceId=${formInstance.id}`
    );
  };

  const handleViewDetails = async (formId: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading form details:', error);
    }
  };

  // Güncellenebilir form kontrolü
  const canUpdateForm = (form: FormInstanceDto) => {
    // İş akışı yoksa → güncellenebilir
    if (!form.workflowDefinitionId || !form.workflowDefinition?.steps?.length) {
      return form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft;
    }

    // İş akışı varsa:
    // - Draft → güncellenebilir
    // - Returned && firstStepOrder → güncellenebilir
    const firstStepOrder = form.workflowDefinition.steps
      .sort((a, b) => a.stepOrder - b.stepOrder)[0]?.stepOrder ?? 0;

    return form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft ||
      (form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Returned && form.currentStepOrder === firstStepOrder);
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-lg">Yükleniyor...</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-4">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/forms"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Form Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>

        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Formlarım</h1>

        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* Form List */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-2">
            {myForms.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-8 text-center text-gray-500">
                Henüz form doldurmadınız.
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {myForms.map((formInstance) => {
                  const canUpdate = canUpdateForm(formInstance);
                  return (
                    <div
                      key={formInstance.id}
                      className={`bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md p-6 border-2 ${
                        canUpdate ? 'border-amber-300 hover:border-amber-400' : 'border-gray-200'
                      } transition-all`}
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                        <div className="flex-1">
                          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                            {formInstance.formDefinitionName}
                          </h3>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-2">
                            <span
                              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[formInstance.currentStatus]}`}
                            >
                              {statusLabels[formInstance.currentStatus]}
                            </span>
                            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                              Takip No: {formInstance.trackingNo}
                            </p>
                          </div>
                          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                            Oluşturulma: {new Date(formInstance.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
                              year: 'numeric',
                              month: 'long',
                              day: 'numeric',
                              hour: '2-digit',
                              minute: '2-digit'
                            })}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex gap-2 ml-4">
                          {canUpdate ? (
                            <button
                              onClick={() => handleEditForm(formInstance)}
                              className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-amber-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-amber-600 transition-colors"
                            >
                              <Edit className="w-4 h-4" />
                              <span>Düzenle</span>
                            </button>
                          ) : (
                            <button
                              onClick={() => handleViewDetails(formInstance.id)}
                              className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-colors"
                            >
                              <Eye className="w-4 h-4" />
                              <span>Detay</span>
                            </button>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      {canUpdate && (
                        <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-amber-600">
                          Bu form güncellenebilir
                        </p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Detail Panel */}
          {selectedForm && (
            <div className="bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-6 sticky top-4">
              <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Form Detayları</h2>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setSelectedForm(null)}
                  className="text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
                >
                  ✕
                </button>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Form Bilgileri</h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-1">
                    <span className="font-medium">Form:</span> {selectedForm.formDefinitionName}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-1">
                    <span className="font-medium">Takip No:</span> {selectedForm.trackingNo}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-1">
                    <span className="font-medium">Durum:</span>{' '}
                    <span className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[selectedForm.currentStatus]}`}>
                      {statusLabels[selectedForm.currentStatus]}
                    </span>
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                    <span className="font-medium">Oluşturulma:</span>{' '}
                    {new Date(selectedForm.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
                      year: 'numeric',
                      month: 'long',
                      day: 'numeric',
                      hour: '2-digit',
                      minute: '2-digit'
                    })}
                  </p>
                </div>

                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Form Verileri</h3>
                  <pre className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded overflow-auto text-xs max-h-60">
                    {JSON.stringify(selectedForm.dataJson, null, 2)}
                  </pre>
                </div>

                {selectedForm.attachments && selectedForm.attachments.length > 0 && (
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">Ekler</h3>
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      {selectedForm.attachments.map((attachment) => {
                        const fileUrl = attachment.filePath.replace('/api/Files/', '/api/files/');
                        return (
                          <a
                            key={attachment.id}
                            href={fileUrl}
                            target="_blank"
                            rel="noopener noreferrer"
                            className="block text-indigo-600 hover:underline text-sm"
                          >
                            {attachment.fileName}
                          </a>
                        );
                      })}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {selectedForm.workflowActions && selectedForm.workflowActions.length > 0 && (
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2">İş Akışı Geçmişi</h3>
                    <div className="space-y-2 max-h-60 overflow-auto">
                      {selectedForm.workflowActions
                        .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.performedAt).getTime() - new Date(a.performedAt).getTime())
                        .map((action) => (
                          <div key={action.id} className="border-l-4 border-indigo-500 pl-3 text-sm">
                            <p className="font-medium">{action.actionTypeName || action.actionType}</p>
                            <p className="text-gray-500 text-xs">
                              {action.performedByUserName || action.performedBy} -{' '}
                              {new Date(action.performedAt).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
                            </p>
                            {action.comment && (
                              <p className="text-gray-600 text-xs mt-1">{action.comment}</p>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { FormInstanceDto, FormStatus, TenantApplicationSettingsDto } from '@/lib/api/types';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { LayoutDashboard, Edit, Eye } from 'lucide-react';

const statusLabels: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'Taslak',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'İncelemede',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'Onaylandı',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'Reddedildi',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'Geri Gönderildi',
};

const statusClasses: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
  [FormStatus.Draft]: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800',
  [FormStatus.InReview]: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
  [FormStatus.Approved]: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  [FormStatus.Rejected]: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800',
  [FormStatus.Returned]: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800',
};

export default function MyFormsPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [myForms, setMyForms] = useState<FormInstanceDto[]>([]);
  const [selectedForm, setSelectedForm] = useState<FormInstanceDto | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [trackingNo, setTrackingNo] = useState('');
  const [searchLoading, setSearchLoading] = useState(false);
  const [trackingNoLabel, setTrackingNoLabel] = useState('Takip No');

  useEffect(() => {
    loadTenantSettings();
    loadMyForms();
  }, []);

  const loadTenantSettings = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: TenantApplicationSettingsDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.tenant.applicationSettings
      );
      if (response.data?.trackingNoLabel) {
        setTrackingNoLabel(response.data.trackingNoLabel);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading tenant settings:', error);
    }
  };

  const loadMyForms = async (filterTrackingNo?: string) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const url = filterTrackingNo 
        ? `${API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getMyForms}?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(filterTrackingNo)}`
        : API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getMyForms;
      
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto[] }>(url);
      setMyForms(response.data ?? []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading my forms:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSearch = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setSearchLoading(true);
    try {
      if (trackingNo.trim()) {
        await loadMyForms(trackingNo.trim());
      } else {
        await loadMyForms(); // Tüm formları getir
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error searching:', error);
    } finally {
      setSearchLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleClearSearch = async () => {
    setTrackingNo('');
    await loadMyForms(); // Tüm formları getir
  };

  const handleEditForm = (formInstance: FormInstanceDto) => {
    router.push(
      `/forms/${formInstance.formDefinitionId}/fill?trackingNo=${encodeURIComponent(formInstance.trackingNo)}&formInstanceId=${formInstance.id}`
    );
  };

  const handleViewDetails = async (formId: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: FormInstanceDto }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getById(formId)
      );
      setSelectedForm(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading form details:', error);
    }
  };

  // Güncellenebilir form kontrolü
  const canUpdateForm = (form: FormInstanceDto) => {
    // İş akışı yoksa → güncellenebilir
    if (!form.workflowDefinitionId || !form.workflowDefinition?.steps?.length) {
      return form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft;
    }

    // İş akışı varsa:
    // - Draft → güncellenebilir
    // - Returned && firstStepOrder → güncellenebilir
    const firstStepOrder = form.workflowDefinition.steps
      .sort((a, b) => a.stepOrder - b.stepOrder)[0]?.stepOrder ?? 0;

    return form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Draft ||
      (form.currentStatus === FormStatus.Returned && form.currentStepOrder === firstStepOrder);
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-lg">Yükleniyor...</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-4">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <Link
            href="/forms"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
          >
            <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4" />
            Form Paneli
          </Link>
        </div>

        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Formlarım</h1>

        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* Form List */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-2">
            {myForms.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-8 text-center text-gray-500">
                Henüz form doldurmadınız.
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {myForms.map((formInstance) => {
                  const canUpdate = canUpdateForm(formInstance);
                  return (
                    <div
                      key={formInstance.id}
                      className={`bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md p-6 border-2 ${
                        canUpdate ? 'border-amber-300 hover:border-amber-400' : 'border-gray-200'
                      } transition-all`}
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                        <div className="flex-1">
                          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                            {formInstance.formDefinitionName}
                          </h3>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-2">
                            <span
                              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full ${statusClasses[formInstance.currentStatus]}`}
                            >
                              {statusLabels[formInstance.currentStatus]}
                            </span>
                            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                              Takip No: {formInstance.trackingNo}
                            </p>
                          </div>
                          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                            Oluşturulma: {new Date(formInstance.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
                              year: 'numeric',
                              month: 'long',
                              day: 'numeric',
                              hour: '2-digit',
                              minute: '2-digit'
                            })}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex gap-2 ml-4">
                          {canUpdate ? (
                            <button
                              onClick={() => handleEditForm(formInstance)}
                              className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-amber-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-amber-600 transition-colors"
                            >
                              <Edit className="w-4 h-4" />
                              <span>Düzenle</span>
                            </button>
                          ) : (
                            <button
                              onClick={() => handleViewDetails(formInstance.id)}
                              className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-colors"
                            >
                              <Eye className="w-4 h-4" />
                              <span>Detay</span>
                            </button>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      {canUpdate && (
                        <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-amber-600">
                          Bu form güncellenebilir
                        </p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
```
