```tsx
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors"
            >
              <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
              Çıkış Yap
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

Yapılan değişiklikler:
1. `isAuthenticatedClient` import edildi
2. `useState` ve `useEffect` ile authentication durumu kontrol ediliyor
3. `mounted` state ile hydration hatası önleniyor
4. Login olmamışsa: "Giriş yapmanız gerekmektedir" mesajı + "Giriş Yap" butonu (`LogIn` ikonu)
5. Login olmuşsa: Sadece "Çıkış Yap" butonu görünüyor
6. `LogIn` ikonu `lucide-react`'ten import edildi

Bu değişiklikleri uygulamak için agent moda geçin.


Değişiklikler uygulandı. Güncellenmiş dosyayı kontrol ediyorum:


Değişiklikler uygulandı. Özet:

## Tamamlanan Değişiklikler

### Ana Sayfa Footer Güncellemesi (`Frontend/src/app/page.tsx`)

1. Yeni import'lar:
   - `LogIn` ikonu (`lucide-react`)
   - `isAuthenticatedClient` fonksiyonu
   - `useState`, `useEffect` (React hooks)
   - `useRouter` (Next.js navigation)

2. Authentication durumu kontrolü:
   - `isAuthenticated` state'i eklendi
   - `mounted` state'i eklendi (hydration hatası önlemek için)
   - `useEffect` ile sayfa yüklendiğinde authentication durumu kontrol ediliyor

3. Koşullu render:
   - Login olmamışsa:
     - "Giriş yapmanız gerekmektedir" mesajı gösteriliyor
     - "Giriş Yap" butonu gösteriliyor (`LogIn` ikonu ile)
     - Butona tıklanınca `/login` sayfasına yönlendiriyor
   - Login olmuşsa:
     - Mesaj ve "Giriş Yap" butonu gizleniyor
     - Sadece "Çıkış Yap" butonu gösteriliyor

4. Stil:
   - "Giriş Yap" butonu: `hover:text-indigo-600`
   - "Çıkış Yap" butonu: `hover:text-red-600`

Footer, kullanıcının giriş durumuna göre dinamik olarak güncelleniyor. Lint hatası yok.

---

**User**

isAuthenticatedClient kullanmamız gerekiyor. Çünkü ben sonra bu kullanımdan dosyanın en altına yazdığım comment'te belirttiğim gibi vazgeçmiştim:
@auth-client.ts (11-13) 

Bunun yerine auth-server.ts'teki isAuthenticatedServer() metotunu kullanayım istedim ancak run-time şu hata dönüyor:
Build Error
Failed to compile

Next.js (14.2.33) is outdated (learn more)
./src/lib/api/auth-server.ts
Error: 
  × You're importing a component that needs next/headers. That only works in a Server Component which is not supported in the pages/ directory. Read more: https://nextjs.org/docs/getting-started/
  │ react-essentials#server-components
  │ 
  │ 
   ╭─[D:\Workspace\MovithForms\Frontend\src\lib\api\auth-server.ts:1:1]
 1 │ import { cookies } from "next/headers";
   · ───────────────────────────────────────
 2 │ import type { UserInfo } from "@/types/userInfo";
 3 │ 
 3 │ export async function isAuthenticatedServer(): Promise<boolean> {
   ╰────
This error occurred during the build process and can only be dismissed by fixing the error.

---

**Cursor**

`isAuthenticatedServer` server-side bir fonksiyon; client component'te kullanılamaz. Client-side'da authentication kontrolü için mevcut API route'u kullanabiliriz. İlgili dosyaları inceliyorum:


`isAuthenticatedServer` server-side bir fonksiyon; client component'te kullanılamaz. Client-side'da authentication kontrolü için `/api/auth/check` endpoint'ini kullanın.

İşte güncellenmiş kod:

```tsx
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { Settings, FileText, Briefcase, LogOut, LogIn } from 'lucide-react';
import { useLogout } from '@/hooks/useLogout';
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';

export default function Home() {
  const logout = useLogout();
  const router = useRouter();
  const [isAuthenticated, setIsAuthenticated] = useState(false);
  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const checkAuth = async () => {
      setMounted(true);
      try {
        const response = await fetch('/api/auth/check');
        setIsAuthenticated(response.ok);
      } catch (error) {
        setIsAuthenticated(false);
      }
    };
    checkAuth();
  }, []);

  const handleLogin = () => {
    router.push('/login');
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100">
      <div className="max-w-4xl w-full px-4">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900">Movith Forms</h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">No-Code Form Management & Workflow Platform</p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* Admin Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/firm-admin"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-indigo-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-indigo-200 transition-colors">
                <Settings className="w-12 h-12 text-indigo-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Admin Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Form ve iş akışı tanımlamalarını yönetin, kullanıcıları ve rolleri yönetin, entegrasyon ayarlarını yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-indigo-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-indigo-700">
                Giriş Yap →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Form Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/forms"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-green-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-green-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-green-200 transition-colors">
                <FileText className="w-12 h-12 text-green-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Form Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Formları doldurun, formlarınızı görüntüleyin ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-green-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-green-700">
                Başla →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Operations Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/operations"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-blue-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-blue-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors">
                <Briefcase className="w-12 h-12 text-blue-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">İşlemler Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Raporları görüntüleyin, onayları yönetin ve bildirimleri takip edin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-blue-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-blue-700">
                Giriş Yap →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
          {mounted && !isAuthenticated && (
            <>
              <p className="mb-4">Giriş yapmanız gerekmektedir</p>
              <button
                onClick={handleLogin}
                className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors"
              >
                <LogIn className="w-4 h-4" />
                Giriş Yap
              </button>
            </>
          )}
          {mounted && isAuthenticated && (
            <button
              onClick={logout}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors"
            >
              <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
              Çıkış Yap
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Değişiklikler:

1. `isAuthenticatedServer` import'u kaldırıldı
2. `/api/auth/check` endpoint'i `fetch` ile çağrılıyor
3. `response.ok` ile authentication durumu kontrol ediliyor
4. Hata durumunda `isAuthenticated` `false` olarak ayarlanıyor

Bu yaklaşım:
- Client component'te çalışır
- Server-side authentication kontrolünü kullanır
- HttpOnly cookie'leri doğru şekilde kontrol eder
- Mevcut API endpoint'ini kullanır

Değişiklikleri uygulamak için agent moda geçin.

```typescriptreact
import { useLogout } from '@/hooks/useLogout';
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';

export default function Home() {
  const logout = useLogout();
  const router = useRouter();
  const [isAuthenticated, setIsAuthenticated] = useState(false);
  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const checkAuth = async () => {
      setMounted(true);
      try {
        const response = await fetch('/api/auth/check');
        setIsAuthenticated(response.ok);
      } catch (error) {
        setIsAuthenticated(false);
      }
    };
    checkAuth();
  }, []);

  const handleLogin = () => {
    router.push('/login');
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100">
      <div className="max-w-4xl w-full px-4">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">

          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">No-Code Form Management & Workflow Platform</p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* Admin Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/firm-admin"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-indigo-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-indigo-200 transition-colors">
                <Settings className="w-12 h-12 text-indigo-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Admin Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Form ve iş akışı tanımlamalarını yönetin, kullanıcıları ve rolleri yönetin, entegrasyon ayarlarını yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-indigo-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-indigo-700">
                Giriş Yap →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Form Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/forms"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-green-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-green-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-green-200 transition-colors">
                <FileText className="w-12 h-12 text-green-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Form Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Formları doldurun, formlarınızı görüntüleyin ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-green-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-green-700">
                Başla →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Operations Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/operations"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-blue-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-blue-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors">
                <Briefcase className="w-12 h-12 text-blue-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">İşlemler Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Raporları görüntüleyin, onayları yönetin ve bildirimleri takip edin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-blue-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-blue-700">
                Giriş Yap →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
          {mounted && !isAuthenticated && (
            <>
              <p className="mb-4">Giriş yapmanız gerekmektedir</p>
              <button
                onClick={handleLogin}
                className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors"
              >

            <button
              onClick={logout}

```

---

**User**

Güzel. Bir düzenleme daha isteyebilir miyim? isAuthenticated için yazdığın aşağıdkai kodu @useAuthGuard.ts içinde ayrı bir export edilmiş const olarak yazman mümkün mü? Çünkü böyle olursa başka client side sayfalarda da isAuthenticated şeklinde basitçe kullanabilirim.

---

**Cursor**

`useAuthGuard.ts` dosyasını inceliyorum. Ardından `isAuthenticated` kontrolü için ayrı bir hook ekleyeceğim:


`useIsAuthenticated` hook'unu ekleyip `useAuthGuard.ts` dosyasını güncelliyorum:

```typescript
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { useRouter, usePathname } from "next/navigation";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { useAuth } from "@/hooks/useAuth";

type AuthGuardOptions = {
  requiredSystemRoles?: string[];
  requiredTenantRoles?: string[];
  redirectTo?: string;
};

/**
 * Authentication durumunu kontrol eden hook
 * @returns { isAuthenticated: boolean, loading: boolean }
 */
export const useIsAuthenticated = () => {
  const [isAuthenticated, setIsAuthenticated] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    const checkAuth = async () => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch("/api/auth/check");
        setIsAuthenticated(res.ok);
      } catch (error) {
        setIsAuthenticated(false);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    checkAuth();
  }, []);

  return { isAuthenticated, loading };
};

export const useAuthGuard = (options: AuthGuardOptions = {}) => {
  const router = useRouter();
  const pathname = usePathname();
  const { roles, tenantRoles, tenantId, loaded } = useAuth(); // 👈 loaded geldi

  useEffect(() => {
    async function checkAuth() {
      try {
        const res = await fetch("/api/auth/check");
        console.log("Auth check response:", res);

        // 1) Login değilse
        if (!res.ok) {
          toast.warning("Lütfen giriş yapın");
          router.push("/login");
          return;
        }

        // 2) Login sayfasındayken giriş yapmışsa dashboard'a at
        if (pathname.includes("/login")) {
          router.push("/dashboard");
          return;
        }

        // 🔑 3) Auth cookie'leri henüz okunmadıysa (roles/tenantRoles boşken)
        if (!loaded) {
          // Sadece ilk render'ı atla, bir sonraki effect döngüsünde tekrar kontrol edeceğiz
          return;
        }

        // 4) Sistem rolleri
        const requiredSystemRoles = options.requiredSystemRoles ?? [];
        if (requiredSystemRoles.length > 0) {
          const hasSystemRole = requiredSystemRoles.some((r) => roles.includes(r));
          if (!hasSystemRole) {
            toast.error("Bu sayfaya erişim yetkiniz yok.");
            router.replace(options.redirectTo ?? "/unauthorized");
            return;
          }
        }

        // 5) Tenant rolleri
        const requiredTenantRoles = options.requiredTenantRoles ?? [];
        if (requiredTenantRoles.length > 0) {
          if (!tenantId) {
            toast.error("Tenant bilgisi bulunamadı.");
            router.replace("/login");
            return;
          }

          const hasTenantRole = requiredTenantRoles.some((r) =>
            tenantRoles.includes(r)
          );

          if (!hasTenantRole) {
            toast.error("Bu sayfaya erişim yetkiniz yok.");
            router.replace(options.redirectTo ?? "/unauthorized");
            return;
          }
        }
      } catch {
        toast.error("Giriş kontrolü başarısız oldu");
        router.push("/login");
      }
    }

    checkAuth();
  }, [
    router,
    pathname,
    roles,
    tenantRoles,
    tenantId,
    loaded,                      // 👈 dependency'ye eklendi
    options.requiredSystemRoles,
    options.requiredTenantRoles,
    options.redirectTo,
  ]);
};
```

`page.tsx` dosyasında kullanımı:

```tsx
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { Settings, FileText, Briefcase, LogOut, LogIn } from 'lucide-react';
import { useLogout } from '@/hooks/useLogout';
import { useIsAuthenticated } from '@/hooks/useAuthGuard';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';

export default function Home() {
  const logout = useLogout();
  const router = useRouter();
  const { isAuthenticated, loading } = useIsAuthenticated();

  const handleLogin = () => {
    router.push('/login');
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100">
      {/* ... diğer kodlar ... */}

      <div className="mt-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
        {!loading && !isAuthenticated && (
          <>
            <p className="mb-4">Giriş yapmanız gerekmektedir</p>
            <button
              onClick={handleLogin}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors"
            >
              <LogIn className="w-4 h-4" />
              Giriş Yap
            </button>
          </>
        )}
        {!loading && isAuthenticated && (
          <button
            onClick={logout}
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors"
          >
            <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
            Çıkış Yap
          </button>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Özellikler:

1. `useIsAuthenticated` hook'u:
   - `isAuthenticated`: boolean
   - `loading`: boolean (ilk kontrol sırasında `true`)
   - `/api/auth/check` endpoint'ini kullanır
   - Reaktif: component mount olduğunda otomatik kontrol eder

2. Kullanım:
   - Herhangi bir client component'te import edip kullanabilirsiniz
   - `loading` state'i ile ilk yükleme durumunu yönetebilirsiniz

3. Avantajlar:
   - Kod tekrarı yok
   - Merkezi authentication kontrolü
   - Kolay kullanım

Değişiklikleri uygulamak için agent moda geçin.

```typescript
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { useRouter, usePathname } from "next/navigation";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { useAuth } from "@/hooks/useAuth";

type AuthGuardOptions = {
  requiredSystemRoles?: string[];
  requiredTenantRoles?: string[];
  redirectTo?: string;
};

/**
 * Authentication durumunu kontrol eden hook
 * @returns { isAuthenticated: boolean, loading: boolean }
 */
export const useIsAuthenticated = () => {
  const [isAuthenticated, setIsAuthenticated] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    const checkAuth = async () => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch("/api/auth/check");
        setIsAuthenticated(res.ok);
      } catch (error) {
        setIsAuthenticated(false);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    checkAuth();
  }, []);

  return { isAuthenticated, loading };
};

export const useAuthGuard = (options: AuthGuardOptions = {}) => {
  const router = useRouter();
  const pathname = usePathname();
  const { roles, tenantRoles, tenantId, loaded } = useAuth(); // 👈 loaded geldi

  useEffect(() => {
    async function checkAuth() {
      try {
        const res = await fetch("/api/auth/check");
        console.log("Auth check response:", res);

        // 1) Login değilse
        if (!res.ok) {
          toast.warning("Lütfen giriş yapın");
          router.push("/login");
          return;
        }

        // 2) Login sayfasındayken giriş yapmışsa dashboard'a at
        if (pathname.includes("/login")) {
          router.push("/dashboard");
          return;
        }

        // 🔑 3) Auth cookie'leri henüz okunmadıysa (roles/tenantRoles boşken)
        if (!loaded) {
          // Sadece ilk render'ı atla, bir sonraki effect döngüsünde tekrar kontrol edeceğiz
          return;
        }

        // 4) Sistem rolleri
        const requiredSystemRoles = options.requiredSystemRoles ?? [];
        if (requiredSystemRoles.length > 0) {
          const hasSystemRole = requiredSystemRoles.some((r) => roles.includes(r));
          if (!hasSystemRole) {
            toast.error("Bu sayfaya erişim yetkiniz yok.");
            router.replace(options.redirectTo ?? "/unauthorized");
            return;
          }
        }

        // 5) Tenant rolleri
        const requiredTenantRoles = options.requiredTenantRoles ?? [];
        if (requiredTenantRoles.length > 0) {
          if (!tenantId) {
            toast.error("Tenant bilgisi bulunamadı.");
            router.replace("/login");
            return;
          }

          const hasTenantRole = requiredTenantRoles.some((r) =>
            tenantRoles.includes(r)
          );

          if (!hasTenantRole) {
            toast.error("Bu sayfaya erişim yetkiniz yok.");
            router.replace(options.redirectTo ?? "/unauthorized");
            return;
          }
        }
      } catch {
        toast.error("Giriş kontrolü başarısız oldu");
        router.push("/login");
      }
    }

    checkAuth();
  }, [
    router,
    pathname,
    roles,
    tenantRoles,
    tenantId,
    loaded,                      // 👈 dependency'ye eklendi
    options.requiredSystemRoles,
    options.requiredTenantRoles,
    options.redirectTo,
  ]);
};
```

**Cursor**

`useIsAuthenticated` hook'unu ekleyip `page.tsx`'i güncelliyorum:


```typescript
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { useRouter, usePathname } from "next/navigation";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { useAuth } from "@/hooks/useAuth";

type AuthGuardOptions = {
  requiredSystemRoles?: string[];
  requiredTenantRoles?: string[];
  redirectTo?: string;
};

/**
 * Authentication durumunu kontrol eden hook
 * @returns { isAuthenticated: boolean, loading: boolean }
 */
export const useIsAuthenticated = () => {
  const [isAuthenticated, setIsAuthenticated] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    const checkAuth = async () => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch("/api/auth/check");
        setIsAuthenticated(res.ok);
      } catch (error) {
        setIsAuthenticated(false);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    checkAuth();
  }, []);

  return { isAuthenticated, loading };
};

export const useAuthGuard = (options: AuthGuardOptions = {}) => {
  const router = useRouter();
  const pathname = usePathname();
  const { roles, tenantRoles, tenantId, loaded } = useAuth(); // 👈 loaded geldi

  useEffect(() => {
    async function checkAuth() {
      try {
        const res = await fetch("/api/auth/check");
        console.log("Auth check response:", res);

        // 1) Login değilse
        if (!res.ok) {
          toast.warning("Lütfen giriş yapın");
          router.push("/login");
          return;
        }

        // 2) Login sayfasındayken giriş yapmışsa dashboard'a at
        if (pathname.includes("/login")) {
          router.push("/dashboard");
          return;
        }

        // 🔑 3) Auth cookie'leri henüz okunmadıysa (roles/tenantRoles boşken)
        if (!loaded) {
          // Sadece ilk render'ı atla, bir sonraki effect döngüsünde tekrar kontrol edeceğiz
          return;
        }

        // 4) Sistem rolleri
        const requiredSystemRoles = options.requiredSystemRoles ?? [];
        if (requiredSystemRoles.length > 0) {
          const hasSystemRole = requiredSystemRoles.some((r) => roles.includes(r));
          if (!hasSystemRole) {
            toast.error("Bu sayfaya erişim yetkiniz yok.");
            router.replace(options.redirectTo ?? "/unauthorized");
            return;
          }
        }

        // 5) Tenant rolleri
        const requiredTenantRoles = options.requiredTenantRoles ?? [];
        if (requiredTenantRoles.length > 0) {
          if (!tenantId) {
            toast.error("Tenant bilgisi bulunamadı.");
            router.replace("/login");
            return;
          }

          const hasTenantRole = requiredTenantRoles.some((r) =>
            tenantRoles.includes(r)
          );

          if (!hasTenantRole) {
            toast.error("Bu sayfaya erişim yetkiniz yok.");
            router.replace(options.redirectTo ?? "/unauthorized");
            return;
          }
        }
      } catch {
        toast.error("Giriş kontrolü başarısız oldu");
        router.push("/login");
      }
    }

    checkAuth();
  }, [
    router,
    pathname,
    roles,
    tenantRoles,
    tenantId,
    loaded,                      // 👈 dependency'ye eklendi
    options.requiredSystemRoles,
    options.requiredTenantRoles,
    options.redirectTo,
  ]);
};
```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { Settings, FileText, Briefcase, LogOut, LogIn } from 'lucide-react';
import { useLogout } from '@/hooks/useLogout';
import { useIsAuthenticated } from '@/hooks/useAuthGuard';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';

export default function Home() {
  const logout = useLogout();
  const router = useRouter();
  const { isAuthenticated, loading } = useIsAuthenticated();

  const handleLogin = () => {
    router.push('/login');
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100">
      <div className="max-w-4xl w-full px-4">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900">Movith Forms</h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">No-Code Form Management & Workflow Platform</p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* Admin Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/firm-admin"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-indigo-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-indigo-200 transition-colors">
                <Settings className="w-12 h-12 text-indigo-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Admin Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Form ve iş akışı tanımlamalarını yönetin, kullanıcıları ve rolleri yönetin, entegrasyon ayarlarını yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-indigo-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-indigo-700">
                Giriş Yap →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Form Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/forms"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-green-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-green-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-green-200 transition-colors">
                <FileText className="w-12 h-12 text-green-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Form Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Formları doldurun, formlarınızı görüntüleyin ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-green-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-green-700">
                Başla →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Operations Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/operations"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-blue-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-blue-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors">
                <Briefcase className="w-12 h-12 text-blue-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">İşlemler Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Raporları görüntüleyin, onayları yönetin ve bildirimleri takip edin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-blue-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-blue-700">
                Giriş Yap →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
          {mounted && !isAuthenticated && (
            <>
              <p className="mb-4">Giriş yapmanız gerekmektedir</p>
              <button
                onClick={handleLogin}
                className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors"
              >
                <LogIn className="w-4 h-4" />
                Giriş Yap
              </button>
            </>
          )}
          {mounted && isAuthenticated && (
            <button
              onClick={logout}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors"
            >
              <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
              Çıkış Yap
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { Settings, FileText, Briefcase, LogOut, LogIn } from 'lucide-react';
import { useLogout } from '@/hooks/useLogout';
import { useIsAuthenticated } from '@/hooks/useAuthGuard';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';

export default function Home() {
  const logout = useLogout();
  const router = useRouter();
  const { isAuthenticated, loading } = useIsAuthenticated();

  const handleLogin = () => {
    router.push('/login');
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100">
      <div className="max-w-4xl w-full px-4">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900">Movith Forms</h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">No-Code Form Management & Workflow Platform</p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* Admin Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/firm-admin"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-indigo-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-indigo-200 transition-colors">
                <Settings className="w-12 h-12 text-indigo-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Admin Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Form ve iş akışı tanımlamalarını yönetin, kullanıcıları ve rolleri yönetin, entegrasyon ayarlarını yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-indigo-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-indigo-700">
                Giriş Yap →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Form Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/forms"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-green-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-green-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-green-200 transition-colors">
                <FileText className="w-12 h-12 text-green-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">Form Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Formları doldurun, formlarınızı görüntüleyin ve yönetin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-green-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-green-700">
                Başla →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>

          {/* Operations Panel Card */}
          <Link 
            href="/operations"
            className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-blue-500"
          >
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
              <div className="bg-blue-100 rounded-full p-4 mb-4 group-hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors">
                <Briefcase className="w-12 h-12 text-blue-600" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900">İşlemler Paneli</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Raporları görüntüleyin, onayları yönetin ve bildirimleri takip edin
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 text-blue-600 font-semibold group-hover:text-blue-700">
                Giriş Yap →
              </div>
            </div>
          </Link>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
          {!loading && !isAuthenticated && (
            <>
              <p className="mb-4">Giriş yapmanız gerekmektedir</p>
              <button
                onClick={handleLogin}
                className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors"
              >
                <LogIn className="w-4 h-4" />
                Giriş Yap
              </button>
            </>
          )}
          {!loading && isAuthenticated && (
            <button
              onClick={logout}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors"
            >
              <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
              Çıkış Yap
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

Değişiklikler uygulandı. Dosyaları kontrol ediyorum:


Değişiklikler uygulandı. Özet:

## Tamamlanan Değişiklikler

### 1. `useIsAuthenticated` Hook Eklendi (`Frontend/src/hooks/useAuthGuard.ts`)

- Yeni export edilmiş hook: `useIsAuthenticated`
- Döndürdüğü değerler:
  - `isAuthenticated`: boolean — kullanıcının giriş durumu
  - `loading`: boolean — ilk kontrol sırasında `true`
- Özellikler:
  - `/api/auth/check` endpoint'ini kullanır
  - Component mount olduğunda otomatik kontrol eder
  - Hata durumunda `isAuthenticated` `false` olur
  - JSDoc yorumu eklendi

### 2. `page.tsx` Güncellendi

- Eski kod kaldırıldı:
  - `isAuthenticatedServer` import'u
  - `useState` ve `useEffect` ile manuel kontrol
  - `mounted` state'i
- Yeni kod:
  - `useIsAuthenticated` hook'u import edildi
  - Hook kullanılarak authentication durumu alınıyor
  - `loading` state'i ile render kontrolü yapılıyor

### 3. Kullanım Örneği

Artık herhangi bir client component'te şu şekilde kullanabilirsiniz:

```typescript
import { useIsAuthenticated } from '@/hooks/useAuthGuard';

export default function MyComponent() {
  const { isAuthenticated, loading } = useIsAuthenticated();
  
  if (loading) return <div>Yükleniyor...</div>;
  
  return (
    <div>
      {isAuthenticated ? 'Giriş yapılmış' : 'Giriş yapılmamış'}
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Avantajlar

1. Merkezi kontrol: Tüm authentication kontrolleri tek bir hook'ta
2. Yeniden kullanılabilirlik: Herhangi bir component'te kolayca kullanılabilir
3. Temiz kod: Kod tekrarı yok
4. Loading state: İlk yükleme durumu yönetiliyor
5. Type-safe: TypeScript desteği

Lint hatası yok. Tüm değişiklikler tamamlandı.

```typescript
import { useIsAuthenticated } from '@/hooks/useAuthGuard';

export default function MyComponent() {
  const { isAuthenticated, loading } = useIsAuthenticated();
  
  if (loading) return <div>Yükleniyor...</div>;
  
  return (
    <div>
      {isAuthenticated ? 'Giriş yapılmış' : 'Giriş yapılmamış'}
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

**User**

Artık güzel bir menü ihtiyacımız var. Giriş Yapan kullanıcının kim olduğunun yazdığı, signout linki, Bildirim adedi NotificationBell (Basınca bildirimlerim sayfasına gider), Onayda Bekleyenlerin adedi yazacağı bir ikon (Basınca Bekleyen Onaylar sayfasına gider), Bilgilerim (İleride implementasyonunu yaparız) vs. gibi bir menü konsa güzel olabilir. Bu menü PC, mobil ve tablette güzel bir şekilde çıkmalı.

**Cursor**


Mevcut yapıyı inceliyorum:



Layout dosyalarını ve mevcut component'leri inceliyorum:



Responsive bir navbar component'i oluşturuyorum. Önce kullanıcı bilgilerini almak için bir API route'u ekliyorum:

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/api/users/me/route.ts
import { backendFetch } from "@/lib/api/apiClient";
import { withAuthHeader } from "@/lib/api/auth-server";
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import type { UserInfo } from '@/types/userInfo';

// GET /api/users/me - Get current user info
export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const userInfo = await backendFetch<UserInfo>(
      "/Users/GetLoggedOnUserInfo",
      await withAuthHeader({ method: "GET" })
    );

    return NextResponse.json(userInfo);
  } catch (error: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error.message || 'An error occurred' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}
```

```typescript
// Frontend/src/components/navbar/UserNavbar.tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { 
  Bell, 
  CheckCircle2, 
  User, 
  LogOut, 
  Menu, 
  X,
  Settings
} from 'lucide-react';
import { useIsAuthenticated } from '@/hooks/useAuthGuard';
import { useLogout } from '@/hooks/useLogout';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { NotificationBell } from '@/components/notifications/NotificationBell';
import { PendingApprovalsBadge } from '@/components/pending-approvals/PendingApprovalsBadge';
import type { UserInfo } from '@/types/userInfo';

export function UserNavbar() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const { isAuthenticated, loading } = useIsAuthenticated();
  const logout = useLogout();
  const [userInfo, setUserInfo] = useState<UserInfo | null>(null);
  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [pendingCount, setPendingCount] = useState(0);
  const [notificationCount, setNotificationCount] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isAuthenticated) {
      loadUserInfo();
      loadPendingCount();
      loadNotificationCount();
      
      // Her 30 saniyede bir güncelle
      const interval = setInterval(() => {
        loadPendingCount();
        loadNotificationCount();
      }, 30000);
      
      return () => clearInterval(interval);
    }
  }, [isAuthenticated]);

  const loadUserInfo = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: UserInfo }>(
        '/api/users/me'
      );
      setUserInfo(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading user info:', error);
    }
  };

  const loadPendingCount = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: any[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getPendingApprovals
      );
      setPendingCount(response.data?.length ?? 0);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading pending count:', error);
    }
  };

  const loadNotificationCount = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: number }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.notifications.getUnreadCount
      );
      setNotificationCount(response.data ?? 0);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading notification count:', error);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return null;
  }

  if (!isAuthenticated) {
    return null;
  }

  const handlePendingApprovalsClick = () => {
    router.push('/operations/pending-approvals');
    setMobileMenuOpen(false);
  };

  const handleNotificationsClick = () => {
    router.push('/operations/notifications');
    setMobileMenuOpen(false);
  };

  return (
    <nav className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 shadow-sm sticky top-0 z-50">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center h-16">
          {/* Logo/Brand */}
          <div className="flex-shrink-0">
            <Link href="/" className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">
              Movith Forms
            </Link>
          </div>

          {/* Desktop Menu */}
          <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-4">
            {/* Pending Approvals */}
            <button
              onClick={handlePendingApprovalsClick}
              className="relative flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-50 rounded-md transition-colors"
            >
              <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span>Bekleyen Onaylar</span>
              {pendingCount > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold leading-none text-white bg-amber-600 rounded-full min-w-[20px]">
                  {pendingCount > 99 ? '99+' : pendingCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>

            {/* Notifications */}
            <button
              onClick={handleNotificationsClick}
              className="relative flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-pink-600 hover:bg-pink-50 rounded-md transition-colors"
            >
              <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span>Bildirimler</span>
              {notificationCount > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold leading-none text-white bg-red-600 rounded-full min-w-[20px]">
                  {notificationCount > 99 ? '99+' : notificationCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>

            {/* User Menu */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 pl-3 border-l border-gray-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-indigo-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                  <User className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600" />
                </div>
                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
                  {userInfo?.userName || 'Kullanıcı'}
                </span>
              </div>

              {/* Profile Dropdown (Basit) */}
              <div className="relative group">
                <button className="flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900">
                  <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />
                </button>
                <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 bg-white rounded-md shadow-lg border border-gray-200 opacity-0 invisible group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:visible transition-all">
                  <div className="py-1">
                    <button
                      className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2"
                      onClick={() => {
                        // Bilgilerim - ileride implementasyon
                        setMobileMenuOpen(false);
                      }}
                    >
                      <User className="w-4 h-4" />
                      Bilgilerim
                    </button>
                    <button
                      onClick={logout}
                      className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 flex items-center gap-2"
                    >
                      <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
                      Çıkış Yap
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Mobile Menu Button */}
          <div className="md:hidden">
            <button
              onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen)}
              className="p-2 rounded-md text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100"
            >
              {mobileMenuOpen ? (
                <X className="w-6 h-6" />
              ) : (
                <Menu className="w-6 h-6" />
              )}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Mobile Menu */}
        {mobileMenuOpen && (
          <div className="md:hidden border-t border-gray-200 py-4 space-y-2">
            {/* User Info */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2">
              <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-indigo-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                <User className="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <div className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">
                  {userInfo?.userName || 'Kullanıcı'}
                </div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                  {userInfo?.email}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Mobile Menu Items */}
            <button
              onClick={handlePendingApprovalsClick}
              className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-amber-50 rounded-md"
            >
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600" />
                <span>Bekleyen Onaylar</span>
              </div>
              {pendingCount > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold leading-none text-white bg-amber-600 rounded-full min-w-[20px]">
                  {pendingCount > 99 ? '99+' : pendingCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={handleNotificationsClick}
              className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-pink-50 rounded-md"
            >
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <Bell className="w-5 h-5 text-pink-600" />
                <span>Bildirimler</span>
              </div>
              {notificationCount > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold leading-none text-white bg-red-600 rounded-full min-w-[20px]">
                  {notificationCount > 99 ? '99+' : notificationCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>

            <button
              className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-md"
              onClick={() => {
                // Bilgilerim - ileride implementasyon
                setMobileMenuOpen(false);
              }}
            >
              <User className="w-5 h-5" />
              Bilgilerim
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={() => {
                logout();
                setMobileMenuOpen(false);
              }}
              className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-md"
            >
              <LogOut className="w-5 h-5" />
              Çıkış Yap
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </nav>
  );
}
```

Ana layout'a ekleyin:

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/layout.tsx
import type { Metadata } from "next";
import "./globals.css";
import { Toaster } from "sonner";
import { OneSignalScript } from "@/components/OneSignalScript";
import { UserNavbar } from "@/components/navbar/UserNavbar";

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "Movith Forms",
  description: "No-Code Form Management & Workflow Platform",
};

export default function RootLayout({
  children,
}: Readonly<{
  children: React.ReactNode;
}>) {
  return (
    <html lang="tr">
      <head>
        <OneSignalScript />
      </head>
      <body>
        <UserNavbar />
        {children}
        <Toaster />
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}
```

API endpoint'ini endpoints.ts'e ekleyin:

```typescript
// Frontend/src/lib/api/endpoints.ts (güncelleme)
export const API_ENDPOINTS = {
  // ... mevcut kodlar ...
  users: {
    getRoles: '/users/get-roles',
    getMe: '/users/me', // Yeni eklenen
  },
  // ... diğer kodlar ...
};
```

## Özellikler:

1. Responsive: Desktop, tablet ve mobilde uyumlu
2. Kullanıcı bilgileri: Kullanıcı adı ve email gösterimi
3. Bildirimler: Badge ile okunmamış bildirim sayısı
4. Bekleyen onaylar: Badge ile bekleyen onay sayısı
5. Dropdown menü: Desktop'ta hover ile açılan menü
6. Mobil menü: Hamburger menü ile mobilde açılan menü
7. Otomatik güncelleme: Her 30 saniyede bir sayılar güncellenir
8. Sign out: Çıkış yapma butonu

Değişiklikleri uygulamak için agent moda geçin.

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/api/users/me/route.ts
import { backendFetch } from "@/lib/api/apiClient";
import { withAuthHeader } from "@/lib/api/auth-server";
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import type { UserInfo } from '@/types/userInfo';

// GET /api/users/me - Get current user info
export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const userInfo = await backendFetch<UserInfo>(
      "/Users/GetLoggedOnUserInfo",
      await withAuthHeader({ method: "GET" })
    );

    return NextResponse.json(userInfo);
  } catch (error: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error.message || 'An error occurred' },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}
```

```typescript
// Frontend/src/components/navbar/UserNavbar.tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { 
  Bell, 
  CheckCircle2, 
  User, 
  LogOut, 
  Menu, 
  X,
  Settings
} from 'lucide-react';
import { useIsAuthenticated } from '@/hooks/useAuthGuard';
import { useLogout } from '@/hooks/useLogout';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import { NotificationBell } from '@/components/notifications/NotificationBell';
import { PendingApprovalsBadge } from '@/components/pending-approvals/PendingApprovalsBadge';
import type { UserInfo } from '@/types/userInfo';

export function UserNavbar() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const { isAuthenticated, loading } = useIsAuthenticated();
  const logout = useLogout();
  const [userInfo, setUserInfo] = useState<UserInfo | null>(null);
  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [pendingCount, setPendingCount] = useState(0);
  const [notificationCount, setNotificationCount] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isAuthenticated) {
      loadUserInfo();
      loadPendingCount();
      loadNotificationCount();
      
      // Her 30 saniyede bir güncelle
      const interval = setInterval(() => {
        loadPendingCount();
        loadNotificationCount();
      }, 30000);
      
      return () => clearInterval(interval);
    }
  }, [isAuthenticated]);

  const loadUserInfo = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: UserInfo }>(
        '/api/users/me'
      );
      setUserInfo(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading user info:', error);
    }
  };

  const loadPendingCount = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: any[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getPendingApprovals
      );
      setPendingCount(response.data?.length ?? 0);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading pending count:', error);
    }
  };

  const loadNotificationCount = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: number }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.notifications.getUnreadCount
      );
      setNotificationCount(response.data ?? 0);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading notification count:', error);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return null;
  }

  if (!isAuthenticated) {
    return null;
  }

  const handlePendingApprovalsClick = () => {
    router.push('/operations/pending-approvals');
    setMobileMenuOpen(false);
  };

  const handleNotificationsClick = () => {
    router.push('/operations/notifications');
    setMobileMenuOpen(false);
  };

  return (
    <nav className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 shadow-sm sticky top-0 z-50">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center h-16">
          {/* Logo/Brand */}
          <div className="flex-shrink-0">
            <Link href="/" className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">
              Movith Forms
            </Link>
          </div>

          {/* Desktop Menu */}
          <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-4">
            {/* Pending Approvals */}
            <button
              onClick={handlePendingApprovalsClick}
              className="relative flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-50 rounded-md transition-colors"
            >
              <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span>Bekleyen Onaylar</span>
              {pendingCount > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold leading-none text-white bg-amber-600 rounded-full min-w-[20px]">
                  {pendingCount > 99 ? '99+' : pendingCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>

            {/* Notifications */}
            <button
              onClick={handleNotificationsClick}
              className="relative flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-pink-600 hover:bg-pink-50 rounded-md transition-colors"
            >
              <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span>Bildirimler</span>
              {notificationCount > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold leading-none text-white bg-red-600 rounded-full min-w-[20px]">
                  {notificationCount > 99 ? '99+' : notificationCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>

            {/* User Menu */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 pl-3 border-l border-gray-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-indigo-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                  <User className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600" />
                </div>
                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
                  {userInfo?.userName || 'Kullanıcı'}
                </span>
              </div>

              {/* Profile Dropdown (Basit) */}
              <div className="relative group">
                <button className="flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900">
                  <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />
                </button>
                <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 bg-white rounded-md shadow-lg border border-gray-200 opacity-0 invisible group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:visible transition-all">
                  <div className="py-1">
                    <button
                      className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2"
                      onClick={() => {
                        // Bilgilerim - ileride implementasyon
                        setMobileMenuOpen(false);
                      }}
                    >
                      <User className="w-4 h-4" />
                      Bilgilerim
                    </button>
                    <button
                      onClick={logout}
                      className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 flex items-center gap-2"
                    >
                      <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
                      Çıkış Yap
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Mobile Menu Button */}
          <div className="md:hidden">
            <button
              onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen)}
              className="p-2 rounded-md text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100"
            >
              {mobileMenuOpen ? (
                <X className="w-6 h-6" />
              ) : (
                <Menu className="w-6 h-6" />
              )}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Mobile Menu */}
        {mobileMenuOpen && (
          <div className="md:hidden border-t border-gray-200 py-4 space-y-2">
            {/* User Info */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2">
              <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-indigo-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                <User className="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <div className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">
                  {userInfo?.userName || 'Kullanıcı'}
                </div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                  {userInfo?.email}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Mobile Menu Items */}
            <button
              onClick={handlePendingApprovalsClick}
              className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-amber-50 rounded-md"
            >
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600" />
                <span>Bekleyen Onaylar</span>
              </div>
              {pendingCount > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold leading-none text-white bg-amber-600 rounded-full min-w-[20px]">
                  {pendingCount > 99 ? '99+' : pendingCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={handleNotificationsClick}
              className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-pink-50 rounded-md"
            >
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <Bell className="w-5 h-5 text-pink-600" />
                <span>Bildirimler</span>
              </div>
              {notificationCount > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold leading-none text-white bg-red-600 rounded-full min-w-[20px]">
                  {notificationCount > 99 ? '99+' : notificationCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>

            <button
              className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-md"
              onClick={() => {
                // Bilgilerim - ileride implementasyon
                setMobileMenuOpen(false);
              }}
            >
              <User className="w-5 h-5" />
              Bilgilerim
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={() => {
                logout();
                setMobileMenuOpen(false);
              }}
              className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-md"
            >
              <LogOut className="w-5 h-5" />
              Çıkış Yap
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </nav>
  );
}
```

```typescript
// Frontend/src/app/layout.tsx
import type { Metadata } from "next";
import "./globals.css";
import { Toaster } from "sonner";
import { OneSignalScript } from "@/components/OneSignalScript";
import { UserNavbar } from "@/components/navbar/UserNavbar";

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "Movith Forms",
  description: "No-Code Form Management & Workflow Platform",
};

export default function RootLayout({
  children,
}: Readonly<{
  children: React.ReactNode;
}>) {
  return (
    <html lang="tr">
      <head>
        <OneSignalScript />
      </head>
      <body>
        <UserNavbar />
        {children}
        <Toaster />
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}
```

```typescript
import type { UserInfo } from '@/types/userInfo';

// GET /api/users/me - Get current user info

  try {

      "/Users/GetLoggedOnUserInfo",
      await withAuthHeader({ method: "GET" })
    );

    return NextResponse.json(userInfo);
  } catch (error: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: error.message || 'An error occurred' },

  }
}
```

```typescriptreact
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { 
  Bell, 
  CheckCircle2, 
  User, 
  LogOut, 
  Menu, 
  X,
  Settings
} from 'lucide-react';
import { useIsAuthenticated } from '@/hooks/useAuthGuard';
import { useLogout } from '@/hooks/useLogout';
import { routeHandlerClient } from '@/lib/api/routeHandlerClient';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '@/lib/api/endpoints';
import type { UserInfo } from '@/types/userInfo';

export function UserNavbar() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const { isAuthenticated, loading } = useIsAuthenticated();
  const logout = useLogout();
  const [userInfo, setUserInfo] = useState<UserInfo | null>(null);
  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [pendingCount, setPendingCount] = useState(0);
  const [notificationCount, setNotificationCount] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isAuthenticated) {
      loadUserInfo();
      loadPendingCount();
      loadNotificationCount();
      
      // Her 30 saniyede bir güncelle
      const interval = setInterval(() => {
        loadPendingCount();
        loadNotificationCount();
      }, 30000);
      
      return () => clearInterval(interval);
    }
  }, [isAuthenticated]);

  const loadUserInfo = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: UserInfo }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.users.getMe
      );
      setUserInfo(response.data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading user info:', error);
    }
  };

  const loadPendingCount = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: any[] }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.forms.getPendingApprovals
      );
      setPendingCount(response.data?.length ?? 0);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading pending count:', error);
    }
  };

  const loadNotificationCount = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await routeHandlerClient.get<{ data: number }>(
        API_ENDPOINTS.notifications.getUnreadCount
      );
      setNotificationCount(response.data ?? 0);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading notification count:', error);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return null;
  }

  if (!isAuthenticated) {
    return null;
  }

  const handlePendingApprovalsClick = () => {
    router.push('/operations/pending-approvals');
    setMobileMenuOpen(false);
  };

  const handleNotificationsClick = () => {
    router.push('/operations/notifications');
    setMobileMenuOpen(false);
  };

  return (
    <nav className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 shadow-sm sticky top-0 z-50">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center h-16">
          {/* Logo/Brand */}
          <div className="flex-shrink-0">
            <Link href="/" className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">
              Movith Forms
            </Link>
          </div>

          {/* Desktop Menu */}
          <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-4">
            {/* Pending Approvals */}
            <button
              onClick={handlePendingApprovalsClick}
              className="relative flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-50 rounded-md transition-colors"
            >
              <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span>Bekleyen Onaylar</span>
              {pendingCount > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold leading-none text-white bg-amber-600 rounded-full min-w-[20px]">
                  {pendingCount > 99 ? '99+' : pendingCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>

            {/* Notifications */}
            <button
              onClick={handleNotificationsClick}
              className="relative flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-pink-600 hover:bg-pink-50 rounded-md transition-colors"
            >
              <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span>Bildirimler</span>
              {notificationCount > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold leading-none text-white bg-red-600 rounded-full min-w-[20px]">
                  {notificationCount > 99 ? '99+' : notificationCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>

            {/* User Menu */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 pl-3 border-l border-gray-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-indigo-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                  <User className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600" />
                </div>
                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
                  {userInfo?.userName || 'Kullanıcı'}
                </span>
              </div>

              {/* Profile Dropdown (Basit) */}
              <div className="relative group">
                <button className="flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900">
                  <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />
                </button>
                <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 bg-white rounded-md shadow-lg border border-gray-200 opacity-0 invisible group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:visible transition-all">
                  <div className="py-1">
                    <button
                      className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2"
                      onClick={() => {
                        // Bilgilerim - ileride implementasyon
                        setMobileMenuOpen(false);
                      }}
                    >
                      <User className="w-4 h-4" />
                      Bilgilerim
                    </button>
                    <button
                      onClick={logout}
                      className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 flex items-center gap-2"
                    >
                      <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
                      Çıkış Yap
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Mobile Menu Button */}
          <div className="md:hidden">
            <button
              onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen)}
              className="p-2 rounded-md text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100"
            >
              {mobileMenuOpen ? (
                <X className="w-6 h-6" />
              ) : (
                <Menu className="w-6 h-6" />
              )}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Mobile Menu */}
        {mobileMenuOpen && (
          <div className="md:hidden border-t border-gray-200 py-4 space-y-2">
            {/* User Info */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2">
              <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-indigo-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                <User className="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <div className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">
                  {userInfo?.userName || 'Kullanıcı'}
                </div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                  {userInfo?.email}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Mobile Menu Items */}
            <button
              onClick={handlePendingApprovalsClick}
              className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-amber-50 rounded-md"
            >
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600" />
                <span>Bekleyen Onaylar</span>
              </div>
              {pendingCount > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold leading-none text-white bg-amber-600 rounded-full min-w-[20px]">
                  {pendingCount > 99 ? '99+' : pendingCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={handleNotificationsClick}
              className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-pink-50 rounded-md"
            >
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <Bell className="w-5 h-5 text-pink-600" />
                <span>Bildirimler</span>
              </div>
              {notificationCount > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold leading-none text-white bg-red-600 rounded-full min-w-[20px]">
                  {notificationCount > 99 ? '99+' : notificationCount}
                </span>
              )}
            </button>

            <button
              className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-md"
              onClick={() => {
                // Bilgilerim - ileride implementasyon
                setMobileMenuOpen(false);
              }}
            >
              <User className="w-5 h-5" />
              Bilgilerim
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={() => {
                logout();
                setMobileMenuOpen(false);
              }}
              className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-md"
            >
              <LogOut className="w-5 h-5" />
              Çıkış Yap
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </nav>
  );
}

```

```typescript
export const API_ENDPOINTS = {
  auth: {
    login: '/auth/login', // Route Handler
  },
  users: {
    getRoles: '/users/get-roles',
    getMe: '/users/me',
  },
  formDefinitions: {
    getAll: '/form-definitions',
    getForUser: '/form-definitions/for-user',
    getById: (id: string) => `/form-definitions/${id}`,
    create: '/form-definitions',
    update: (id: string) => `/form-definitions/${id}`,
    delete: (id: string) => `/form-definitions/${id}`,
  },
  workflowDefinitions: {
    getAll: '/workflow-definitions',
    getById: (id: string) => `/workflow-definitions/${id}`,
    create: '/workflow-definitions',
    update: (id: string) => `/workflow-definitions/${id}`,
    delete: (id: string) => `/workflow-definitions/${id}`,
  },
  forms: {
    start: '/forms/start',
    getById: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}`,
    submit: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}/submit`,
    performAction: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}/actions`,
    getByTrackingNo: (trackingNo: string) => `/forms/by-tracking-no/${trackingNo}`,
    update: (id: string) => `/forms/${id}/update`,
    getPendingApprovals: '/forms/pending-approvals',
    getMyForms: '/forms/my-forms',
  },
  files: {
    upload: '/files/upload',
    get: (filePath: string) => `/files/${filePath}`,
  },
  tenant: {
    roles: '/tenant/roles',
    roleById: (id: string) => `/tenant/roles/${id}`,
    users: '/tenant/users',
    userRoles: (userId: string) => `/tenant/users/${userId}/roles`,
    userNotificationChannels: (userId: string) => `/tenant/users/${userId}/notification-channels`,
    userSystemRoles: (userId: string) => `/tenant/users/${userId}/system-roles`,
    integrationSettings: '/tenant/integration-settings',
    applicationSettings: '/tenant/application-settings',
  },
  notifications: {
    getAll: '/notifications',
    getUnreadCount: '/notifications/unread-count',
    markAllAsRead: '/notifications/mark-all-read',
    markAsRead: '/notifications/mark-read',
  },
};

```

```typescriptreact
import { UserNavbar } from "@/components/navbar/UserNavbar";

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "Movith Forms",
  description: "No-Code Form Management & Workflow Platform",
};

export default function RootLayout({
  children,
}: Readonly<{
  children: React.ReactNode;
}>) {
  return (
    <html lang="tr">
      <head>
        <OneSignalScript />
      </head>
      <body>
        <UserNavbar />
        {children}

  );
}
```
